獸人控遊戲索引
主頁 所有遊戲 搜尋 常見問題 貢獻者 語言
型別： 全部 視覺小說/約會模擬 動作 角色扮演 冒險 格鬥 射擊 智力 其他
取向： 全部 男同性戀 女同性戀 其他
平臺： 全部 桌面裝置 行動裝置 Web 遊戲機
狀態： 全部 已釋出 其他
檢視： 標準 複雜
9:22

9:22 是一部神祕視覺小說，以 2010 年的北美洲為故事背景。

Spencer，一個患有慢性失眠症的大一新生，努力維持著他的新生活。在第一學期第三週後，他幾乎不再結交新朋友，不再嘗試新事物，也放棄了招聘者告訴他可以追求的一切東西。某日清晨，他如往常一樣睡過了頭，時鐘顯示在 9:22。就在那天，一切似乎都不太對勁。然而，在他真正進入校園後，事情開始變得分崩離析。

使用 itch.io 下面的連結下載遊戲，或點選這裡直接在你的瀏覽器裡遊玩。

如果你有任何問題，或者在遊戲中發現了錯字，或者只想簡單問個好，請在 Twitter 上給我留言。

阿達斯特拉 / Adastra

你在羅馬留學時突然被外星人綁架。他想從你那裡得到什麼？好吧，他似乎不想告訴你真相。而在搞明白髮生了什麼之前，你已經被帶到了離地球一百萬英里之外的地方。

阿達斯特拉（Adastra）是一部融合了大量科幻和政治陰謀的浪漫主義視覺小說。你將體驗在一個動盪帝國中的冒險，同時還要決定應該信任或不信任誰。

在這種充滿背叛和陰謀的氛圍下，你開始懷疑綁架您的外星人是否是你最信任的人。

我們出色的精靈藝術出自畫家 HAPS 之手，你可以在他的 Twitter 上找到他。 背景藝術由也非常出色的畫家 Blacksun 製作，你可以在她的 FurAffinity 上找到她。

下一部續作: Khemia

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

課後活動 / After Class

WHAT IS "AFTER CLASS"?

After Class is a gay, mainly NSFW story driven furry visual novel focused on the relationship between the main character (you / default name: Walter) and the people he meets. This VN covers some controversial topics, your everyday conversation, dead memes, and such. Every choice you make has its consequences, and it might change the outcome of the story.

THE STORY

You play as Walter, a clumsy husky/malamute/wolf mix beastman, who has yearned for a change since the high school times. After thousands of reasoning and arguments, you managed to convince your parents to let you move out.

Finally free from a house that you described as a prison in all but name, you started moving to your new house, where your parents rented for you.

Even though they let you move out, they had one rule you should follow: "Move to Highwell and attend Highwell University." which you agreed gleefully.

It's the first day of college, and you know no one in this city. You met a bunch of new people! Some of them are weird, some of them are nice, some had a troubled past. But one thing for sure: they are being too friendly with you as if you were a friend they used to know...?

As you get to know them better, your head started to hurt more often, forgotten memories resurfacing, and cryptic dreams keep appearing in your sleep. They are almost like a part of something really important... What is it, and why can't you remember anything about it?

Did your parents send you here, knowing that you'll remember everything?

Or is it a mere coincidence?

Music by Sentive (Copyright © 2002-2018 SLOS/background), Incompetech, bensound, and audionatix. Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 3.0 / 4.0

"Putting In The Work" from Morenatsu Homecoming by Stormsinger Studios, used with permissions.

Backgrounds by Vui. Character designed by Andy Peng, drawn by Wolgen.

You can support me by being a patron on my Patreon page, or you can share this demo to your friends. Thank you!

Become a Patron! | Follow andeh on Twitter. | Follow AFCL on Twitter | Follow Wolgen on Twitter

After Years

About the Game

After Years is an adult themed Visual Novel that features kemono (furry) characters.

The story revolves around Welkin – a young wolf who after six years finally reunites with his childhood friends during late, summer vacations.

Spend a week in the peaceful, seaside town of Rochelle and follow Welkin, who wants to make up for lost time with his friends. Make decisions that will affect the bonds between him and his three companions, with the potential of starting a romantic relationship. Love knows no bounds.

Content Warning

This game contains nudity and sexual themes between male characters and is intended for mature audiences only [+18].

Patreon Project

If you enjoy the game, please consider supporting its development by becoming a Patron. Please click here to visit my Patreon page.

Important Notices & Known Issues

  • This build represents a work in progress and may differ from the final product.
  • Important Notice: The game doesn't transfer save files between the versions, however, players will always have the option to input dialogue choices and continue from previous builds upon start up.

External Links

  • Changelog
  • Character Profiles
  • Contact & Bug Report
  • Patreon
  • Twitter.

致最愛的你 / 愛する君へ

“給我最愛的你”

大家好，我是KENN。
我和はち做了一款免費的（R-18）輕小說遊戲！

就定在4月1日釋出吧！我們原本是這麼打算的
拖著拖著不知怎麼就到了今天。
這是一款免費遊戲，所以請務必試玩看看！
順帶一提，遊戲在pixiv上是提前釋出的
提前釋出狀態將在20天后，也就是6月1日左右結束。
之後我們也將在網站上免費釋出本作。

期待各位的反饋。

Amorous

Thrust yourself to the front of the line of Amorous, a bustling furry night club that invites you to explore it's neon lights and eccentric characters. Immerse yourself with a fleshed out character creator and treat yourself to a varied cast of potential dates to explore!

What makes Amorous special?

Amorous is a furry dating simulator which aims to provide a high quality graphic novel experience for free. Shake up the formula with animated NPCs, sandbox environments, real choices and interactive mini-games to keep you engaged. Avoid the normal pitfalls of dating games with an incredibly varied roster. Ranging from foxes to felines, male to female and everything in-between.

So what's in it for me?

  • 9 fully datable characters
  • Thousands of lines of dialogue with branching trees for replayability
  • Several mini-games and novelties
  • Fursona Maker / Character Creator with content for all gender, body-type and personality preferences.

What does the Steam version offer me?

  • Steam Achievements
  • Steam Cloud (Coming soon)

Originally, we had Steam Trading Cards in this list too, but we were attended at the fact pure free games don't get that option.

How can this be free? There must be a catch! No catch! No depleting in-game currency every time you attempt to date a character, no in-game shop prompting you to buy more parts for your character. It's all there for you to enjoy for free.

This game has seen many years of spare-time development, and all of it wouldn't have been possible without the support of our loyal Patrons. A free release on Steam is our way of thanking them and making sure the game will always remain available for everyone to enjoy.

鱗翼天使 / Angels with Scaly Wings

Angels with Scaly Wings is a unique visual novel set in a world populated by dragons.

After the discovery of a mysterious portal, you are selected as one of the few humans to travel to the world of dragons. While you serve as an ambassador, you learn more about this strangely familiar place, and discover that your human colleague knows more than he’s letting on…

It will be up to you and the friends you make to uncover the conspiracy that threatens the newly discovered world - and in the process, you may even find love.

Epic storyline

With a script of over 175.000 words, our mindbending story will lead you through a number of dramatic twists and turns.

Hang out with the locals

Meet with a variety of dragons on 5 main and 5 secondary character routes. Listen to their stories and learn about their hopes, dreams and problems.

The choice is yours

Make deep, impactful decisions that can affect the game world permanently and lead you to more than 13 different endings.

A town full of secrets

Investigate a number of mysteries during free time sections. Manage your time wisely and be careful who you meet with, as each encounter may bring forth unintended consequences.

Unlockable gallery

Find exclusive images of the main cast.

集合啦！動物森友會 / Animal Crossing: New Horizons

在無人島開始新生活。

與現實同時進行的世界裡，每天隨性自在地過日子的「動物森友會」系列。

從垂釣、捕捉蟲子、園藝等戶外活動，到房間製作、服飾等各式各樣的樂趣，透過一年時間享受愉快生活。這次作品裡，「Nook Inc.」策劃了「無人島移居套餐計劃」，移居無人島從零開始新生活。

話雖如此，就算是苦惱著不知從何開始的您，「Nook Inc.」也會為您的生活提供支援，所以不用擔心。

您亦可以透過島上生活，有機會結交一班一同參加了移居計劃的動物們。

日常生活中所需要的工具和傢俱，可以以島嶼上獲取的樹枝和石頭等作為材料，DIY(Do It Yourself) 自己動手手工製作。

傢俱可放置在屋內和室外。 請自由調整，改變家居風格，盡情體驗安排您的理想生活。

這次作品內，若有其他玩家在同一島上居住，可以最多4人同時遊玩。

透過鄰近主機通訊/網路通訊，出發到其他人的島嶼，最多可以聚集8人一起遊玩。

在365日展露出不同風貌的島嶼上，可以悠閒自在地生活，也可以野性奔放地生活。

您會以哪一種生活方式度過？

  • 島上最多可居住8人 (每名使用者為1位玩家)
  • 使用TV模式或桌上模式時，每位玩家需要1個控制器
  • 遊玩本商品時，以1臺Nintendo Switch和1份遊戲，最多8名登入了主機的使用者可於同一個島嶼遊玩
  • 在1臺Nintendo Switch主機使用多份遊戲軟體也只能建立最多1個島嶼。如希望在其他島嶼遊玩，需另外使用其他主機
  • 本商品不支援使用者和儲存資料轉移

阿努比斯與湮沒之骨 / Anubis and the Buried Bone

Explore an egyptian themed authentic retro action-adventure platformer.

Powerful souls have escaped Anubis's clutches, so he has to hunt them down, enhancing his abilities along the way by discovering numerous items and unlocking secrets. In the style of classic 8-bit action-adventure games, Anubis and the Buried Bone offers an open world that you decide how to conquer. Be wary, though, because Anubis's difficulty is as authentic as its graphics! Scour the world for its secrets and gain the advantage over your enemies, enhancing Anubis's abilities with dozens of unique treasures.

A Place to Call Home

(The game contains some adult themes. You must be 18 or older to play!)

What is this game about?

A Place to Call Home is a Character driven genre kinetic visual novel with themes of comedy, romance and drama centered on gay audiences.

What's it about?

The story centers around 3 characters in their everyday life, 5 years after an alternate-universe world war II.

NSFW SCENES?

In the future.

Thank you for all your support! <3

Check out my Patreon here!

Big thanks to Tavern of Spear devs for permission to their logo on the sprite's shirt, to Compymono from Nekoji. for that reference I took too far, and Howly's permission for an Adastra reference.

Game is in continuous development

Arches

《Arches》包含成人主題，您必須年滿 18 歲才能遊玩。《Arches》可能會導致強烈刺激，可能並不適合所有人。遊戲存在吸毒，精神疾病和恐怖元素，並伴隨暴力畫面與描述。在下載之前，請認真確認並考慮到您的心理健康！

一對伴侶來到迴音鎮做一些超自然事件的調查，這座小鎮自從集體癔症爆發後已經廢棄了五年。儘管如此，一些邪惡的東西仍然潛伏在這座小鎮之中，足以使恐懼延續下去。

《Arches》是一個獨立故事，講述的是迴音鎮事件發生以後的故事。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

阿門羅 / Armello

《阿門羅》將富有深度的卡牌戰術遊戲，策略性豐富的桌面遊戲，以及角色扮演遊戲三種風格融為一體，讓玩家體驗華麗盛大的冒險之旅。

您將扮演阿門羅一個家族的勇士，在王國裡尋找、策劃、探索、僱傭特工、擊敗怪物、施展法術，並與其他玩家展開對抗，為完成終極目標：攻入宮殿，成為阿門羅的統治者而奮鬥。阿門羅王國無比美麗又危機四伏，隨處都可能有災禍和強盜藏身。除此之外，更有一種稱為“腐化”災難四處蔓延，王國中的生物無一倖免。

在 Steam 上獲取 在 Google Play 上獲取 在 Apple appstore 上獲取 在 Nintendo E-Shop 上獲取 Playstation 在 Microsoft Store 上獲取 官方網站 官方 Twitter

Ato

《Ato》是一款善於營造氛圍的銀河城類刀劍對決遊戲，背景設定在日本封建時代。遊戲採用畫面敘事為主，講述了一位父親為了與妻小過上平靜生活而拋卻自己舊日的行徑，然而不久後孩子卻被奪走，平靜生活就此被打破……

在《Ato》中，每一場戰鬥都是至死方休的艱苦對決。你可以施展高風險的招架技巧、藉助敵方進行跳躍、閃避他們的攻擊、並解鎖新能力來獲得更多在迎敵時的選擇。每一場戰鬥都有獨特的風格和特色。挑戰、觀察並戰勝你面對的每一名敵人，努力從你曾經效力的勢力中奪回你的孩子。

探索多彩和氛圍不同的各種環境，獲得新能力來解開環境中的謎題，發現這個世界中的祕密，體驗一段全程沒有任何文字的故事。

  • 戰鬥多變而激烈 - 每一場戰鬥都是獨一無二的公平對決，充滿了各自的個性。
  • 擁有美麗氛圍的世界 - 你將置身於一個寧靜而神祕的世界。
  • 畫面敘事的故事 - 遊戲中幾乎沒有文字，因此也不會有語言障礙。
  • 探索 - 找到各種新能力與升級效果，不斷變強來打敗更加強大的敵人們。
  • 能表達角色情感的細節手工畫素動畫。
  • 東方風格的器樂音樂 - 從幽玄的笛聲到令人心潮澎湃的太鼓，音樂繁多。

難度選項：

  • 協助 - 適用於休閒通關
  • 無障礙 - 略帶挑戰，需要中等技術
  • 有經驗的 - 為熟悉高難度遊戲的資深玩家提供。

在Ato的世界中探索、體驗、並戰勝強敵吧。

在 Steam 上獲取

A Walk Home

When a male stripper is going home on a full moon night, many NPCs wants to fuck him.

The download is >1GB, be aware of that!
You will need a somewhat decent gaming rig in order to play. Nothing too fancy, but just don't expect the game to run smoothly with onboard graphics or something like that.

So, here we go. My first venture into the world of Video Games! Fun! :3
I am really excited about this. I always wanted to make a Video Game. Since this is my first time doing something like this, don't expect all too much. It will be a tad buggy, a tad ugly, and a tad poorly optimized. But I made it and I'm proud of it :)

I'll plan on doing more Games, or at least interactive experiences, in the future, it was real fun! Let me know what you think!

I also added a cheat menu! If you lost your save through a bug you still can continue where you left off! Or... you know, just skip a level that pisses you off or unlock all statues if you don't feel like doing it yourself. No shame in that!

To Acess the cheat menu (spoiler warning!) - After you start up the game just type cum real fast on your keyboard as soon as the main title appears, but before the foxy starts walking in from the left.

If you have fun with the game, please consider buying me a coffey over at: https://ko-fi.com/Kemonokun
or check out my Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/kemonokun

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

B101

B101 is a homoerotic visual novel made with Ren'Py, that puts you in place of a newly-graduated commander who gets sent to a secret base in a frozen desert. Why they've sent you there is a mystery, and it will test the loyalty you have to your nation.

This project is free to download and play, and if you're interested in supporting the content (which would help greatly with future artwork and paying for editing costs), then we would appreciate anything you can give. Our aim is to post one update at the end of each month.

This project contains situations of a M/M erotic nature, and by downloading you agree that you are over the age of 18.

About the Team:

Maxiess

I'm the writer and creator for the project. I'm a young guy that is always dreaming about something, this project being one of those things. This is all brand new to me, so I welcome your comments and suggestions.

  • FurAffinity
  • Twitter

Sean

Sean is the owner of Ottercorrect Literature Services, an editing and publishing company. He will be helping me fix the grammatical mistakes in the story, as well as help with basic coding bugs that might pop up and giving general project guidance. He is also open for more projects, if you're a writer of novels, visual novels, or pretty much anything else.

  • Website
  • Twitter

hroft32

hroft32 is our artist. He is helping me with all the artwork, animation, audio, coding and new ideas for this project.

  • FurAffinity

浣熊硬探 / Backbone

關於這款遊戲

這個世界最為可怕的邪惡並非人人都能對抗，要有超群的智慧，要有不屈不撓的精神，還要有極其強烈、感天動地的正義感。

可跟你有什麼關係？你只想掙夠房租。

你不是英雄，普普通通路人甲而已。只是運氣不順，撞上了倒黴的案子，還有可能是驚天大案，不想查也得查。

偵探，該幹嘛幹嘛吧。

遊戲簡介

《浣熊硬探》是一款新式黑色角色扮演偵探冒險遊戲。你將成為浣熊私家偵探霍華德·洛託，走進不列顛哥倫比亞省溫哥華，探索這個精心創作的高畫質畫素反烏托邦社會。

霍華德·洛託幹了好幾年私家偵探，可惜接手的都是雞毛碎皮的小案子，多少個寂寞的夜晚，輾轉難眠，收入微薄，只能勉強生活。眼下這樁奇怪的案子讓你的生活有了改變，起初以為只是無關緊要的夫妻恩怨，後來卻要被迫面對這座城市壓迫市民的體制結構。

遊戲玩法

《浣熊硬探》融合了現代電子遊戲和經典指向點選冒險遊戲的相關玩法，包括潛行、探索以及類似於老派CRPG的對話系統。

你將：

  • 追尋真相，並與形形色色的角色建立有意義的聯絡
  • 置身於高牆林立的溫哥華，探索繁華與衰敗的城區
  • 尋找線索，蒐集證據
  • 破解謎題，低調行事
  • 體驗浣熊的生活

遊戲特色

新式黑色反烏托邦

《浣熊硬探》的溫哥華危險、蕭條而又陰鬱，不過並非完全喪失了希望。這個世界冰冷荒涼，但或許能靠自己的選擇去尋獲意義，間或有真誠的交流，還有永不逝去、希望促成變化的人心。所有人都想改變世界，只是有些人並不希望它變得美好。

視覺效果精緻

高畫質畫素美術配合動態光照、瓢潑大雨、濃重的霧氣和霓虹燈光，美妙絕倫，讓這座龐大的城市有了生氣。

原聲音軌引人入勝，令人難忘

原聲音軌由Danshin與Arooj Aftab專業創作而成，為你奉上氛圍濃厚而又令人拍案叫絕的電影級別聲景。你一定從未聽過這樣的反烏托邦末世爵士音樂。

該遊戲可能不包含中文語言的本地化

EggNut
製作
Raw Fury
發行商
物種戰爭：滅絕 / BAD 2 BAD: EXTINCTION

注意

如您更換裝置或刪除遊戲，您的資料將被重置。在執行這些操作前，請先登入遊戲並儲存遊戲資料。

遊戲特色

  • 有趣的角色和故事
  • 生存、開放世界風格
  • 豐富多樣的角色裝飾和槍械改裝品
  • 20多個可挑選的角色
  • 60多種參照現實設計的武器和護甲
  • 隨機生成地圖和副任務
  • 組建並壯大你的部隊
  • 以AI和無人機展開未來式的戰鬥

《物種戰爭：滅絕》遊戲介紹

《物種戰爭：滅絕》是《物種戰爭: Delta》的續作。遊戲相較前作擁有更加豐富的故事和內容。前作中玩家打敗了戈拉·阿拉瑪領導的恐怖組織“殺戮”，並發現了組織背後的人類。《滅絕》將講述這之後的故事。遊戲中，你將扮演B2B德爾塔小隊的一員，並與人類組織無尾軍團作戰。

引入5大勢力

《物種戰爭：滅絕》一共包含5種新的敵對勢力，它們是：喪屍狂暴者(WD)、純種(PB)、敗犬(UD)、阿瑪宗(AZ)以及無尾軍團(TL)。每股勢力都擁有自己的特色和故事。

努力生存

在滿是狂暴者的任務地區搜尋主目標，並以武力推動戰役發展。同時，您也可以在隨機生成的地圖內遊玩，享受更高的自由度，完成副任務，收穫道具和獎勵。

自定義角色和槍械

您可以隨心所欲地改造槍械，裝飾您的角色。未來還會加入更多武器、裝備、服裝和角色。

組建屬於自己的特種部隊

本作中，你可以組織發展自己的部隊。每個敵人都有自己的攻擊模式和特點。在遇到困難時，可嘗試升級您的裝備，變更戰術。

武器技能與精通

為了有效使用主武器以外的武器，您必須學習各武器的技能。透過學習技能，提高精通程度，您將獲得各種增益效果，例如攻擊力上升，耐久度↓減少，加快裝填速度，提高爆頭準度等。

高密度集火 & 無人機攻擊

有效利用集火和無人機(DR-6L)攻擊來克服危機。空中無人機(DR-2A)雖無法攻擊，卻能帶來便利。

  • 開發者聯絡方式：dawinstone@gmail.com
  • DAWiNSTONE Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dawinstone

笨蛋部 / バカ部

故事發生在不算遠也不算近的未來。一場突然的變異使得一種名為獸人的新種族誕生了，當人們察覺到時，這個世界的人口構成已經發生了巨大的變化。

獸人佔據了世界的大半部分，人類轉而成了稀有種族。

由於種族是人類，主角在初中時期受盡霸凌。他為了改變自己選擇了一所滿是獸人的高中，並且以意外的契機決定加入名為「笨蛋部」的社團。

在為了讓大家得到快樂而笨蛋般胡鬧的社團活動中度過每一天，主角在思考些什麼呢？

中文語言本地化是由非官方提供的

廢墟戰旗 / Banners of Ruin

令人毛骨悚然的滅族者給黑足帶來了滅頂之災-你必須滲透他們的防禦並阻止這樣的暴行。

建立你的卡組，並與多達6名小隊成員使用卡牌進行戰鬥，穿越黎明之刻。 每位角色都擁有一系列獨特的卡牌和能力，以此建立你的最強卡組。 在通往城市警衛隊長的道路上擊敗每個精英對手，削弱滅族者的核心力量。 你和你的弟兄可能會為此而倒下，但總會有其他人傳遞薪火。 黑足氏族會銘記逝者，永不鬆懈。 穿越城市時你還將遇到一系列事件，這些事件可能會為你提供幫助，也有可能會造成麻煩。

特色

  • 透過掠奪、購買和解鎖大量卡牌來構建你的卡組。
  • 海狸和熊?還是狼和黃鼠狼?在你的前行的過程中建立一個多達6人的隊伍來與你的敵人戰鬥。
  • 6種獨特的種族卡池與被動技能等著你的探索與發掘。
  • 叮!升級你的角色以解鎖能極大地影響你的策略的天賦卡和強大的被動技能。
  • 戰利品!收集武器和盔甲，透過各種特效來增強你的隊伍。
  • 路在何方?透過生動多彩的卡片提示選擇你前行的道路。
  • 決斷。在你的旅途中，會遇到各種各樣的遭遇，這些遭遇給你帶來的也許是災難。
  • 隨著遊戲的深入，敵人會越來越具有挑戰性。
  • 大俠請重新來過?每次遊戲結束都將給與一定金幣用以解鎖新卡和被動技能，以幫助你取得勝利。

關於我們

我們認為廢墟戰旗是一個能真正帶來樂趣的遊戲。遊戲中還有很多方面需要擴充套件、平衡和完善——美術方面需要渲染(遊戲需要大量的渲染!)——但我們認為還有很多有深度的地方有待探索。作為Dominion（皇輿爭霸）這類卡牌遊戲的鐵桿粉絲，我們認為透過遊戲能給玩家提供更深入更獨特的卡牌組建，同時引入了新的機制，如站位，角色，裝備和種族!

遊戲具有重複可玩性，包含至少4-6小時的內容，一個有趣的循環遊戲機制和新內容解鎖系統，可以增加你的卡池深度。請諒解，我們希望能給大家帶來更多更獨特的遊戲內容，但我們的團隊也僅僅只有兩個核心成員以及一位天賦異稟的作曲家。

關於《廢墟戰旗》我們還有很多令人興奮的事情要做，我們知道它可能不會像你想的那樣快正式推出，但無論如何我們希望你選擇支援我們，最重要的是——對這款遊戲的愛!我們有很多想法，我們希望有一個充滿活力的社群加入到我們的探索中來。

如果你有問題，想要提供一些反饋，或者只是告訴我們你認為哪種動物最好，不要猶豫即刻聯絡我們:)

該遊戲仍在開發過程中

Bare Backstreets

BBS is a high-octane side scrolling brawler packed to the brim with adults-only content. Every enemy you encounter is out for you in more ways than one. Tackle 6 unique stages ranging from the corrupt underbelly of the city, to the tropical jungle and it's hidden ancient prophecy.

Only you and your friends have the staying power to undo this curse before it takes over the entire city!

A priceless amulet shatters after a scramble between treasure hunters, seemingly imbued by magic, wisps of essence dance into the sky, dispersing over the city skyline. The spirit of Venus, the god of fertility has reawakened, imbuing you and your friends with irresistible charm.

Vergence, a feisty green raptor who has recently been on a bad streak with women, deems the events a blessing. He is quick to realize however, that the effects of the charming spell has no restraints. Every creature in proximity has placed a target of ultimate desire on Verge and his allies, by any means necessary.

You can play as either a male or female anthro, equipped with their own play-styles and intimate animations to discover. Each level offers new challenges, enemies and struggles. Spawn locations and enemy variety are randomly generated, ensuring each play session feels unique.

The foes you encounter get bigger, more viscous and more varied the further you get. How long can you resist the enemies advances before the curse takes over you?

Several creatures have been supercharged with magical energy, taking new intimidating forms! No corner of the stage is safe. Tentacles may appear from above, wrapping up your character, others will try to lure you in with their dizzying toxins. Some will just use brute force, muscling you down to the ground and taking their prize, others will trick you into falling into their sneaky traps!

There are no restraints in terms of what you may see in the game, we encourage our fans to be creative with their suggestions and push the boundaries! The majority of kinks will be covered, with the ability to disable fetishes you do not fancy using a handy checkbox menu available on the main menu before you jump into the game.

Main Features

  • NSFW content for both male and female players
  • Wide variety of kinks explored for fans of both straight and gay content
  • New enemies each month ranging from monstrous brutes to tiny insects
  • Fun upgrades, combos and mobility options to keep you engaged
  • SFW mode for streaming!

Bedfellows FRENZY

Bedfellows FRENZY is a hard as hell, arcade style, smash and loot. Where you rage through various themed levels, demolish buildings, tear though the National Guard, and battle multiple bosses. Crushing and stomping your way up the leader boards, and to ULTIMATE VICTORY! Play as Monster Form Sheen or Fatigue as you unlock new power-ups and stack them to insane levels! Build unique style characters for each run with character bonuses, achievements, and multiple end game cut scenes. Based off the animated series, Bedfellows FRENZY sports an original soundtrack of chip tune goodness that sets the tone for each level and mini-game! FRENZY is a truly twisted, yet humorous homage to the city smashing arcade classics of the past.

Key Features

  • Single player story mode
  • Multiplayer Co-op
  • Hardcore mode
  • 10 in game cut scenes with multiple endings
  • 5 level bosses
  • 39 Unlockable power-ups and upgrades
  • 50+ Unlockable character bonuses
  • Weekly global and friend leaderboards
  • 5 Mini games
  • Extensive stat tracking and progress graphing
  • 12 tracks of original music
  • Fully voiced dialog
  • Dragon ♥️♥️♥️♥️

Bedplay

HOW TO PLAY:

Use the mouse to interact with the character on screen. You can change between your hands, mouth, and dick using the menu in the top right.

While interacting, you can hold SPACE to record your actions. When you let go, the game will continue doing whatever you were doing, on a loop.

Several sex toys can be accessed from the Toybox menu in the top left. Drag them onto the character grid to decide where to put them (or drop them into the tool slot at the bottom if it is a toy that is used as a tool).

You can customize your penis from the Toybox menu.

GET YOUR CHARACTER IN THE GAME:

The downloadable version of the game includes character template files, which you can use to make and distribute your own characters!

You can submit your custom Bedplay characters here: http://goo.gl/forms/k8Be6s6G1X

You can see submitted Bedplay characters here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ILrU0hGzyTwxx8cs9bt9frzhoRfTuj2LpNXyVpM-WxI/edit#gid=429251394

Beek - 使魔與毛茸茸

一封奇怪的簡訊打破了你的寧靜。看起來有人迷失在了一個未知的森林裡，而你是他唯一能夠取得聯絡的人。

由打造《家有大貓》的 Studio Klondike 為您呈現，《Beek: 在異世界被當成使魔以及與那些毛茸茸之間發生的事》是一款精巧的文字類遊戲，擁有多結局和精美插畫。

主人公 Beek 的命運正等待你的抉擇。來幫助他重拾直面黑暗的力量與勇氣，帶領他找到回家的路。

便機戰爭 / 便機戦爭

未知的新能源—“ＵＮＫＯ”能創造萬物的物質，帶來了昔日的繁榮與輝煌——它便是再度點亮世界的烈焰。

無限積蓄式便器型戰鬥機“ＢｅＮＫ—Ｉ型”，成為了當中前無古人的佼佼者。

新的戰爭開始了……人們是這麼稱呼它的——便機戰爭。

BEYOND THE HARBOR

BEYOND THE HARBOR is a nonlinear furry visual novel set in the seaside town of Harborton, Virginia. It follows Ollie, a young man who spends a bit too much time in his own head.

It's the final weekend of summer, and following a recent tragedy, old faces are returning to the town they all once called home. How will Ollie cope with these sudden changes as life itself comes closing in?

This game contains Graphic/Explicit content, viewer discretion is advised. Please do not play this game if you are under the age of 18.

If you're interested in game updates, feel free to follow me on Twitter at https://twitter.com/Harmoyena (Be warned that my Twitter page may also contain Explicit content.)

生化變種 / BIOMUTANT

《BIOMUTANT®》是一款功夫奇幻RPG遊戲，背景設定為末日後的開放世界。遊戲中極具武術風格的獨特戰鬥系統，可讓玩家混合近戰、射擊和突變能力。

一場瘟疫正在毀滅這片土地，生命之樹也在承受著自根部而起的死亡威脅，各個部落卻分裂割據。快來探索這個動盪不安的世界，決定萬物的命運——您會成為世界的救世主，還是會帶領世界走向更加黑暗的命運？

遊戲內容及特色

不一樣的第三人稱戰鬥

武術風格戰鬥系統將最大程度的解放你在行動與靈巧上的限制，讓你在使用射擊，近戰，突變能力時依然自由靈動。玩家在遊戲程序中不斷地從師傅那裡學習新的功夫招式，豐富自己的作戰本領，戰鬥永遠不會無聊。

“進化”出自己的遊戲玩法

你可以編譯自己的基因架構來改變自己的樣貌和玩法。當然這也會影響你自己的屬性值，不僅如此，暴露在生化汙染之下將會導致基因突變，演化出新的能力，比如龜甲形，粘液泡等能力；當暴露在舊世界能源的輻射之下，它將影響你的頭腦與心智並解鎖超能力突變，比如念動力，浮空以及更多樣化的能力。

製造物品的新高度

你可以自由的打造各種武器。混合搭配部件來製造屬於你自己的單手、雙手、斬擊、粉碎等近戰武器，又或者左輪、步槍、霰彈槍等遠端武器以及各種各樣的改造裝置，像是木塞鑽，電池驅動的電鋸與生化汙染瓶，盡情的將這些加入自己的軍械庫吧。你甚至能碰到一些角色願意為你打造一些特別酷的小玩意，像是生化翼，跳躍揹包，甚至改造你自己的自動機——廢品玩具伴侶！

穿上裝備冒險吧

你可以自由的裝備自己的角色。不僅限於自己打造的武器，包括你所穿裝備的種類。穿上防毒面具和氧氣瓶探索死亡禁區，穿上隔溫服在低溫區冒險或者穿上防禦裝備與生化汙染怪物作戰，這一切都可以自由選擇。

在充滿活力的開放世界中生存

你可以自由的探索這個世界，透過步行，機甲，水上摩托車，氣球或者地域獨特的坐騎來尋找世界的祕密。探索凋零的荒野，遊蕩於地下世界的管道與地堡，攀登世界之巔或是遨遊於海島之間。在這充滿活力的繽紛世界裡有著層層祕密值得去發現，神祕的未知值得去探索，神奇的怪物需要去面對，還有許多奇葩的角色等你邂逅。

不一般的故事不尋常的結局。

在這末日來臨之際，你的行動將對故事的展開起著重大作用。一場瘟疫正在席捲大地，生命之樹也在枯萎凋零，部族之間分崩離析，需要一位強者將他們統一亦或是將他們毀滅……

敘事者將會講述你旅途的每一步並引導你探索整個世界。但只有你自己的行動才能決定你故事的結局。

在 Steam 上獲取 Playstation 在 Microsoft Store 上獲取

Blackgate

Blackgate is a mature visual novel of a mostly M/M nature. While there will be a limited number of scenes of a M/F nature, the game is intended to be mostly M/M. The game also contains elements of horror, violence, and some gore (separate from the sexual scenes). Prepare to hate everyone, and everything.

Who works on the game and where can I find them?

  • Darkgem – Major Scene Artist
  • Lil' Shark - Merchandise Artist
  • Sean - AnthroAquatic/Goal Publications – Editor/Merchandise Seller
  • Bane – Writer/Music Producer/Owner
  • Mr. E, who makes the current sprites and background art, wishes to remain anonymous.

Blacksad: Under the Skin

A dark corruption scandal in the heart of the New York City's underworld for charismatic detective John Blacksad!

The 50s, New York City: Joe Dunn, owner of a boxing club, is found dead.

Meanwhile, rising star Bobby Yale, due to take to the ring for the most important fight of his career, has mysteriously disappeared.

Sonia Dunn, Joe’s daughter, takes over the gym and must deal with its financial woes. She hires private detective John Blacksad to investigate Yale’s disappearance. This sinister case will take our investigator to the darkest, most dismal depths of New York.

With its anthropomorphic characters and its incredible 1950s feel, BLACKSAD: Under the Skin promises all the eerily dark adventure of a detective novel, just like the eponymous comic book series.

Conduct the investigation in your own way. Make use of your feline senses as you hunt for new clues. Make decisions on behalf of Blacksad and influence the outcome of the case.

Features:

  • An official and all-new story for BLACKSAD, set in the comic book series’ unique world, perfectly recreated for gamers.
  • An investigative narrative game with gameplay combining investigations, puzzles, quick time events (QTE) and multiple-choice dialog.
  • Choices that directly influence the development of the character and the story's ending.
  • More than 30 characters, including new faces and old favorites, each with their own story.
  • An immersive world with a jazz soundtrack to rival the very best of Hollywood’s film noir.
  • Fans of adventure games will love its gameplay and narration while fans of the comic book series will be thrilled to rediscover the characters and graphic style of this unique world.
  • A dark world of anthropomorphic animals

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION

Blacksad: Under the Skin contains scene of intense violence, depiction of blood and such. Please be advised that Blacksad: Under the Skin may not be suitable for all audience.

Boy x Boy Love - University

Already guy's back to College Life

Story

This story about the life of a college student named Aogami Haruto, born in the rural and have to try to adapt urban environments because he had to continue his education at prestigious universities, but many choices he made, if he could choose the right option ?.

Be Friend or Boyfriend

Build friendships with a lot of character because it would be very useful, and build a relationship with one of the characters to be your boyfriend to reach the ending.

1000+ Option You Can Choose

More than a thousand options that you choose, but be careful because every option in select will determine your friendship, your relationship, and your ending that will happen in the game.

Fix a friend problem

Each of your friends have their own problems, get to know them, according to their problems and fix their problems, because with them you will fix the problem up to obtain a better ending.

Get a You Own Ending

There are more than five categories of endings, ranging from worst to best in the set of your options which you choose, however many conditions that can drag you into a bad ending, so be careful in determining your choice, you do not want it to make Haruto suffer?.

And More Features

Modernistic Graphical User InterfaceChatting NVL SystemExplore the TokyoJapanese Kemono ArtstyleHigh Quality ArtworkCharacter with Voice Actor Achievement to be attained Collecting images to Gallery Listen to a music in Music RoomWatch all CutscenePlayback you favorite moments

Contact

  • Patreon https://patreon.com/bxbloveproject
  • Facebook https://facebook.com/bxbloveproject
  • Twitter https://twitter.com/bxbloveproject

Patreon Get on Gamejolt 在 itch.io 上獲取 官方 Twitter
BROK the InvestiGator

這是一個劇情向的冒險遊戲，完美地混合了動作格鬥和案件推理元素。你是會選擇透過智力去破案……亦或是暴力呢？

在這個“賽博龐克”背景的未來世界中，動物取代了人類延續了文明的發展。社會頂層的公民都居住在安全的圓頂市區中，而其他的底層人士則居住在環境汙染嚴重的郊區。

布羅格是一名私家偵探和兼職拳擊手，他跟其亡妻的獨子格拉夫相依為命。雖然布羅格對妻子所遭遇的意外事故已經記憶模糊，但是最近發生的一系列事件逐漸讓慘劇的真相付出了水面……甚至影響到了兩父子的人生。

他們究竟能否從這個頹廢的社會中逆流而上挑戰自己的命運呢？

特點

  • 富含深意和情感的劇情故事，角色人設致敬80年代與90年代的漫畫角色。
  • 此遊戲首開先河混合了經典的“冒險遊戲”元素和“砍殺遊戲”的RPG元素！
  • 完美支援簡體中文文字！
  • 可以透過智力……或者暴力去解謎！
  • 你的每個選擇都會影響劇情走向！
  • 提供簡單模式：適合只注重劇情的玩家（可省略戰鬥）！
  • 升級角色以對抗更強大的敵人和BOSS！
  • 合成所蒐集到的各個線索以揭開真相！
  • 遊戲內提供各種提示
  • 支援所有操作模式（滑鼠、鍵盤、或遊戲手柄）
  • 兩個可遊玩角色，可以在遊戲中隨時切換
  • 15至20小時的遊戲時長
  • 可以遊玩多個周目以解鎖多個不同的結局
  • 全劇本配音（23000行文字）
該遊戲仍在開發過程中

喵咪鬥惡龍 / Cat Quest

喵咪鬥惡龍游戲是一款背景設定在奇喵貓世界的開放性 RPG遊戲！

您將踏上一次大冒險旅程，找尋邪惡的德拉柯斯和被綁架的妹妹！

您可在貓之國度的開放地圖中探索，在極凶險的地下城裡尋找高檔戰利品，伸出貓手一幫毛茸茸的傢伙們完成一系列支線任務。

即時戰鬥

喵咪鬥惡龍游戲採用完全即時的戰鬥系統，您可以靠近敵人後猛砍，
利用翻滾來躲避敵人回擊，最後用強大的魔法消滅他們！ 使用嗚嗚閃電、咕嚕之炎和治癒肉墊等古老魔法來消滅您的敵人！ （千真萬確！）

自定義裝備

為您的冒險貓配備一整籃裝備吧！
您更喜歡施魔法嗎？
戴上神祕之帽，穿上神祕之袍，帶上神祕之杖後，您的法力值將大大增加！
想要保護自己不受到攻擊嗎？
為您的冒險貓穿上鍊甲以增加生命值，增強防禦。
混合搭配使用武器、盔甲和魔咒， 創造出您最完美的遊戲模式！

探索世界

貓之國度裡有很多有趣的人，好玩的地方！ 探索一座被施了法的城鎮，
裡面的居民貪食著巨量的肉，協助法師喵林和喵洛根找尋破除魔法封印的方法，並幫人尋找 “貓貓紙牌屋” 和 “行屍走肉貓” 這兩個失蹤的物品。 探險是貓咪鬥惡龍游戲中的主要任務之一, 貓咪們將要去探索百喵大三角、貓之禁地和貓灣城等地, 快開始吧！

遊戲原聲

聆聽靈感來自經典 RPG 手遊音樂的動聽管絃樂。 由 zminusone

在 Steam 上獲取 在 gog.com 上獲取 在 Google Play 上獲取 在 Apple appstore 上獲取 在 Nintendo E-Shop 上獲取 Playstation 官方網站

喵咪鬥惡龍2 / Cat Quest II

《CAT QUEST II》是一個 2D 開放世界動作角色扮演遊戲，故事背景是一個貓和狗所居住的幻想國度。

生活在菲靈格的貓與來自盧普斯帝國的狗之間爆發了戰爭，在戰事持續的威脅下，《CAT QUEST II》講述了兩個國王的故事，他們被迫攜手合作並展開奇幻的發現之旅，目的是要奪回王位。

你可以獨自一人或與朋友一起扮演貓與狗的角色，探索他們的王國！ 探索一個充滿魔魔法、奇異怪物的世界，並以前所未有的方式展開一次冒險！

隨著廣受好評的《CAT QUEST》的成功，開發商 Gentlebros 回到了菲靈格的世界，擴充套件了原始版本，提供了更多有趣的法術、更多的武器選擇、令人興奮的新角色切換機制以及本地合作！

特色- 菲靈格世界中的全新故事，還有更多！

  • 全新的合作和切換遊戲玩法。你可以同時扮演貓和狗，也可以和朋友一起玩分別扮演貓和狗！
  • 新的武器型別（大師之劍和魔杖等），成為一名強大的戰士！
  • 更多法術會給你的敵人帶來更多毛茸茸的審判。
  • 新的被動技能，其屬性可以混合和組合，以實現無盡的可能性！
  • 令人興奮的各色各樣的地下城充滿了新的陷阱和障礙，使每一次探險都有新鮮體驗！
  • 參與各種支線任務，而每個支線任務都有一個完整的故事，豐富了《CAT QUEST》的傳說和國度！

立即開始終極的冒險之旅吧！

Changed

遊戲梗概：

Changed是一款頗有難度、擁有大量追逐戰與初見殺的動作解謎遊戲。
你在一個陌生的房間中甦醒，發覺自己被綁架到了一個神祕的研究所。
冒險中，你會遇到形形色色的未知生物，每一種都可以輕易“掠奪”你的軀體。
那些由粘液組成的生物不會傷害你，但它們會同化你、改變你的思想，使你成為它們的一員。
為了生存，你只能進行不斷的探索，試圖走出這個危機四伏的建築。
在這個草木皆兵的新世界裡，任何大意都可能會讓你結束你的冒險。
外面的世界究竟發生了什麼？暗自引導著你前進的究竟是誰？一切究竟是怎麼回事？
種種謎團錯綜複雜，真相將在一步步互動與探索中慢慢浮出水面。
當然，要小心，不要迷失在這個建築裡…

特點介紹：

  • 主角僅有簡單的移動與奔跑的能力，他是所有生物的抓捕目標，希望你跑的夠快。
  • 沒有道具，沒有技能，你所遇到的一切難題都要用智慧與行動力來解決。
  • RPGMAKER日式解密與I WANNA類遊戲的融合，準備好面對初見殺。
  • 數十首精心原創的8-bit風格音樂，讓你在艱苦的探索中不再孤單。
  • 遊戲頗有難度，適合擅長細心觀察、敢於嘗試的玩家，不要放過任何一絲線索。
  • 在一次次失敗中瞭解生物的特性來逃離它們，或加入它們，在這裡，失敗並不是那麼可怕。
  • 互動陷阱、文字彩蛋、CG劇情、和一位“可愛”的傢伙交朋友，大量的可探索內容。
  • 精彩的劇情與多線結局，根據互動和調查情況可觸發不同的結局。
  • 大約六小時的可遊戲長度（如果可能的話）。
這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。
在 Steam 上獲取 Patreon 官方微博 作者微博（獸屋之龍） Author's weibo (噬子有一层糯米外皮)

夏多內羅曼史 / シャルドネロマンシア

成人向、雄獸ADV遊戲「夏多內羅曼史」的體驗版。
可以選擇的呈現語言有日本語、英語或中文（繁體）。

  • 為成人向作品。未滿18歲請勿遊玩。
  • 開發環境為Windows10．64bit，其他作業系統環境下未必能完整運作。
  • 內容均在開發中，即使沒有預告也可能會有所變更。

目前可以玩到「夏多內羅曼史」第一章。
第一章沒有特別破哏的問題，各位如果可以撥空發表一下感想，我會很感激的！

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。
該遊戲仍在開發過程中

公雞神探 / Chicken Police

《公雞神探：鮮血染紅！》擁有複雜的審訊系統和偵探解謎玩法，是一款情節跌宕的冒險遊戲。

主要特色：

  • 驚險、豐富的故事情節，經典的黑色電影風格
  • 專業配音，長達十幾個小時的對話內容！
  • 精心打造的“多彩”世界
  • 複雜的審訊系統
  • 30多個獨特角色，都有各自的配音
  • 20多個過場動畫，震撼的黑色電影體驗！
  • 探尋大量線索、情報和可收藏的物品
  • 精美的原聲音樂

STORY

  • 一位神祕的女子……
  • 一個離奇的案件……
  • 再加上荒野世界最桀驁的警探！

來認識一下公雞神探吧

桑尼·費瑟蘭和馬蒂·麥肯基曾經是搭檔，他們造就了警探二人組“公雞神探”的傳奇。不過，時過境遷，他倆也快被時間給遺忘了。如今，桑尼被警隊勒令休了帶薪長假，整日依靠酒精來打發時間；而馬蒂則仍捨不得放下昔日明星探員的風光。他們最近一次搭檔辦案出了岔子，差點丟了性命，從此他們一拍兩散，再沒說過一句話……

現在因為一個離奇的案件，桑尼和馬蒂不得不再度聯手，而這個案子也是有史以來最讓他們摸不著頭腦的光怪陸離！

FEATURES

跌宕的劇情走向，燒腦的解迷玩法

《公雞神探》結合了視覺小說和經典冒險遊戲的主要元素，造就了一款情節紮實、對話豐富的誠意之作。遊戲中有30多個可以與之交談的角色，你必須仔仔細細地審問其中一些角色。

收集大量的線索和證據，並找出利爪市各個陰暗角色極為敏感的個人資訊，好加以利用來對付他們！

探索利爪市全城（一遍又一遍……）

可以造訪30多個場景，其中一些場景會隨著故事的發展而多次改頭換面。玩家可以多次返回之前的地點，以查詢其中隱藏的祕密、結識新角色並收集有關這個世界及其居民的資訊。

震撼的視覺體驗

《公雞神探》使用真實的照片和逼真的3D背景效果來構建遊戲，形成了一種玄妙而驚人的視覺風格，其靈感來自經典的黑色電影（如：《夜長夢多》(The Big Sleep)、《雙重賠償》(Double Indemnity)、《吉爾達》(Gilda)）和遊戲（如：《冥界狂想曲》(Grim Fandango)、《宇宙騎警》(Policenauts)、《掠奪者》(Snatcher)、《黑色洛城》(L.A.Noire)、《鳥籠事務所》(Aviary Attorney)、《神探墨菲系列》(Tex Murphy series)）。另外，本遊戲還深受幾部經典動畫（如：《紅豬》(Porco Rosso)、《了不起的狐狸爸爸》(Fantastic Mr. Fox)、《馬男波傑克》(BoJack Horseman)）的啟發。

原聲樂章為黑色的氛圍畫龍點睛，我們還請來了專業的配音工作室來為這款遊戲配音。該團隊也是《我們身邊的狼》(The Wolf Among Us)、《地平線：零之曙光》(Horizon Zero Dawn)和《戰錘：末世鼠疫2》(Warhammer: End Times - Vermintide 2)等諸多大作的配音團隊。本遊戲十幾個小時對話內容的配音工作已100％完成！

不眠不休的利爪市

“聽說，這是一座不眠之城。

也許這就是它為何總是如此古怪的原因了。”

利爪市成立的初衷，是為了打造一片掠食者和被掠食者能夠和平共榮的淨土。這是一個美好的夢想。然而，利爪市卻慢慢變成了荒野世界中最為陰暗的角落。

《公雞神探》是一部諷刺作品，它讓人回想起40年代黑色電影的情節和氛圍。而最好的黑色電影和最令人深思的偵探故事，都是在粗糲又絕望的爐火中烹製而成的，只有佐以大量憤世嫉俗的幽默感，才能激發出它最絕妙的風味。

媒體評價

FORBES: “從預告片可以看出，它黑暗的故事情節應該會很有趣。在這個遊戲型別裡，它有充分的潛質成為最獨特的作品之一。不必多說，這樣的遊戲在2020年裡唯此一款，希望它不只是與眾不同，更是出類拔萃。”

DESCTRUCTOID: “我知道我經常報道關於動物的遊戲，但是很少有能讓我十分期待的作品。聽完預告片裡的那首曲子你就懂了。各位，這可是原創音樂啊！擁有古怪主題和原創音樂的遊戲，讓我毫無招架之力。“人形動物”的新奇主題加上現場探案的視覺效果……沒錯，我徹底淪陷了。”

ROCK PAPER SHOTGUN: “非常幸運，我這雙還沒倒過時差來的眼睛發現了《公雞神探》，一場黑色電影風的偵探冒險即將上演，裡面有幾隻灰白的公雞和一隻非常善良的浣熊。這遊戲操作多半就是點啊點，換句話說：我大概率是不會去玩的。不過我還是希望你們能和我一起欣賞完這條預告片。絕對的影視大作。”

Cor

{Cor is a Visual Novel that will have some adult content, even if it's optional. It also deals with some personal themes that might affect some people. You must be 18 or older to play it}

Robert... Remember Cor? Our hometown? ... Yeah. Would you like to go on a vacation there? ... Yeah, the others said that they're coming too... This might be exactly what we need right now. What do you say?

Cor is a furry gay VN where you play as Robert, a 22-year-old ferret, who's going to spend two weeks at his hometown, Cor. With his group of friends, he'll re-discover how the town has changed without him, learn new things about his friends and, who knows... Maybe he'll remember how to move forward. After all, life is not easy sometimes.

Cor offers an easy-going, but in-depth character-driven story, where the objective is just to have fun with your friends and help Robert understand himself better. Some choices will matter more than others, but try to relax. You have control over them.

Things you can expect from this experience are: characters with their own motivations and pasts that influences them as people, different branches and scenes depending on your choices, a small town to explore with friends and, overall, a positive story about self-discovery, learning what you want in life, and how to share that with your loved ones.

...You know what? Let's do this. Let's go to Cor, together.

Fair warning that we're a small team, and we're doing this because we like this project. Because of this, it'll be updated once every two months until further notice!

If you want to help us by donating to us, click here!

Follows us on Twitter for updates, sketches and art of Cor here!

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Cryptid Crush

Cryptid Crush is a TTRPG inspired Monster Visual Novel with eldritch elements!

As a newcomer to the seaside town of Longhope, you find yourself surrounded by monsters of urban myth. Haunted by the cat specter Taro, your journey begins alongside the wingless Jersey Devil Jamie and the pint-sized Mothman Atlas.

Cryptid Crush will feature at least FOUR monster singles, this demo highlights the dynamics between two of them.

Check out our twitter!

Major thanks to our playtesters, friends and folk heroes like you!

Note: The accessibility menu can be toggled by pressing the A key.

Self-voicing mode can be toggled by pressing the V key.

Dawn Chorus

Dawn Chorus is a wholesome and light-hearted non-linear romance furry visual novel set in Norway.

Moving to another country for studies is a huge step, but it is also a chance for a new beginning. No matter how hard you try, you can never really leave your past behind, though. It's been two months since the beginning of the academic year and you are about to take part in a science camp in a remote guesthouse above the arctic circle, and an old friend from your hometown is going too. Will you embrace your past or try to move forward? Will you manage to befriend your fellow camp-goers? And will one of your friendships blossom into something more?

The game is currently in development, with updates released monthly, with each update first being available to the patrons on Patreon and released publicly here two weeks later.

If you would like to support the development of Dawn Chorus and gain access to the new updates on release, together with other benefits like sneak peeks or concept arts, check out our Patreon here.

The team for Dawn Chorus is
Keo (script/writing/soundtrack),
hq (visual artist/character design),
Roborak (backgrounds) and
Tintiai (CGs).

Follow us on our Twitter: https://twitter.com/DawnChorusVN
Visit our visual artist's page: https://twitter.com/hq_png

偽裝 / Disguise
《Disguise》(偽裝) 是一款現代背景的成人同性向獸人視覺小說。
故事觀點落在一名生活光鮮亮麗的中年黑豹身上，了解他在成功人士的表面下、無人知曉的另一種生活。

當繁忙的工作隨著日落而放低，真正纏繞心頭的困惑才剛開始在孤寂的黑夜中綻放。
也許，所有人都生活在一種偽裝之下。這遊戲帶著你了解的那個男人，哪一面才是他的偽裝呢？

製作人員名單
製作人: Rougetsu 狼月
編劇: Rougetsu 狼月
程式: Rougetsu 狼月
編程劇問: Denny Cheng 月月冬瓜
角色設計/CG繪製: Miharushoka 三春紹華
場景美術: Pin59 阿品
翻譯: Ray Crescent 鳴雷起

DragonBlast

What is DragonBlast?

DragonBlast is an unfinished doujin fighting game for the PC that is designed to be simple, with great rewards for hard reads.

Counterhits steal the opponent's meter as well as life, and are accompanied by very visible effects and slowdown whenever they occur. Matches are often very quick, and damage overall is high.

The standard battle mode is a 2v2 tag battle, where if one character gets KO'd, you lose the match.

Playing Online

The game has a full "endless mode" style lobby system like SF4, but only for 4 people.

You can also use the IP_Connect option to host and connect to a room.

The default port it uses for hosting is 7500.

(From: http://www.sf4remix.com/dragonblast/index.php)

塵埃：幸福的尾巴 / Dust: An Elysian Tail

Immerse yourself in a gorgeous hand-painted world on a search for your true identity. As the mysterious warrior, Dust, your action-packed journey will take you from peaceful glades to snowy mountaintops and beyond. At your disposal is the mythical Blade of Ahrah, capable of turning its wielder into an unstoppable force of nature, and the blade's diminutive guardian, Fidget. Battle dozens of enemies at once with an easy-to-learn, difficult-to-master combat system, take on a variety of quests from friendly villagers, discover ancient secrets and powerful upgrades hidden throughout the massive, open world, and uncover the story of an ancient civilization on the brink of extinction as you fight to uncover your own past.

Key Features

  • A traditionally-animated action-adventure tale, now in gorgeous 1080p
  • An expansive world filled with unique characters, quests, and secrets
  • Action-packed nonlinear platforming rewards exploration and experimentation
  • Fully voiced cast and a deep, rewarding storyline
  • Full support for gamepad, mouse+keyboard, or keyboard-only controls
  • A wide range of performance options to cater to every PC
  • Award-winning musical score by Hyperduck Soundworks

回聲 / Echo

《回聲》包含成人主題，包括暴力，血腥，吸毒和苛刻語言，您必須年滿 18 歲才能遊玩。《回聲》可能會導致強烈刺激，可能並不適合所有人。在下載之前，請認真確認並考慮到您的心理健康！

《回聲》是一部恐怖視覺小說，講述的是一個西南偏僻荒涼的小鎮中發生的故事。

春假期間，在 Echo 鎮長大的年輕水獺 Chase 回到家鄉完成學校專案，想要記錄一場 1870 年代的事件，該事件可能是導致該鎮當前狀況的原因。他與五個在 Echo 鎮中與他一起長大的朋友參與到調查中，並藉此機會重聚。不幸的是，Chase 開始意識到他們對 Echo 的回憶可能有些過於樂觀了。回到城鎮，勾起了很多痛苦的舊回憶。發現的祕密使這個在平靜的表面下已經暗流湧動的隊伍開始出現了裂痕。最重要的是，Chase 開始意識到 Echo 鎮恐怕也暗藏著自己的祕密。他總是將怪異且無法解釋的記憶歸咎於過度活躍的童年想象力，而這些記憶很有可能根本就不是他想象出來的。

最終，某件事的發生把恐懼轉變成為了真實的危險。Chase 現在被迫做出抉擇，是要幫助朋友面對還是逃離他們的夢魘。無論如何，Echo 鎮都不會輕易地放他們離開。

如果您喜歡此遊戲，並希望在 Patreon 上支援我們，可以前往此處！

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

回聲：65 號線 / Echo: Route 65

《回聲：65 號線》是一部講述以西南鄉鎮少年 Chase 為中心故事的視覺小說。Chase 以非常尷尬的形式被父母發現是同性戀。從放學回家的公交車上下車後，他為了逃避自己“出櫃”的事實，沿著一條稱為 65 號線的公路進行了一場夜間冒險。

Elysium Above 履云录

關於《履雲錄》

《履雲錄》是一款使用Unity3D引擎開發的原創的戰棋遊戲。

遊戲特色

  • 《履雲錄》中，玩家將扮演東海邊小國——“帛”的初階指揮官，于山雨欲來、烏雲壓城之時透過巧妙地排兵佈陣和高超的指揮來幫助剛剛復國的帛國抵擋環伺的強敵的侵攻，一步一步探求各方勢力的所求並最終做出抉擇將故事引向不同的方向。
  • 遊戲採用半即時的“時刻”制。在行動點數耗盡前，角色可以任意移動和使用技能；但消耗的行動點數越多，下一次行動的到來就會變得越慢。仔細注意行動次序條，集中力量殲滅敵人吧。
  • 透過不同的主動技能和被動技能的搭配，同一位隊友可以以完全不同的定位出場。
  • 透過完美破關、章間休息的活動、完成支線以及各種決斷招募新的隊友並提升與隊友的默契度以獲得各種好處。
  • 在帛國境內四處活動、收集數十種寶物來強化己方角色。重要物品可能會影響結局走向喲。

關於萬衍世界

在萬衍大陸，一個傳國數千年的分封制國家“萬衍國”在享用了長久的和平後還是不可避免地走到了分崩離析的邊緣。宗主國——萬衍威權從八百年前就逐漸衰落，各個分封國之間互相征伐，戰火吞滅了不計其數的國家和生命。

傳統軍事強國——戮，百年間不斷兼併周圍國家，現在已是萬衍境內首屈一指的強大勢力。新近成立的七國聯盟則在盟主洪國的領導下與戮國對立，並極盡所能拉攏更多的國家加入聯盟。兩大勢力的夾縫中則是遊戲的主要舞臺——帛國。

帛國於十一年前被戮國突襲攻滅，國王奎於王宮——宛央宮中舉火殉國，大王子荒朱攜三王子出奔南方的洪國。此後舊帛國領便為戮國佔據。十一年後，為光復國家，大王子荒朱趁佔領軍鬆懈不備領大軍殺回舊帛國領地，戰爭和死亡的陰影再次籠罩在東海之濱。多方勢力也各懷鬼胎不約而至，這一場復國戰爭也許只是一系列混亂的開始……

Sweet Potato Studio
製作
Ainro
製作
Endless Bounty

Follow an orc mercenary as he tracks down his next target. Drok'tar is no newbie to his work, but the bounty he's looking for can be elusive. He'll have to gather information from the townsfolk and hunt for clues in the surrounding area if he wants to rake in the gold from a job well done. Though, he might find more than just his bounty on his quest...

Endless Bounty is a point and click adventure where you lead Drok'tar through the town of Gabranth and its surrounding areas while looking for his bounty. You'll meet a slew of characters along with way, and if you play your cards right, you'll find yourself in more... erotic situations with some of them.

There are multiple endings to be found! Can you find them all?

Sexual content advisory. This game does contain content of an adult nature, including depictions of man sex. Not intended for audiences under the age of 18.

© WolfBite Interactive LLC 2019-Current Year. All Rights Reserved.

Writer/Programmer - DyneWulf - Patreon / Twitter / FurAffinity

Lead/Concept Aritst - Gavel - Twitter / FurAffinity

Sound Design - Civ Valian - SoundCloud / Twitter / FurAffinity

Thank you to Reggie, Rhum, CV, Nanabi, Toby and especially Grawl for your testing, help and input! Special thanks to all my Patrons, cause without all of you, I couldn't do stuff like this!

逃 / Escape

1998年春節前夕，形單影隻的邵立冬終於鼓起勇氣向自己一直喜歡的物件夏至告白。隨後，兩人一起逃離了原本的生活，去創造屬於自己的世界。但是新的生活並不像他想象的那樣美好……

官方微博 官方 Twitter
彼時的約定

“時間，不停止流逝。
青春，是一片森林。
我們，尋找也等待。
只為，遇到那個人。”

大三的學期末，接著暑假來臨。
主人公一武同學，遇到了很多人。
命運的齒輪在我們看不見的角落轉動著。
三年前無疾而終的思緒......又再一次鼓動。
隨著時間的流逝，不著痕跡地在心中留下傷痕。

人生很漫長，青春卻短暫；我想，這是我青蔥歲月的尾聲。

Extracurricular Activities

Extracurricular Activities is a visual novel following the main character (you!) through his endeavor of trying to romance a member of his tennis team. The choices you make can impact the way you teammates react to you, so make your choices carefully.

Currently, there are five dateable characters, and I hope to add more down the line.

If you like what you see, consider becoming a Patron to help support the project! You can do that HERE!

The writing and programming are all done by myself. The background art is done by Gavel!

We have a new Artist on board to take over the character art, and that would be CaptainGerBear. You can check him out on Twitter, FurAffinity, or his website. He's made the popular games Bastard Bonds and See No Evil!

CursedMarked and I have split for personal reasons and cannot pursue a professional relationship any longer. We came to the agreement that it's best that we no longer work together. This is not something that is up for discussion.

Please, don't ask when I'm updating the guides either. The guides are low priority for me, and the time spent updating them is better spent towards adding new content.

Merchandise

IMPORTANT!

Please, read my FAQ before asking questions about the visual novel also. It can be found here.

It is still a work in progress.

獵鷹城 / Falcon City

你就是法律！

獵鷹城正在醞釀著一場動亂。而你是追蹤這件事的一名超級偵探——庫爾特塔克。你可能是一隻對未來心灰意冷的兔子，尖酸機智，老闆的眼中釘，但你對自己的工作相當遊刃有餘。

由於沒有可靠的目擊者和證據，找到一個被綁架的受害者並不容易。你能破解此案嗎?

穿上你的偵探靴！

探察這片城市叢林，你會遇到一群有趣的人 – 有的會給你幫助，有的充滿危險，還有的則行為怪異。為了推動案子，你要找到線索和解決謎團，然後與警局裡的同事討論來獲得新思路。你做出的決定會影響故事的走向，要是表現得好，你甚至還能從中邂逅愛情。

一場獨一無二，充滿心計、戲劇和幽默的黑色冒險在等著你。是時候潛入並解開謎團了，偵探！獵鷹城需要你的幫助!

遊戲特色

  • 點選式操作讓此類冒險遊戲變得出色！
  • 迷人的藝術風格，手繪的角色、環境和動畫!
  • 完整的角色配音和原創音樂!
  • 根據你的決定和表現，故事會有不同的結尾!

Familiar Travels

Double feature

Familiar Travels was always intended to be played as a single, cohesive experience. Enjoy Volume One and Volume Two together as the second Volume adds a depth of experience to the first volume, the compliments of the two together, and the events that unfold as a result!

If you've already purchased Volume One of Familiar Travels you can enjoy a reduced price of the bundle here, equal to the amount you paid for the first volume!

Volume One

You were in a situation that many post-graduates found themselves in, degree on wall, parent's house, everywhere seem to think your degree is just as useless as you do. The uniquely disparaging Quarter Life Crisis has came to you in full force, and you have been left with nothing to do..

And when university has set us up for unreal expectations of the future, there's only one thing left to do..

Grad School.

Through insane luck or divine magic, you've received your acceptance letter to Vanaheim

Home of the Vanaheim Institute of Magic and Technology

There's only one problem, you're distinctly lacking in the magic department. In fact, this is the first time you've become aware of magic's existence.

Volume Two

Things have been strange over the past few weeks, and now that you’ve started to settle in it’s dawning on you exactly how much you fit in with people here, for better or for worse. The people in Vanaheim aren’t all that different than the people back home, there are bad people who make bad decisions with.. Bad consequences.

On top of that it’s felt as if your mental health has been slipping.. It’s been harder to connect to the people around you on a meaningful level.. I guess fitting in shouldn’t have been your only priority when it comes to these issues…

About The Game

This game was created as a love letter to internet fandom, and quickly expanded to become a deconstruction of relationships, a game about forging genuine connections, and the struggles of finding your identity in a community that you don't entirely fit into. If you're looking for a way to kill some time, or an experience that will connect with you on a deep emotional level, check out Familiar Travels. This is a game for anybody who is part of an internet community, or anybody who wants to explore the more nuanced and complicated aspects of relationships.

Features

  • 300,000 word+ Story (Across Two Volumes)
  • A true open world with free travel, leading to a different play through every time.
  • Complete soundtrack with over 30 unique compositions
  • Over 100 unique illustrations.

Far Beyond the World

Far Beyond the World is a (+18) fantasy VN about a human lost in another world.

"Wake up!" says the voice and you open your eyes in a strange cabin in the woods with only vague recollection of the life you've left behind. Despite appearances, you know that something isn't quite right.

Set on an adventure, trying to piece together the puzzle of your past, as well as forge a new life among the Wolves of Avalan as you try to steer clear of their tribal politics. Your heart will be your compass, but can you trust your feelings when they're so easily clouded? Love can be both a boon and a distraction. Choose your friends carefully and your enemies more careful still.

You had one life already… there might not be a third.

Written and Illustrated by KaelTiger

Update Schedule

The next update is planned for 1st of October 2020, with following updates being month apart. If you enjoyed this VN, consider supporting me on my Patreon or through Ko-Fi

Every little bit helps! ❤

動物之鬪

當網路紅極一時的錯位梗圖上的動物們站上決鬥的擂臺後，將會迸出何等激烈的火花呢？

簡單操作 X 詼諧動物 X 刺激對戰!!!

選擇你喜歡的趣味動物來一場充滿野性的激烈♂ 對戰吧！

你可以在遊戲中與全世界的玩家好手對戰，也能在街機模式中擊敗所有敵人，成為動物之王!!!

 肌肉右鉤柴、絕對王者狐、霸氣貓、烏鴉猩、魔法松鼠…等待著你的參戰！

只需按下按鈕即可出招！

本作僅需四個按鈕操縱，並且採用一鍵出招系統，只要按著方向鍵加上技能鈕就能施展必殺技!

完全沒玩過任何格鬥遊戲的玩家也無須擔心更可以透過 "簡易連段"的輔助模式、用最順暢的方式享受痛扁對方的過程！沒有複雜的操作、打起來輕鬆有趣！   由數位卡夫特獨立研發、高同步率且穩定性極高的網路對戰功能在這次也匯入了動物之鬪中、讓玩家可以依照所在的地區選擇伺服器並獲得暢通無比的連線體驗!

每個動物(角色)都有精心設計的必殺技、大絕招，具備獨特的趣味和特色!

當然每個動物的各種攻擊中必有一些破綻，找出那些套路的破綻，再用一套連段把它帶走吧～！

Flexible Survival

lexible Survival, or FS for short, is a text-based RPG written in Inform 7. It is the largest project ever made in Inform, featuring hundreds of extensions, unique art, and a team of over 20 writers and coders.

What is FS?

FS is an adult text RPG that focuses on themes of transformation and related topics. You can find just about any kind of fetish or kink in FS, featuring content like your standard furry creatures, to more intriguing and exotic transformations like foxes made of latex, or girls made entirely of goo! There are over 250 unique forms in Flexible Survival, and over 100 NPCs to interact with.

All the while, FS still manages to be a cohesive survival experience. You have to make sure you are fed and hydrated, while simultaneously making sure you stay sane in this strange, nanite-fueled apocalypse.

Contributing

Anyone is welcome to contribute to FS! If you're interested in writing content for the game, editing existing content, or programming new systems and mechanics, there's more than likely a place for you on the team! Feel free to fork this repo and make any changes you want. To chat with the other devs, check out the discord link below!

See the contribution guide here for more info: https://github.com/Nuku/Flexible-Survival/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md

Four-Letter Word

What's the hardest thing to say to someone you really care about when you're not sure how they feel about you? Four-Letter Word is a gay, furry visual novel about love and some of the many different paths through life it can take you. Play as one of two roommates with a shared history who are on their own journeys to figure out who they are and what they want, and help them find the answers they seek.

The visual novel serves as a continuation of the comic of the same name (which you can read here.) Although it's not necessary to read it, as the game works as a standalone piece of interactive fiction, it can provide some background information and additional context to the events in the visual novel.

Development began in the tail end of 2014 and continued until early 2016, where I took an extended hiatus for health reasons, but now things are back on track with a new build coming out each month! If you'd like to help support the project, consider becoming one of my patrons on Patreon and getting access to builds two weeks before the public, along with a number of other available perks!

FOX n FORESTS

FOX n FORESTS is a 2D action platformer with RPG elements inspired by the glorious days of 16-bit! Switch between various seasons on the fly, shoot and slash with your magic melee crossbow and snatch valuable loot to unveil the mystery of the 5th seasons. A thrilling pixel art fable with rewarding super secrets, screen filling bosses and thriving exploration. This is 16-bit how you remember it!

5 SEASONS!

Switch between various seasons to explore new areas, outfox enemies and uncover amazing secrets.

MAGIC MELEE CROSSBOW!

Wield a weapon like no other to shoot, slash, slide and switch seasons.

FOXTASTIC FABLE!

Help Rick the Fox uncover the mystery of the 5th season and bring back justice to the forests and its inhabitants.

RETROTAINMENT!

16-bit how you remember it with gorgeous pixel art and a catchy chiptunes soundtrack.

ACTION PLATFORMER!

A thrilling adventure with engaging RPG elements, clever puzzles and pixel perfect platforming.

狐的假期 / 狐の假期

遊戲介紹：

這是一款簡單的休閒遊戲。適合茶餘飯後，重溫童年假期生活小憩一下。

我們的主角是一隻名叫吉吉的狐狸，他有一本“神奇”的畫冊，翻開它就能重溫童年假期美好的時光。

你可以透過安排狐狸的旅行目的地，讓他可以遨遊中國的大好河山。

送給出生在80.90年代的同學們，在遊戲裡會看到許多記憶裡的物品及畫面。

遊戲特色：

  • 精美的各地風景大圖，滿足你還沒有旅行的遺憾。
  • 豐富的任務，讓主角在玩的過程中，幫助做家務。
  • 朋友邀約功能，讓主角與其他夥伴一同玩耍，共同成長。
  • 情竇初開的年紀，懵懂的愛情故事。
  • 完成32周即可完成一週目，輕鬆有趣。
  • 屬性成長影響角色顯示效果，高矮胖瘦甚至疲勞都有體現。

致敬逝去的童年！

送給80.90出生的同學們！

Freedom Planet

Freedom Planet is a combat-based platform adventure that pits a spunky dragon girl and her friends against an alien attack force. There's trouble around every turn, from insects to giant robots to sheer explosive destruction, but you'll have a variety of special fighting abilities to blast your way through each stage.

As Lilac, you can use Dragon powers to whip enemies with your hair, spin like a cyclone, or fly through the air at high speed like a comet.

As Carol, you can bust through foes with a flurry of punches and kicks or summon motorcycles that let you ride up walls and ceilings.

Do you have what it takes save Avalice? Try the demo and see for yourself!

  • Dash across the celestial world of Avalice with boosts, bikes and other high-speed gimmicks to achieve the fastest time
  • Explore at your own pace to find hidden paths and treasures and collect as many crystals as possible
  • Help Lilac and friends save their world from war in an engaging Adventure mode with fully voiced cutscenes
  • Zoom through the stages without interruption or dialog with Classic mode
  • Battle tons of quirky boss enemies including giant robots, towering alien creatures and aggressive rivals
  • Discover five elemental shields that reflect specific attacks and provide cool benefits
  • Unlock special bonuses, including mini-games, achievements, artwork and music

GalaxyTrail
製作
Fueled by Insanity

Fueled by Insanity is a horror visual novel in which you play as Jeffrey, an anxiety-ridden yet cheerful fox as you encounter a new friend named Ted. The two, seeming to be in a similar life situation, decide to stick together to help each other out.

After going back to your hometown, you will encounter old friends and family along the way, and who knows what adventures may await when you return.

All character sprites and cg art is done by my friend, Coza. If you like his art, check out his page Here!

Furries & Scalies: Super Scary Halloween Spooky Times

The East Arden Mall has seen better days. The 24/7 Halloween shop, Super Scary Halloween Spooky Times, has seen its heyday come and go. But the various mallrats and workers of the mall are fighting back against their Corporate Overlords!

A dark shadow looms as King MacBeth and his mall-eating corporation, MacEmpire, threatens to swallow every mom-and-pop shop in the country of Arden. You have one season to prove that your store can.... like, make the mall profitable? Make sure it doesn't get bought out THIS particular year? Manage your employees, interact with them on a personal level, and train them to be the best Halloween workers ever!

Darn the man. Save the empire. By not selling to the empire.

Features

Manage your teams skills and personal issues Multiple anthro personas all based on Shakespeare characters Try to make your store so profitable it will become the #1 Halloween superstore in Arden! Maybe.

Charity Info

The Bail Project works to help stop the mass incarceration of those in need. The South Poverty Law Center uses litigation, education, and other forms of advocacy to fight bigotry and intolerance across the nation.

Furwind

Ф FIGHT A TERRIBLE DARKNESS Ф

The old war between ancestors with the imprisonment of one of them. Darhûn, who was caged for eras, has been released from his captivity and is ready to take the dark and madness to the forest.

Furwind, a young inhabitant of Moontail, is not aware that soon will go to one of the biggest and most dangerous adventures of his life.

◤If you like the classic platform games, colorfull pixel art style, an OST that will inmerse you and challenging adventures, Furwind is your game!!◢

FEATURES

₪ PUT YOURSELF IN FURWIND´S SKIN ₪

Guide a little fox in his adventure to defeat the big evil forces that is devastating the Forest.

₪ EXPLORE EVERY CORNER OF THE FOREST ₪

Complete the different episodes, exploring levels full of life and color with an unique pixel art style.

₪ LIVE A CHALLENGING EXPERIENCE ₪

Move yourself by the dangerous areas, fulled with traps and risks wich will challenge your skills.

₪ Use your powers ₪

The ancestors have blessed you to reach the most inaccessible places, heal your wounds and fire up your enemies.

₪ Improve your abilities ₪

In Korvo's Mystic Shop you will be able to improve your power-ups and abilities

₪ Fight strong enemies! ₪

Defeat the frightening bosses that are destroying your world.

₪ Enjoy an awesome OST ₪

Live this adventure with an surrounding and inspiring OST with ambiental and atmosferics sound effects that reveal an environment full of life.

揭諦

遊戲簡介

由個人獨立製作的同性、獸人向文字戀愛遊戲；

遊戲內含有少量血腥、獵奇、黑暗及同性性描寫內容。

遊戲背景

辰歷2215年左右，“基因入侵”事件爆發，獸人群體於智人佔領的世界中迅速出現並崛起。

獸人的智力和體能均超過智人，且擁有凌駕智人的科技水平，智人不得不借由人體改造彌補不足。

時至辰歷3055年，經歷兩次大型種族戰爭，世界已經演變為“二獸一智”的三足鼎立格局：智人種族的數十國度統一為【智人國盟】，擁有無與倫比的文化；追求和平、共榮的獸人組成【獸人共和國】，為政教合一的國家；叛逆、自主的獸人則建立了【獸人自由諸國】，發展著尖端的科技。

三大政治經濟體表面上往來頻繁、交流合作、欣欣向榮，背後實則暗潮湧動、互相制衡。

辰歷3059年，自由諸國國企即將釋出新型民用科技產品，智人國盟也早已獲取情報，知曉其背後炫耀並擴張著的軍事力量。

在此威脅之下，智人國盟僱傭的駭客團體暗中調查出，獸人的最高科技實為一組超級計算互動模組【空無邊處】。

駭客團體的破解隊伍也在此時分別前往自由諸國，企圖破解並掌握【空無邊處】的系統核心。

遊戲玩法

一般的文字類遊戲玩法，空格或滑鼠進行劇情及相關操作；

選項很少，只有開頭（選擇攻略物件）和結尾（選擇結局）兩個；

玩家在開頭輸入的稱呼並不影響主角的名字和主線程序，但並非毫無意義；

遊戲內含有一個額外內容，將在通關某個特定線路後解鎖。

遊戲特性

  • 獸人世界、賽博朋克世界觀、佛教思想與中國傳統文化的結合
  • 獨特的敘事方法、多種藝術表現形式的結合

感謝支援

《揭諦》為個人獨立製作的文字類遊戲，設定、劇本、文案、繪圖、音樂均為獨立完成，雖然確實耗費了極大的精力，但暫還是決定免費釋出。遊戲內容沒有經過什麼加密，若是使用其中圖片或音樂請註明出處，或者也可以直接聯絡本人哦~當然也期待意見和建議。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Get on indienova 官方微博
Gori: Cuddly Carnage

Destroy Unicorns!

Want to slice creepy toys? Want to dice mutated unicorns? Want to play as a murder-kitty on a death-dealing hoverboard? Great news! Gori: Cuddly Carnage is the game you’ve been waiting for!

Our Heros

Come meet the team. First up, there’s your sentient, razor-sharp hoverboard, F.R.A.N.K. Then there’s CH1-P, a modular AI that will constantly complain as you wipe out hordes of corrupted cuddly toys. And then there’s the star of the show – Gori – the most adorable and badass cat in the world.

This cuddly crew gets unwillingly dragged into a battle that wiped out all humans and laid waste to everything on earth that wasn’t cute and cuddly enough for The Adorable Army - a horde of mutated and blood-thirsty toys that only YOU can destroy!

Get Ready for

  • Fast-paced, third-person skate-and-slash carnage.
  • A futuristic world tainted by the Adorable Army.
  • Immersive (and very cute) environments.
  • Adaptable music that reacts to your actions and playstyle.
  • Intense destruction, brutal combat, and a whole world to smash to bits.

Follow Gori, F.R.A.N.K., and CH1-P, on their journey to save their own lives and stop the carnage of the Adorable Army and its dark leaders.

Warning

Game contains foul language, excessive gore and other adult content! Enjoy!

厷雛

《厷雛》是一款基於RENPY引擎開發的文字戀愛懸疑遊戲，玩家需要透過有限的文字線索來解決接踵而來的委託與案件，同時幫助主角“藍夜”走出車禍陰影，並找到自己的人生目標。

遊戲目前僅支援簡體/繁體中文，未來將會提供英文版本。

遊戲中的主要登場人物均為Furry/獸人，且涉及到Furry Boy's Love劇情。遊戲中可能會涉及極小部分文字描述的成人內容以及極少的濫用藥物情節描寫。

遊戲特色

遊戲人物的立繪、場景及劇情等完全為真實感服務，讓玩家能夠徹底融入到主角”藍夜“的人生中。

同時遊戲擁有多線敘事的機制，在首周目通關後，可從七位主要角色的視角瞭解更多劇情。

另有二十餘位擁有立繪與劇情的豐富角色，力求玩家能身臨其境地體驗到主角的生活與社交。

附錄：一本老舊日記的首頁

時間過得真快啊。也不知道是什麼時候起我開始喜歡上了寫日記呢？

自從和他們認識的那一天開始，已經過去整整一年了，這一年遇到了很多新朋友，也找回了不少老朋友，屬實是我人生中最充實的一年了。

當然，最重要的還是我遇到了他......

總之，寫這個日記的初衷就是想記錄下這一年發生的事情了，畢竟我的腦子已經越來越不好用了，總是忘記一些細碎的事情。還是要趁記得住的時候將事情用筆頭記錄下來呀。

雖然這份日記對我而言是想要隱藏到保險箱最深處不想給任何人看的祕密，但如果有一天我死了，這篇日記應該也會“重見天日”吧？

那可不得了，要是形象如此高冷的我被人看到了軟弱的這一面我還不如跳樓。

所以說，雖然不知道看到這篇日記的你是哪位，不過希望你能把這本日記當做一個不怎麼吸引人的故事來看，絕對不能再轉手給其他人！要不然我的老臉就沒了。

總之就是這樣，該交代的也交代完了，那就從去年的五月一日開始講起吧......

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

槍火重生 / Gunfire Reborn

《槍火重生》是一款融合了第一人稱射擊、Roguelite隨機元素和RPG策略選擇的冒險闖關遊戲。玩家在遊戲裡可以操縱不同能力的英雄組建多種Build玩法，使用隨機掉落的武器在隨機性關卡中進行冒險挑戰。可以單人暢玩，也可以最多四人組隊挑戰。

在遊戲中，玩家的每次關卡體驗都是隨機的。每一次重新開始遊戲都是新的體驗。你可以在不同的關卡體驗中遇見不同的英雄天賦、武器道具、不同的關卡路線和戰鬥節奏。

遊戲目前還處於EA搶先體驗階段，我們會在接下來較長的一段時間裡逐漸完善遊戲修復bug、新增更多的內容和玩法。感謝你們的支援！我們會努力把遊戲做的更好。

遊戲特色：

  • FPS+Roguelite+RPG組合玩法，在不斷的死亡輪迴中組建多種Build獲得不同的通關體驗
  • 手工打造但頗具隨機性的關卡體驗
  • 超過100多種不同的道具和各式各樣的武器
  • 多英雄、多周目玩法機制差異
  • 獨具一格的風格化美術
  • 組隊闖關冒險

Hero's Advent

Hero's Advent is a romance-fantasy visual novel set in another world. Suddenly pulled into a new dimension, you're transformed into a furry. Upon waking up, you met Alisa the rabbit, who told you this world was in grave danger and that only you could free the land from the Evil King's grasp.

Your journey starts at a humble homestead in the middle of the forest. After staying for about two week in the new world, you slowly grew more accustomed to life in this strange world. Alas, as much as you wanted to stay, your time grew short. Max the Mercenary was called to assist you in your journey of becoming the prophesized Hero. Throughout your journey, you will meet others who can help you along the way.

Develop your relationship with them. Train hard everyday. Uncover secrets that lies before you. The path ahead is yours to set. Will you free the land from its curse or become its new tyrant? You decide!

You can support us here: https://www.patreon.com/Platier

Follow us on Twitter too!

HeroicSphere Episode1: CyberWolf

Heroic Sphere is a suite of erotic visual novels [Eroge] that takes place in a futuristic cartoon world filled with hunky superhero beasts. [BARA/FURRY]

You can play the entire game for free by using the short version of the game but you will just have 1 path available.

The game features 3 Bad endings and 1 canon ending. 20k + words, No censorship, sound effects and some portraits/animation variations(no CG), multiple paths and 30-45 minutes of gameplay to unlock everything. Be aware that the game features A Lot of diverse kinks the only limit being no underage, extreme vore, gore and scat content especially for the side events. The main story will mainly focus around mind alteration and corruption.

Each episode puts you in a different character and let you share his POV of the situation while advancing the main story (no same episode with different POV)

This game is done at 100% by me with the help of some royalty free assets, sound and music. Unfortunately, I'm not an English native speaker so expect some painful grammatical errors sometime. If you have any comments, typo corrections or future updates you'll want in the game, please, come to the Discord server.

https://discord.gg/Gm2K57Pz3Z

Or contact me on my twitter: https://twitter.com/satyroom

Tag: Superhero, corruption, Bara, Gay, Erogame, Romance, Mind control, hypnosis, visual novel, Erotic Game, Visual Novel.

返鄉 ~漏夏重置~ / Homecoming ~Morenatsu Revisited~

"It's been five years since I've seen my hometown. What if they don't remember me? What if everyone's moved on?"

In Homecoming, you take on the role of a young Japanese snow fox named Hiroyuki Nishimura. After moving away from your hometown Minasato to Osaka five years ago, you receive an unexpected letter from an old friend inviting you back for one last summer vacation before starting your senior year of high school. What complicates things is how you've neglected to contact any of your friends over the years. Although nervous, you accept the invitation.

What awaits you back in Minasato? Will you be welcomed with open arms, or has it been so long that everyone has forgotten about you? Will this be yet another wasted summer, or will you finally have the chance to experience what makes life worth living?

=====

Homecoming is a visual novel about nostalgia, romance, living life to the fullest, reconnecting with old friends, and learning to face your demons, all wrapped up in the cute Japanese kemono aesthetic. The game Homecoming is based on, Morenatsu, is considered to be one of the classic entries in furry culture. Although it was cancelled in 2015, dedicated fans have continued to keep its legacy alive through fanworks such as this. While rough around the edges, the original game captured many hearts, including the members of the Stormsinger Studios development team. We aim to create the best visual novel we can make, doing justice to the source material that has inspired so many like us.

=====

NSFW Warning! The game is intended for mature audiences! Explicit scenes and images featuring same-sex romances can be found throughout the game. Please do not download if you are under the age of 18!

=====

Our Public Discord Channel! https://discord.gg/WTjM3S5

=====

Disclaimers! Stormsinger Studios is not affiliated with Morenatsu Team. This is a fan remake and is not meant to be seen as a replacement for the original game. If you are interested in seeing the original, consider checking out the Revival team's Ren'py port.

Homecoming is a work in progress. All content within is subject to change and is not necessarily representative of the final product.

Some updates may require starting a new game to avoid game crashing bugs. Please understand this is a part of the development process and is something you agree to deal with when playing an early access product.

=====

The Stormsinger Studios Team Official Team Pages: FA Twitter Blog

DzahnDragon - Studio Director FA Twitter

Devilizer - Art Director FA

Lesli-Chu!? - Composer FA Soundcloud YouTube

Frostclaw - Homecoming Director FA Website Twitter

HypoNova - Staff Artist and Musician Twitter

Homecoming is being developed using the Ren'Py engine.

Project Development Status Homecoming is a work in progress. Since we're a team of volunteers, work proceeds when we have the available time to spare. Because of this, it is unwise to commit to a rigid schedule. We will try to release an update at least once every two months, though with our rough schedules the periods can vary wildly. We thank you for your patience while we develop Homecoming!

You can check the progress of the routes on this spreadsheet, that way you know ahead of time how far along your favorite character is in terms of development: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1XEauCEKAuuzjbp2C3RSwzJKrkcCYmi-Elvu6qYbeRug/edit?usp=sharing

We hope you enjoy your stay in Minasato!

Hunt and Snare

System requirements: * 64 bit operating system * Quadcore, 2.8Ghz * 4 GB RAM * Nvidia 1060 or AMD equivalent

Hunt and Snare is a Furry Third Person Shooter with a strong focus on sexual themes and character interaction. Travel between islands on a ship with your trusted ship crew, hunt rare species with a tranquilizer rifle or capture with bare paws,and sell to the highest bidder after rigorous sampling of the prey. Will your crew grow to love you as an equal ship commander, or will they idolize you as a renowned hunter?

Hunt for rare and unique species of all genders and races: Using your trusty tranquilizer long rifle, or go feral and capture with your bare paws!

Fully customize your character: Select from general body shape, including species, breasts, genitalia, and tail, down to the color and pattern of your skin and pupil style.

Opinion based conversation system: Gain favors by interacting with other characters frequently. Be loved, be hated, be admired, or be feared!

Sexplore a juicy selection of fetishes and gender combinations: From M/F, M/M, F/F, Futa/M, Futa/F, to Futa/Futa all covered with Classic, Anal, Blowjob, Pawjob, Pawing, Submissive/Domination, Toys, Solo, and Milking (your ship needs natural fuel, doesn’t it?).

Fully filterable acts and prey: Customize your selection by enabling or disabling any type of act in the game as well as disabling specific types of prey.

Fully animated: Hundreds of animations, with motion captured movement, "physics-based dynamic bones" in breasts, penises, ears, and tails, and animated lips, vagina, and anus.

Showroom: Select from a large selection of various positions you have discovered or play out full acts in various locations and environments.

Features Under Development

World of Skir: Discover and hunt on Skiia, the northern island named after the sibling of the great god-dragon Skir, visit the magnificent island state of Harakeen, the jewel of Skir, explore the wild and dangerous wilds of Kizan.

Customizable tranquilizer long rifle: Personalize and upgrade your rifle to no only hunt more difficult prey, but to do it in style.

Sailing and ship customization: Customize and decorate your own ship and sail freely with no artificial barriers or level gates, between islands in search for better hunting grounds. Unlock new rooms for your ship with money for new encounters and other features.

Trading and inventory: Sell prey for money and then purchase new accessories, clothes, and other customization pieces, or explore, and discover unique hidden items

More unique species: In addition to the fairly tame catkin of Fain, the loyal dogkin of Davh, the wild and dangerous dragonkin of Kizan, and the cute and cuddly foxkin of Ful are still in development each with their own different skin styles and color combinations.

Rewards and Tiers

All tiers have access to developer posts, ability to vote on Patron only polls, and a corresponding Discord role, in addition to various basic benefits:

Iron Cohort: Early access to public releases of older Patreon builds.

Bronze Cohort: Instant access to the ltest Patreon build.

Silver Cohort: Above rewards, and name in Guild of Wild Hunters' guestbook (Will be added later on and will be located on the guild hall bar counter).

Gold Cohort: Above rewards, and name placard in Guild of Wild Hunters' Wall of Fame (A specific wall with decorated gold placards. Each Gold Cohort has their own placard).

Emerald Cohort: Above rewards. An extra supporter tier. Show your ultimate appreciation of our work <3

Note: To have your name added to Guild of Wild Hunters' guestbook, or Wall of Fame you must send us a message on Patreon or Discord and give us exact name you wish to be added with!

Development

You can see the more indepth information about the current development focus on our public Trello board: https://trello.com/b/whud7kIk/hunt-n-snare

About us

Ruffleneck - Programming / Art / Design - FA/Twitter - That's me! I have 9 years of professional experience as artist, designer, and gameplay programmer. Late 2016 I started working on the Hunt and Snare prototype and hanging around in the adult game developer community. Oh boy! I enjoy it a lot more than the "normal" game developer community. Hunt and Snare is my little baby dragon and I hope you enjoy it too! <3

Hareress - Animation / Skin Designer / Map Builder - FA/Twitter - Hareress is a 2D artist, also my little bunny and my owner, who is sharing the content workload with me. Their primary focus is on animations, skin designing, and map building.

Drathek - Programming - Twitter - Drathek is a blazingly awesome red and black dragon who does a fantastic job easing my burdens by handling majority of the programming tasks. Drathek is effectively the lead programmer of Hunt and Snare, or senior, or greater dragon programmer, not sure what describes their role the best :3

Nullbunny - Programming - FA / Twitter - Nullbunny is a brilliant and fun bunny who joined us as the second programmer, both helping Drathek, and helping us, together, to realize my wildest dreams for Hunt and Snare, and help bring features in faster :3

The Final Words

Whether or not you decide to support us and Hunt and Snare, thank you very much for your attention. I hope you still enjoy the splendor of the public build! If you chose to support us, wow! That's the biggest vote of confidence one can give!

Thank you so very much! ^^

~Ruffleneck

I.C.O.

In the far future, the world has been overrun by unknowable entities known simple as the I.C.O. Civilization has all but abandoned the surface and now hides away in structures known as the Craters. While both are locked in a violent standstill, the Craters have produced one weapon to combat the I.C.O. threat: the Ferals.

Judah Bishop is a young sea otter who just recently joined the Feral branch of the military and is now plunged into a whole new world of battles, strategy, and danger. He must work with his squadron against any threat that comes his way lest he fall to the I.C.O.

I.C.O. is heavily inspired by anime such as Neon Genesis Evangelion, Attack on Titan, and Gurren Lagan which have greatly shaped the design and story being told. I do hope however that I.C.O. is able to carve out its own identity and hopefully be something fresh and new in the furry VN genre.

Follow my Twitter for updates on I.C.O., memes, and whatever's going on in me brain.
https://twitter.com/Cetus62080081

Art direction and coloring of backgrounds and characters done by the lovely Cody Opulos!
Check his twitter out here.
https://twitter.com/codyopulos

I.D.E.K.A Halloween Special

2015 Edition

This is a short visual novel collaboration between myself and CursedMarked based around the characters in our comic, I.D.E.K.A.. Join the group in a small Halloween Special we created as things go crazy in their potion shop. It was Patron only, but it's been long enough now to where we feel like we can release it for everyone!

If you'd like to see more about these characters and more visual novel work, considering becoming Patrons or follow us on our other sites! Or, if you have questions about it, feel free to contact me!

Word count - 8300 / Playing Time - 10-15 minutes

WARNING - This does contain mature content! And a huge thanks to all of our current Patrons for supporting us! We'd not be able to do this stuff without all of your support, so thanks so much. And thank you to everyone who supports us however they can!

We are offering this as free, but you can pay as much (or little!) as you want for it. Any tips are greatly appreciated!

2016 Edition

We're following along with Fumdux and Kirin as they are heading off to gather a plant for a potion in production for a client, but along the way, they are driven into an old castle they have never seen before. Unable to return from the way they came, they have to find a way out!

We've added some new things since the Patron-only release in October 2016. The dialogue has been tweaked in places to make certain puzzles easier to figure out, we have added an achievement page in the gallery, an extra image was added for those that do get them all in the Special gallery, and there is now an option that lets you clear all gallery and achievement unlocks for anyone who wants a fresh start (it is suggested to do this if you have the original version)!

You can always try out the free demo for it, if you'd like to get a taste of the game before you buy it!

Word count - 20,000 / Playing Time - Varies due to puzzles

WARNING - This does contain mature content! 18+ Only And a huge thanks to all of our Patrons for supporting us! We'd not be able to do this stuff without all of your support, so thanks so much. And thank you to everyone who supports us however they can!

Authors and team

  • DyneWulf - Patreon, Twitter, FurAffinity, Website

  • CursedMarked - Patreon, Twitter, FurAffinity

  • Writer and Programmer - DyneWulf

  • Art - CursedMarked
  • Music - Ashwaffles and CursedMarked
  • Testers - Massimo, Ashwaffles, Wolfstar, Fumdux

Identity

Identity

# Identity is a non-linear, horror/mystery visual novel with a plot based around the premise of self-rediscovery. You take on the role of Yarin Nyrok, a scalie fellow who wakes up with no recollection of himself or anything else. Fortunately, you meet some odd people who are willing to help you, apparently old friends and some new acquaintances. Try to find out who you were, whatever caused you to wake up blank, and form new bonds and memories meanwhile. And if you can't uncover your old self, you may still form your own, new Identity!

The game features a diverse cast of dragons, lizards and other furry/scaly species. You will learn about their personalities, tastes and quirks while uncovering the mystery of your memory loss and the strange plot brewing in and around the Heaven's Peak Resort.

Is it NSFW?

Yes. Identity will feature lots of optional erotic content. You'll be able to hang out with the characters you meet during "free time" events, to develop your relationship with them on a romantic or purely platonic level and, as you may expect, to get it on with most of them. We intend to give some freedom here regarding whether you top or bottom. We aim for at least a couple of sex scenes per character.

This game will be mostly M/M and queer oriented, with few straight scenes and female characters. Uncommon kinks and fetishes (such as BDSM) will also be featured, as well as strong language, allusions to drugs, alcohol, violence and mild horror.

Identity is an adult game which features explicit imagery. Make sure you meet the legal age requirements before playing it.

How you can support us

We are an independent team working on this project in our free time. Any donation, no matter how small, gives us a bit more stability and funds to develop this story about juicy, manly drakes and their precarious circumstances.

We are using Patreon as our main fundraising campaign. Through Patreon, you can get special perks such as early access to the latest builds of the game. We keep public builds one version behind patron ones, however that might change as the game grows. You will also gain access to our Discord server and more, depending on your pledge tier.

Of course, you can also support us on Itch.io directly by making a donation when you download Identity. However, we only post the public game versions to Itch.io, so the only way to access those perks is through Patreon.

Meet the team

  • Rriik - Programmer, PR
  • Lone_Wanderer - Writer, Creative Lead
  • Asbeoth (Vinickus) - Writer
  • Folsky - Sprite Artist
  • Weißer Rauch - Background & Concept Artist
  • Sampling Kid - Musician
  • Lumix Fey - CG Illustrator

You can also find us on...

  • Patreon: patreon.com/Identity
  • Twitter: @Identity_VN
  • FurAffinity: furaffinity.net/user/identitygame
  • YouTube: Juicy Drake Studios
  • Email: juicydrakestudios@gmail.com

Technical issues?

Should you find any bugs or typos, let us know in the comments or by emailing juicydrakestudios@gmail.com. Attaching a screenshot of the scene, dialogue prior to the issue and/or error messages would greatly help us fix the problem.

We'd like to thank everyone for supporting the work we do. Without you, this project would never have gotten this far.

Inspector Waffles

It’s hard to get the memory of that case out my head... I can’t even think about what my old partner went through without getting a bad taste in my mouth. I guess that’s why I’m sittin' here drinking yet another glass of cold, hard milk.

Inspector Waffles was hoping his worst days were behind him, but the murder of a high-profile industrialist CEO beloved by the citizens of Cat Town raises new questions and fears.

Being the best inspector on the CTPD, Waffles has no choice: he's gotta push past the painful memories, don his well-worn overcoat, and prepare to get his paws dirty.

A detective story reminiscent of the old school classics, Inspector Waffles provides plenty of peculiar mystery, a story full of intrigue, and a slew of characters to interrogate, all wrapped into beautifully simple pixel-art. Will you be able to sniff out every clue and nab the murderer?

A REAL TREAT, SEE?

  • A brilliant feline detective in a world full of anthropomorphic cats, dogs, and maybe other species. It’s pixel-animal madness, I tell ya.
  • A beautiful jazzy soundtrack, full of notes and music and harmony pleasing to your ears and brain.
  • Chock full of dry humor and puns about cats and dogs. Seriously, I couldn’t think of any more puns to include. The pun supply is exhausted.

I Promise

Scott 和他的同學們踏上了一次小小的聖誕旅行。他們滿心盼望著將會經歷的快樂時光，像是滑雪，溫泉還有其他的美好事物！但前方等待著的僅僅只是這些嗎？... 本作是遊戲 Great Troubles 的續集。

釋出頁面
Just, Bearly

A comedic story game played in vignettes, about feeling anxious as a bear in inner city Melbourne, Australia, and trying to connect to people none the less.

Click, pull, mash, and guide your way through an ever changing mix of dialogue choices, reaction challenges, dexterity tests, rhythm games and God only knows what else as you overthink and under-perform your way through every day life -- Striving towards greatness and being less of an awkward, anxious, crap.

Key features:

  • Vignette story telling
  • Very realistic simulations of awkward situations
  • Interactive panic attacks
  • Laugh-y bits
  • Cry-y bits
  • pretty ok original photography
