The Kamonegi is full of magic swords / カモネギ号が魔法剣でいっぱいになる

At the beginning.

You wake up in a world where magic swords exist.

You are approached by the captain of the Kamonegi to work as a communications officer.
Together with the captain and the ship's crew, your job to find the magical sword begins.

What happened in the great disaster of five years ago?
You don't know.

You don't know who is the prophet, the one who gives you the information about the magic sword on his radio.
What is the nature of the black magic sword that attacked you? How does the magic power work?
And why was the magic sword created?

So that this world could live.
You have to get a lot of magic swords.

The Kamonegi is full of magic swords

It's a game of flirting in a flying ship while searching for magic swords.
The characters are called furry.
It is a game with strong homosexual elements.

Genre: Adventure game
Approximate play time: 3 to 5 hours.
Ending: 1 (with some variation)
Bad Ending: about 10.
Event stills: about 50 basic.
Adult Event: 4 characters x4 + about 10 others
The producer doesn't quite remember.

The protagonist does not speak at all. The story progresses according to your choices.
You can move freely around the ship, so it's up to you, the correspondent, to decide where to talk to and who to talk to and how to progress in the story.

There is an easy mode in this game.
From a number of options, you will be given a green color for what the story is going to be about.
Others will be red for bad endings and pink for adult ones.
Additionally, in Very Easy, green will be selected over time.
In this case, all you have to do is turn the mouse wheel to advance the game.

Created by Musashi Kazui with the help of Nozomi Tsubaki Koton

Development is done on Kirikiri-Kirikiri 2 (KKDE).
Because it is a rather old engine, there may be a compatibility problem.
A trial version is available, so please use it if you want to check the operation. =

(Translated from Japanese)

Kelipot / 形骸骑士

官方玩家群：785233553
官方微博：@Kelipot形骸騎士 @GameraGame

《形骸騎士》是一款擁有豐富劇情的平臺動作Roguelite遊戲，經典的橫版動作，各種各樣的能力，貫穿始終的故事，盡情享受這一次冒險吧！

多線分支盡情探索

遊戲中擁有多條世界線，你需要在不同的世界線間穿梭，前往各個平行時空的塞勒菲斯小鎮。踏遍城鎮的每一個角落，發現其中的祕密，最終揭開這個故事中埋藏的真相。

目前遊戲已經包含了幾十種怪物，7個單獨的BOSS，十幾場不同的BOSS戰鬥分支。根據你的選擇和劇情的發展，BOSS的戰鬥模式也會發生改變！

豐富物品任你挑選

目前遊戲中已經包含上百種道具和符文可以任你挑選，每種道具都可以讓你在這一局中獲得獨特的能力。而獲得的符文可以讓你永久增強，選擇啟用符文還能額外再獲得各種各樣的加成。不想用刀劍而是想踩扁這些怪物？沒問題！

彈幕動作獨特體驗

遊戲的戰鬥中融入了精心設計過的彈幕要素，配合橫板的戰鬥形式一同呈現。擔心會不會太難？沒問題！各種各樣的道具和無敵的衝刺會讓你輕鬆應對。

手繪風格用心呈現

遊戲整個採用純2D的手繪風格進行繪製，每一個怪物和角色都用精美的逐幀動畫製作。帶給你最精緻的場景和最生動的角色！

遊戲特色

  • 全部都是毛茸茸的可愛角色！
  • 每一個新的發現都會讓你變的更強，無論是得到某人的好感抑或是找到了隱藏的祕密。
  • 有趣的故事貫穿始終，希望能帶給你歡笑和感動。
  • 精心設計的彈幕貫穿整個遊戲。衝刺！跳躍！用盡渾身解數應對每一個強大的敵人！
  • 華麗的演出，史詩般的Boss戰鬥。他們為何會陷入瘋狂？只有擊敗他們才能獲得答案。
  • 其他角色是敵是友？這全憑你的選擇。
  • 每個符文都獨具特色，收集並激活它們，會使你變得更強大。
  • 電影級的配樂伴隨整個遊戲。

故事背景

神祕的瘟疫，突然降臨在古老的塞勒菲斯。為了拯救哥哥，為了拯救所有陷入瘋狂的人們，王子阿貝爾隻身踏入這座滿是魔物的疫城，穿過無數的平行世界，尋找倖存的故人，調查瘟疫的起源，探尋所有謎團的真相。

遊戲中擁有多條世界線，你需要在不同的世界線之間穿梭，前往到塞勒菲斯小鎮的各個平行時空，踏遍城鎮的每一個角落，發現其中的祕密，揭開這個故事中埋藏的真相。至於最後的故事究竟是怎樣的，那還要看你如何在關卡中抉擇了。不過也不要怕，每一局遊戲都是一個新的開始，你可以去往各個世界，無限次嘗試不同的可能性，總會有你心儀的結局。如果想來點不一樣的？《形骸騎士》同樣也可以滿足你的好奇心，嘗試儘可能多的可能性，總有一些小驚喜在等著你。

在 Steam 上獲取 官方微博 官方微博

獸人角鬥場 / Kemo Coliseum

Kemo Coliseum is an adult puzzle RPG game. Players will take a role of Volga, an ex-soldier from the Nuana, the country of the North, and participate in the tournament in the Kingdom of Kornelia. The winner of the tournament will be rewarded with a title of a "Gladiator", and a chance ask one wish to be granted by the king of Kornelia.

The game is a mix of a match-3 puzzle game with RPG elements. Matching three or more gems of the same type to erase them from the board. Each gem type will result in different action, ranging from a physical attack to charging your skills. Fans of PuzzleQuest will get a hang of the game very quickly, but even if you have never played PuzzleQuest before, the game is very easy to learn.

While the goal of the game is to win the tournament, there are many things for you to do before you continue to the next round. Helping people in the town by completing quests, finding rare items and improve your skill by exploring the dungeons, or build relationship with other contestants.

獸人學院 / 獸人程式碼 / Kemono Code

來自魔族的半獸半魔的青年伊沃，突然轉學到一所獸人學園生活。這裡是一個無論環境還是理念都與魔族大相徑庭的世界。這裡有悶騷的學紀委員長、放蕩的足球隊員、拜金的老師、害羞膽小的舍友，伊沃究竟能否在這裡找到屬於自己的真愛呢？

官方微博
獸人麻將 / Kemono Mahjong
沒錯，咱沒有和那些自稱是麻將的連連看同流合汙，而是做了一個功能完整的日本麻將遊戲。日本麻將是傳統中國麻將在海外的變種之一，同樣需要縝密的計劃才能獲勝，並且趣味性絲毫不減！

本應用的一些特色：

* 本地單人遊戲
* 遵循歐洲麻將協會（EMA）的日本麻將規則
* 不會看得眼睛疼的牌面圖案設計：既有給資深玩家準備的傳統樣式，也有給麻將新人準備的簡化樣式
* 個性迥異的電腦玩家
* 舒緩的音樂
* 多國語言！（英語，西班牙語，法語，荷蘭語，德語，波蘭語，泰語，簡體中文，韓語，日語）
* 自帶日本麻將教程和遊戲內即時幫助，這輩子第一次接觸麻將也沒關係！

Kemono Roster - Minos
主角鼓起勇氣向一直暗戀著的虎獸人學長告白，結果卻遭到對方的傷害。失落之際，一位自稱是神明的人物從天而降，說要幫助主角對學長進行報復。於是乎，主角報復調教學長的故事就如此這般拉開了帷幕。

遊戲一共有4個結局，注意遊戲中的出現的提示信息，就可以順利達成全部結局了。

獸人戰士的夜襲 / ケモノ戦士の夜這い

The "Colby" (you) was hired by the Furry Warrior Zigmar
It was the last day of the quest.
Zigmar has pitched his tent in the forest and is already asleep.
You've taken the night watch, and you can't help but feel a secret love for him.
You sneaks into the tent where Zigmar have told "never to enter".

Multi-device (Windows, Mac, Android) support!
Note: This game does not work on Mac OS Catalina (10.15) or later.

How to play this game?

Touch or hold or scratch the character's body with the mouse to make it easier for you to play the game.

Observe your character, undress them, and touch them.

Be careful not to wake your character up and crawl into the night before morning arrives!

The more hearts on the right side of the screen, the more pleasure you will feel when you reach them.

Shop Comments

Colby feels a pang of sadness that his two-week journey with Zigmar will be over once he passes through the forest. On the last night, I took the night watch and let Zigmar rest in the tent, but I couldn't help but notice the inside of the tent and sneak a peek at ....... I'm sure you'll be able to see the plump thighs, the chubby crotch that you can't help but notice, the thick chest plate with the shirt stuck tightly to it, and the strong arms. Please carefully remove and rub so as not to wake up, but boldly remove and rub, and please enjoy all of the furry warrior's glossy body.

(Translated from Japanese)

Get on Digiket
Khemia

(Khemia contains themes of an adult nature - you must be 18 or older to play)

Things have changed quite a bit on Adastra. The Human's arrival has altered the political course of the entire galaxy. After his departure, the friends he knew on the wolven moon are left guessing as to what needs to be done next. The Parents, the supposedly all-knowing, all-powerful beings controlling the Galaxias, have a plan, but it's not like they're being upfront about it. They never are, and Scipio, a young wolf on a diplomatic mission, starts to wonder if these Parents really do hold hold all the answers. He starts to wonder if there are Others.

Credits

Sprite art is by HAPS.
Background art is by Stranj.
Additional art is by Karadamon.
Music is composed by Moe.

Update Schedule

The game is updated within the first two weeks of every month. You can also get updates and access builds up to two weeks early on our Patreon which you can find HERE!

Killigan's Treasure

Set in the land of Canavar, you play as a bull-like barbarian named Killigan Stoneworth, determined to follow an enchanted treasure map throughout the world. He meets several companions along the way that join him in his quest for unimaginable riches, and who can become more than companions, if you wish.

Killigan's Treasure follows an overarching plot at heart, but you CAN choose to pursue a relationship with certain companions (All relationships are currently M/M). Each of them has their own backstory and events that tie back into the overarching plot, so you don't miss out on any story-critical information just for pining after a boyfriend.

Deep in development, will be a work in progress for a while to come. Beware, it's mature content and only for people ages 18 and up! Content updates are usually uploaded during the last week of each month.

Wanna support development? Check out the Patreon!

Created with Ren'Py!

Kingsguard

Current uploaded built is the most recent. But will remain public for some time until the Patreon build gets further along. To gain access to future builds, visit my patreon and consider supporting me there.

A World at Peace:

Perhaps you are used to fairy tales and legends of heroes who journey to far off lands to defeat a great evil who threatens the peace of the world. But what you will quickly find in this story is no such thing. For you see the world is already very much at peace. There may be a few bandits lying in wait on the high roads, thieves who break into homes in the dead of knight, and pick pockets and extortionists prowling the city streets; But there are no wars, very few famines, and certainly no evil sorcerers to stop . It couldn't be a more perfect time to be alive, especially for our young prince, who is about to come of age and soon be rightfully chosen to lead his nation. He has suffered from few plights, and rides on the coattails of his father's success. But all good things must come to an end. Underneath this peaceful world there is a bubbling mire of conspiracy that seeks to drown our prince. With the assistance of those known as Kingsguard, selected individuals to serve as the bodyguards of the royal family, the prince who soon be forced to flee his home to escape those who would wish to end his life, to travel this unknown world that he has only ever read about in books. His journey will be long and perilous This is no dream come true nor an adventure anyone would wish for. But it is one that he has no choice but to see it through to the end.

What can you expect?

Kingsguard is considered a non-linear visual novel so your choices will bring about changes to the story, open up new dialogue, and even affect the ending. To fully understand the story and piece together the mysteries the characters will face, you must play each of the three character paths that will take you to a different corner of Torvair. The choices you make will have consequences and effect the story in various ways.

Kudos:

The current sprite artist is TheBigSlick, who has supplied my with some amazing sprites for the three main characters and will be making more as I continue to work on the game. He has both a twitter and a furaffinity page where you can check out his work.

I also have a cg artist, SunShtein who is helping supply art at various significant moments in the game. He has a furaffinity where you can take a look as his gallery.

Lastly RULER has been kind to supply me with some temporary sprites as placeholders until TheBigSlick creates the official ones. You can check him out here at his twitter.

Updates:

This game still has much work to be done, and updates to the game happen every few months, but regardless I pour my heart into every build, hoping to make this story one of a kind. With your support I will be able to provide you with a compelling story, memorable characters, great artwork, and hopefully a dark yet thrilling experience.

Currently, the most recent update is available on my Patreon for supporters. The most recent build will be available for download in 2 weeks time. Subsequent updates will then be only available for Patreons until enough updates have passed.

騎士學院 / Knights College

《 騎士學院(Knights College) 》是一款以騎士團候補生們生活的『騎士學院』為舞臺的、登入於PC端的R18視覺小說。

在本作中，所有選項都將以卡片的形式呈現，您所扮演的主人公將一邊收集卡片一邊體驗宿舍生活。

故事

在鄉下漁村悠閒度日的青年——艾爾戈，一天突然收到了「意想不到的場所」寄出的入學推薦信。

那是隻招收精英入學的騎士培訓機構，騎士學院（Knights College）。

出身平凡的艾爾格被推薦的理由，是潛藏於他體內的「卡牌化」這一特殊能力。

於是，艾爾戈一邊學習著這一能力的運用，一邊開始了在騎士學院的生活。

角色

在騎士學院，除了艾爾戈等來自弗羅汀本國的學生，還有從敵對國家哈什萊希遠道而來的留學生們，大家一同生活和學習。

此外還有負責講授知識和訓練武藝的教官們，甚至守護國家的龍等等，各式各樣的角色一同構成了騎士學院的日常生活。

遊玩方式

主人公——艾爾戈的選擇，全部由所持有的卡片來完成。

隨著卡片的收集程序，可以前往的地點和可以進行的話題都將不斷增加。

額外說明

如需解鎖成人內容，請在本作官方網站下載R18補丁。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

《苦》《黏》《寒》《毒》四部曲

《苦》七相是一隻從事刑警工作的犬獸人，有一天在下班途中遭到一隻獅子獸人凌子的搶劫，在制服凌子之後沒有逮捕他，而是想幫助他走上正軌......

《黏》焦雨是一隻從事販毒活動的犬獸人，有一次在偶然經過一家旅館的時候，對旅館的老闆狐獸人年年產生了興趣......

《寒》故事追溯到七相還在警校上學的時候，他的班主任正是焦雨......

《毒》系列作品第四部，與前三部作品均有承接。

製作人員：

《寒》
- 劇本、程式：KCN杏仁
- 美術：水餃貓
- 音樂：毛絨虎爪

《毒》
- 劇本、程式：KCN杏仁
- 美術：薄荷
- 音樂：毛絨虎爪

《苦&黏》重製版
- 劇本：KCN杏仁
- 程式、美術：Zoharwolf

祕密之礁湖 / 祕密裡のラグーン

春洲是一個擁有瀉湖的偏遠村莊。故事的主角空午偶然得到了朋友的幫助，來到了這個村莊。

入職村裡的餐廳打工的空午，受到了餐廳店長豪的忠告。
「絕對不要靠近村裡的噴泉。」
不明所以的空午只是點了點頭，但他很快就發現了噴泉的祕密。

在村裡等待著空午的是，關於「有毒噴泉」的謎之傳聞，以及令人情慾高漲的每一天。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

閣樓之礁湖 / 屋根裡のラグーン

春洲是一個擁有瀉湖的偏遠村莊。在此平和度日的主人公空午，某一天在湖邊發現了一名體型巨大的可疑的獅獸人。

出於對這位獅獸人無法入住旅館而被迫露宿的同情，空午將他帶回了家。然而，原計劃只有一天的過夜，隨著故事劇情的發展變成了長達一週的留宿。由於空午自己也是借住，他必須小心不讓屋主察覺到自己擅自留宿陌生人的事。

空午還沒來得及對這位來歷不明的獅獸人產生懷疑，就在這座位於村子外圍的小房子裡，被捲入了意想不到的麻煩之中。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

KAIJU-09
製作
Oodaru
製作 藝術家
祕密之礁湖 重製版 / Lagoon Lounge : The Poisonous Fountain

故事劇情

遊戲主角是一位獸人，在工作上積勞成疾，不得不選擇辭職。
為了養傷，他聽從老朋友的建議，搬到朋友所住的湖邊小村。
搬來之前，村子裡出現名為“春洲之巨人”的奇怪現象，不時有神祕的巨響和地震。
對此好奇的遊客大量湧入村子。
主角在飯店任職服務員，和他的朋友一起工作。
搬家後沒多久，主角的朋友向他發出警告。
「千萬別靠近村裡廣場中的噴泉。」
他很快就會發現，噴泉帶來的是什麼樣的威脅。

遊戲內容

  • 這部視覺小說遊戲包含獸人角色與同性戀愛內容。
  • 遊戲系統注重提供便利的遊戲體驗。
  • 因此你可以在通關後選擇任意章節繼續遊戲，並做出不同的選擇。
  • 語言遊戲
  • 支援多種語言。
  • 在遊戲過程中，隨時都可以按鍵切換語言。
  • 是學習新語言的好機會
這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

凱之傳奇 / Legend of Kay Anniversary

10 years after its initial release, Legend of Kay - Anniversary is a thoroughly remastered version of the original game: high-resolution textures; new, more detailed character models; modern rendering techniques and crystal-clear surround sound give this great classic a new shine.

Full of fond allusions to old martial arts films and pop culture quotes, Legend of Kay - Anniversary is both an incredibly funny game and a challenging action-adventure for young and old alike.

Key Features:

  • 25 different levels with over 15 enemy types and epic boss battles.
  • 3 different primary weapons (sword/hammer/claws) with distinct combat styles.
  • Various mini-games such as wild boar racing, dragon flying and wolf riding.
  • Online rankings: compare your score with your friends’ and compete against the best in the world.

Limits

Limits is an interactive M/M visual novel. What happens within is for you to find out.

Interested?

Disclaimer: Intended for mature audiences, contains mild language and mentions of substance.

Will there be NSFW content?

In the future. :)

Creator's Note:

This is just a passion project that I do as a hobby. Apologies for any literature mistakes and etc. English is not exactly my first language but I speak it so frequently and for majority of my life that it might as well be lol. My writing could use some work though... Anyway, thanks for visiting and have a good day.

Credits:

Character assets were created by me, the backgrounds and some sfx were taken from the internet and mildly edited (Could eventually be replaced), Musics were taken from: https://mixkit.co.

SFX (Most) : https://www.zapsplat.com

It has been confirmed that the Mac build does work... But no promises.*

Last but not least, stay safe and thanks for visiting!

Lookouts

Two lookouts meet in a desert, far from the sight of their gangs. What will become of this fateful meeting?

A short and sweet visual novel about two gay trans masc cowboys finding solace and comfort with each other while on a stakeout. Made for the Gay Western Jam hosted by Robert Yang.(Post jam update to come!)

Controls: Click or press spacebar to progress/show dialogue.

Art and designs: @Coldoggo

Code and writing: @ParanoidHawk

Music: Kevin MacLeod

失落餘燼 / LOST EMBER

一個令人歎為觀止的美麗世界以及它背後的祕密等著你去揭開。隨意附身於任何一個你遇到的動物，以從未有過的全新視角在失落餘燼的世界中展開冒險。

以狼為主角，與可靠的伴侶一起揭開一個關於忠誠、絕望和背叛而導致世界分崩離析的故事。

你的精神伴侶-曾經是一個古老文明的一部分-現在引導你穿越一個由大自然重新創造的世界。在旅途中，你會發現你過去生活的記憶散落在這片土地上，這將有助於你理解曾經發生在你和你的同伴身上的事情。

你擁有附身於任何動物的能力，使你能夠從不同的角度探索世界，尋找隱藏的祕密和地點，同時你會在冒險中經歷一個文明的崛起、衰落，並在其中扮演重要角色。

Lost End / 遗失的终章
關於「遺失的終章」
本遊戲是融合了文字戀愛與養成的高自由度遊戲
玩家將操控主角來經歷一段充滿青春的大四時光

遊戲特色
您在遊戲內既可以探索咖啡廳、籃球社、溫泉等地點
也可以養成主角並進行寫歌、兼職、街頭表演等操作
同時遊戲也擁有極多的角色和劇情，角色全部可以攻略~
只要在遊戲內拜訪角色進行送禮、約會就可以提升好感度!

LostMemories

WARNING: This game contains adult content. This game is intended for players over the age of 18.

Part of the story can be emotionally intense, and may not be for everyone. Please consider this before downloading.

Support this project on Patreon, get game updates up to a month before everyone else, and help us make this VN great!

Amidst a terrible storm, a beam of light shines down from the skies. From this light, a human appears in a world dominated by beastmen.

Plunged into an entirely different civilisation, play as yourself (Vincent standard name), as you try to unlock the layers behind your past.

Along the way, you will encounter four citizens who will help you...and possibly capture your heart:

  • Aaron, a kind hearted and loyal brown bear.
  • Hector, a bookish and timid polar bear.
  • Ryker, a gregarious and flirtatious tiger.
  • Hunter, a withdrawn and taciturn wolf.

You can support the project even if you are not a patron by: Sharing, Commenting and Rating the VN!

Game credits:

  • Developer and Writer: Sylos30 Interactive
  • Editor: i.foxglove5
  • Sprites: Dark_Crow (Fiverr) - No longer working for the project.
  • New main characters sprites: Sylos30 Interactive (with some help from i.foxglove5 )
  • New main artist: MarshMoon (Twitter) - (instagram)

MarshMoon
藝術家
Lovers of Aether

ABOUT

Now is not the time for war. Now is the time for love! The homecoming dance is tonight and you need a date pronto. Spend your school day talking to the students at Aether High. All the original characters from Rivals of Aether are in attendance. It's up to you to decide who you would like to take the the homecoming dance. Get to know each character by talking to them and asking questions. But the school day is not all about lollygagging. You'll have to attend classes, take a pop quiz, give a book presentation and play a game in the computer lab. At the end of the day, will you have a date to the dance?

FEATURES

  • Less words than War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy! Don't spend the rest of your life reading the words in this game.
  • Orcane is a pranskter! Do you like pranks? Then you'll love Orcane.
  • Use your mouse and click stuff. Or use a touch screen and poke stuff. Or use your eyes and look at stuff. Or use your wallet and buy Rivals of Aether.
  • Every character is some kind of animal. Someone told me that is an important feature for a dating game, but I have no idea why.
  • Calm relaxing gameplay. Unlike in a fighting game, no one is out to destroy you and make you wish you never picked up a controller. You can talk to characters at your own leisure and enjoy the elaborate lore of Aether High.
  • Sylvanos will help you get ripped. Follow his natural path and you too can obtain beautiful longtoids.
  • Learn about all the drama that went down last night at the Ding Dong Tree. Who will you believe?
  • An amazing soundtrack that will remind you of the fighting game with these characters so maybe you'll buy that game for all your friends after playing this game.
該遊戲可能不包含中文語言的本地化

Lunar

Lunar is an episodic furry visual novel featuring:

  • A compelling story (40k words and counting) of suspense, romance and self-discovery
  • Dynamic dialogue system that you explore at your own pace
  • 20 exquisitely rendered locations
  • 7 unique musical scores
  • 8 yiffable characters with animated interactive sex scenes
  • Select voice lines to draw you further into the drama
  • 2 mini games

Thank you for your interest in my little game!

Ever since playing my very first yiffy flash game in the early 2000's, I have been looking for a game which still has 18+ content, but which also tells a story. Like others making visual novels, I want to know about the characters' hopes and fears. I want to help them solve problems, I want to understand their vast and expansive universe. I also want them to have fun while doing it!

Your contributions will help me pay the talented artists, musicians and voice actors who have helped me turn an idea on paper into a living and breathing world. I hope you become as passionate about these characters as I have over the 2 years I have been developing this game!

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

露娜咖啡館 / Lunateria

您將在遊戲中扮演主角 Raiga ，他是一隻藍狗，他的性取向一直不被其他人所知。 只有他的同志朋友老虎 Kougi 知道 Raiga 的性取向。 過去發生了很多事情，因此Raiga現在與他的繼父黑豹 Seijirou 住在一起，Seijirou 是著名的咖啡館“露娜咖啡館”的所有者。 他的生活似乎很平常，直到他兒時的朋友和暗戀物件棕狼 Rikiya 來到他的城市的那天。您的故事從這裡開始。

Lustful Desires

Warning!

This game contains adult themes of both hetero and homosexual nature (with a stronger focus on male content)

See the summary below for more details.

What is Lustful Desires?

It’s an adult text-based game with rpg mechanics, inspired by titles like “Flexible Survival” or “Trials in Tainted Space".

For those who want to support the project: Patreon You can also join the Discord channel: Discord

Can you tell me something about the world?

It’s a typical fantasy world where people lives in a small towns trying to survive in a dangerous surroundings. The wilderness is full of beasts and unfortunately not all of them are friendly, not to mention it’s very easy to get lost in thick forests or vast swamps. Some even mentioning ancient ruins scattered all around the land, but not many were able to learn about the past. It’s easier to stick to one safe place, instead of travelling, but yet it still not stopping people from exploring.

Lately the situation started to change. The urges and desires rises everywhere making living creatures wanting something more than only food and a place to rest.

How does the game looks?

Like in all text-based game everything here is described with words. A lot of words.

The graphic is only a helping touch. At this point everything in this area is a Work In Progress – background, interface. In the future I hope I will be able to add graphics of creatures and beasts you can encounter.

What do I have to do?

# During your adventure you are going to meet a lot of people and you will face many different situations. Have in mind that the way you deal with the problem may have consequences later. Do you want to be a hero everyone respect or maybe you prefer to give all the pleasure to everyone interested?

During the talks you will have the options to pick the way you want your character to behave. This may look similar to narrative in a visual novels and like in those some scenes gonna look different depend on what route you took.

There is also a simple battle system. You gonna meet the same opponents very often and their behavior will change depend on how you acted earlier. The bandit will look at you differently if you decide to submit to him, instead of fighting.

Also as an herbalist you will learn a lot about making potions which will help you during your journeys. Prepare yourself for a lot of trips to find resources needed for crafting, but be careful because they can end in an unexpected ways.

How about some kind of summary?

  • Narrative system: Your choices often have consequences. People like to talk so think how you want to be seen in towns.
  • Quest system: Talk with NPCs, some of them may have an additional job for you.
  • Day/Night Cycle: Maybe you should check some places later?
  • Battle system: Fight or Tease? It all depends on what you want.
  • Statuses: Pay attention, some of the attacks may leave you with additional effects. If you won’t sleep or you drink too much it will have affect on you as well.
  • Opponents: Each group of opponents has their own attitude. Defeat a lot of them and they will be angry, submit to them and they will look at you with gracious eye.
  • Crafting system: Learn new recipes, collect resources, makes a wide variety of potions.
  • Equipment system: Take your favorite weapon and armor with you.
  • Variety: This world is inhabited not only by humans. Expect to find other species, different beasts and animals. If you are looking for naughty times, you will find scenes between all the genders.
  • Themes: M/M, M/F, F/F, fantasy creature (lizardman, werewolf, etc)

What are you planning to add?

  • More content obviously. More areas, more enemies, more quests, more scenes.
  • Better quest system.
  • Improving the look of the interface.
  • Graphics for NPCs and creatures you may encounter.

Who are you again?

Beginning writer and coder.

English is not my first language, so I apologies in advance for any mistakes I make.

My route to become a programmer started recently. For now I’m using Ren’Py as it gives me opportunity to focus on the content without thinking much about the whole interface stuff. Yet I already reached a point where the program is actually stopping me from doing things, so there is a chance I will switch to a different method at some point.

I’m trying my best to improve both in programming and writing sides, so expect a lot of changes in the future.

Contact information:

  • Email
  • Twitter
  • FurAffinity

In case you find bugs you can report them in private message on twitter, send them via mail or just post the comment here on itchio.

Credits:

Characters artwork made by Zoroj: Patreon, FurAffinity, Twitter

Background artwork made by Gavel: Twitter, FurAffinity

LUSTYRINTH

Lustyrinth
(c) 2011, 2018 Fenrir Lunaris
Powered by the O.H.R.RPG.C.E.

Having worked as a therapist for several months treating soldiers and families with Post Traumatic Stress Disorder, Lassie is in desperate need of some time off. Her girlfriend suggests a trip to a local business to get a makeover, with promises of relaxation and some time to unwind. But when she awakens to find herself stripped and alone in a dungeon of unrelenting perverts, Lassie must fight her way out and rescue her friends, or find herself the personal toy of a diabolical madman.

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

大調小調完整版 / Major\Minor – Complete Edition

操縱現實的力量
兩個世界之間的鬥爭及其飽受困擾的共存
一場瀕臨革命的政治鬥爭
一連串神祕的謀殺案，奪去家人和朋友的生命
這一切的核心——是您

一波謀殺和自殺浪潮席捲全國，一場比一場神祕。
您扮演“幸運二人”之一，作為比賽的獲勝者，有幸與國際流行偶像一起旅遊。
但是，當您到達東京參加這次世界巡迴演唱會的開幕式時，事件迅速升級。
您別無選擇，只能深入探索危險的領域——所有這些都是以揭開這些神祕死亡的真相為名。
真相涉及與另一個世界的衝突；以及那裡尋求救贖的居民。
您是救世主——您的工作是為世界創造更光明的未來。

特點：

  • 數本小說的長度
  • 30 個可與之互動的角色
  • 透過深度情感系統打造友誼
  • SMS 系統：收/發來自角色的訊息
  • 導致不同經歷的多種選擇
  • 多結局
  • Steam 集換式卡牌
  • 控制器支援
  • Steam 成就
  • Steam Link 和 Steam Overlay 支援

蠻荒獸族

一切都始於那個燃燒著喧囂的盛夏。

第一話　南柯一夢——人情冷漠心灰冷，唯能寄意浮世夢。
第二話　萍水相逢——黯然回首傷流年，但求與君初相見。
第三話　野性蠻荒——背水一戰不眠夜，勇武凶悍蠻荒血。
第四話　塞翁失馬——福禍更迭有天意，生死輪迴無常理。
第五話　生日禮物——夏風吹散心頭苦，落雨滌淨眼中霧。
第六話　樸素誓言——紅塵滾滾盡餘歡，長路漫漫不勝寒。
第七話　同床共枕——酒意微醺情難卻，夜色朦朧心相悅。
第八話　遊園驚魂——善惡取捨爭論起，咫尺天涯恐別離。
第九話　水月鏡花——聚散莫測淚悽楚，分合難料夢荒蕪。
第十話　血脈交融——因愛甘心入虎口，為情寧願舍鄉愁。
番外篇之一　莫離——無法傳達的愛　（13000點歷練解鎖）
番外篇之二　風烈——夜空下的思念　（15000點歷練解鎖）
番外篇之三　蕭凱——南柯夢　　　　（17000點歷練解鎖）
番外篇之四　真相——兩難抉擇　　　（無限制）

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

魔王と呼ばれた子

子供の頃
まどろみの中で母が読んでくれたお話は
いつも正義の味方が活躍していた

平和な田舎町、シェリムで生まれ育った少年、ロキ
最近、よく夢を見る
村が焼け落ち、母が見た事のない化け物に襲われる夢
その夢はやがて現実のものとなり
化け物の群れは村を襲った
母と村の危機に
ロキの想いと呼応するかの様に現れた
黒き剣
それは、歪な運命の始まりだった
これは、僕が運命に抗う物語だ

HTN制作、ケモノRPGゲーム
魔王と呼ばれた子です。

プレイ想定時間は10～15時間程度前後。
動作推奨環境につきましてはRPGツクール公式サイトにてご確認ください。

感想、不具合報告などは公式ホームページからお問い合わせください。
https://reona5112.wixsite.com/mysite

草原 / Meadow

天堂就是名叫《Meadow》的地方！寬廣、生機盎然、現在更是獨特的社交體驗。Might and Delight邀請你到《Meadow》的翠綠田野裡自由作樂，享受這個獨一無二的多人沙盒遊戲。

不像過往的《Shelter》系列作，在《Meadow》的世界中，品味遊戲特點的時間越久，你得到的就越多。擁有《Shelter》相關遊戲或產品會解鎖遊戲中的內容。遼闊的景色也為日後的更新檔與附加內容提供了充裕的探索空間。

與其他動物團結起來，結交舒適圈外的盟友，或選擇獨自探索。無論你的決定為何，開放的原野生活都會是你想沉浸其中的體驗。

主要特點：

  • 在《Shelter》系列作中最大的土地上，操作陸上、水中或空中任何組合的動物。
  • 透過特製的表情、符號與聲音和其他動物溝通。
  • 利用感官尋找和追蹤遊戲中的其他玩家。
  • 到巢穴裡選擇多達9種動物、超過60種膚色，還有90多種表情與符號可以解鎖。
  • 你擁有的《Shelter》遊戲與產品越多，能解鎖的獎勵也越多。
  • Retro Family的全新原創配樂。

《Meadow》中的《Shelter》產品

  • 擁有任何《Shelter》遊戲將可在《Meadow》中扮演該遊戲主角（例如：擁有《Shelter 2》可解鎖山貓）。
  • 擁有所有遊戲（未含配樂或書籍）將讓你獲得扮演《Paws》的可愛小熊的機會。
  • 若擁有任何組合的配樂，即可獲得獨特的聲音能力。
  • 擁有我們的互動式書籍將可解鎖3D表情。
  • 全套《Shelter》遊戲的收藏夾或擁有者，將會解鎖扮演一隻鳥的能力。

喵喵戰爭 / Meow Wars: Card Battle

Meow Wars是一個貓主題的卡牌戰鬥遊戲，具有極易掌握的機制和迷人的手繪人物。一路爭戰，戰勝每個挑戰者，接近 指揮官卡特拉特並從他的鐵腕下解放貓島。每個階段都會向令人信服的貓科動物故事中引入一隻新貓和新的卡牌能力。在PVP對決中挑戰您的朋友，或者測試您對抗全球觀眾的力量。

多玩家

  • 在PVP卡牌戰鬥中挑戰您的朋友！
  • 從8個人物和7個競技場中選擇。
  • 透過對我們的貓機器人人工智慧的訓練來磨練您的技能

故事模式

  • 來自中尉盧娜的廣泛訓練讓您為戰鬥做好準備。
  • 在所有貓的自然棲息地遇到它們，並從貓語嘮叨中獲得娛樂。

特點

  • 遊戲機制簡單易學，即使對於卡牌戰爭遊戲新手也是如此。
  • 11種語言，包括“喵喵”貓嘮叨。即使是您的貓也能玩！😻
  • 8個奇妙的手繪人物栩栩如生。
  • 8個能力卡片提高戰鬥的興奮度，引入策略並新增不可預測性。

Midnight Fireworks

Midnight Fireworks is a Fourth-of-July themed sex game with a cozy summertime atmosphere, an intimate POV perspective, and an optional autoplay feature.

The game originally featured a single pair of male characters, but has expanded to include a variety of swappable tops and bottoms, including female and intersex characters. More characters are still being added to the game with each update, so check back for new content every now and then!

You can get your own character added to the game (as either a top or a bottom) by keeping an eye on my FurAffinity account, where I occasionally hold character auctions. Character template files are not currently available, but I do eventually intend to release the game for modding/customization, and my Patreon supporters will be the first to hear about it!

Minotaur Hotel

#9 on itch.io's Top Rated games!

Minotaur Hotel is a romance visual novel set in a magical hotel. You will become its new manager and meet the keeper - Asterion, the minotaur from the Greek legend, sentenced by the gods to spend eternity there.

In your mandate as Master of the hotel you will be faced with many choices - treating the minotaur humanely or not, dealing with the hotel’s magical workings and entities, and managing a growing cast of fantastical employees. By sending out teams to explore the valley below the hotel you will find ancient artifacts and mementos, which will reveal more about Asterion’s past and the realm’s history.

The way you treat Asterion and manage the hotel will affect the story, leading to a replayable experience where each playthrough reacts to your play style and reveals different parts of the story. The game has over 150.000 words and it will provide you with hours of playtime.

If you find a bug the quickest, safest way to get back to the game is making a new save file. Do keep in mind the game has a Skip feature which allows you to go over previous content in a minute. Should you find a bug or typo which persists regardless of that, please use our Bug & Typo Report Form: https://forms.gle/9pY7r8jBXWi7Z2Wv9.

MONSTER
Monster is a 2D fighting game released in 2005 and 2006 by 8105graphics. It features a diverse cast of human and anthropomorphic animal characters with a variety of unique fighting styles.

Monster features a loose fighting system like other anime fighting games, but with a somewhat slower, more deliberate pace. It also features a Street Fighter Alpha 3 groove-style "shift" system, which allows the player to select one of three different modes to customize gameplay - Monster, Freedom, and Tranquility. Monster reduces attack speed but increases damage for a tankier gameplay style; freedom reduces damage and allows moves to be cancelled into each other for rushdown-oriented play; and tranquility emphasizes defense and improves moves' invincibility properties. When activated, these modes also change other special move properties to allow for further flexibility in gameplay styles.

An arcade sequel was announced in 2008, to be published by Examu. It was quietly cancelled after location tests over a few years.
Notes
This version of the game is a CD released at Comiket. It contains the 1.0 release. The final release was version 1.11B; the included update_mnstprd_111b.exe file will update the game to that version.

(From: https://archive.org/details/monster_8105graphics)

8105graphics
製作
怪物男孩和中咒王國

傳奇系列歸來，開啟全新的壯麗冒險之旅！

原先的Wonder Boy in Monster World系列的設計師Ryuichi Nishizawa參與制作了這款色彩豐富的動作冒險遊戲，好好賞玩吧。

《怪物男孩和中咒王國》從經典系列中借鑑了最好的成果，以有趣的玩法、難忘的音樂和華麗的手繪動畫來呈現一場全新的現代冒險之旅。

金能拯救怪獸世界王國嗎？幫助我們的年輕英雄打敗具有挑戰性的敵人，發現隱藏的位置，升級變強的裝備等！您還能透過獨特的技能打造特殊外形，這些技能用於開闢新道路，一路上威猛頭目和祕密寶藏在等待著您。

特色概述：

  • 六種超讚外形，獨特的戰鬥能力和平臺構建能力，使您的冒險之旅扣人心絃。
  • 使用特殊裝置探索新的道路和祕密：尋找魔法武器和物品，逐漸開闢世界。
  • 15個多小時的傳奇冒險：在一個龐大的互聯環境中探索新的怪獸世界。
  • 手繪動畫：精細的動畫和有趣的面部表情使角色和敵人栩栩如生。
  • 高畫質轟鳴支援：高效能高畫質轟鳴支援讓您感受戰鬥的效果。

漏夏 / 咱的夏天。 / 漏れなつ。

在高考前的最後一個暑假，在城市的主角收到小時候住的村子（水鄉村）裡朋友來信。因為祖父母還住在那裡，主角就決定回老家探望。

主角搭公車回到水鄉村，遇見在巴士站等待他的虎彥，稍晚參加朋友們為他舉辦的歡迎會，介紹九個主要角色之後進入分歧點，在此選擇故事進行的八條路線（其中一條路線包含兩位主要角色）。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Unofficial English version 非官方中文版本 非官方中文版本
漏夏（非公式版） / 咱的夏天。（非公式版） / 漏れなつ。（非公式版）

《咱的夏天。（非正式版）》（虎彥線）是根據《咱的夏天。》V3.5版的劇情重新創作，但尚未經過官方許可。出於這方面的原因，我決定匿名釋出這一版本的遊戲。

關於非正式版的內容

這個版本是做給已經玩過《咱的夏天。》V3.5版的玩家；
非正式版的故事與《咱的夏天。》無關，因此玩家無法進入其他角色的個人線；
儘管遊戲裡沒有好感度的設定和分支選項，但是文字量比起《咱的夏天。》裡其他角色都要更多一些。對於日語母語者來說，大約需要3-4個小時通關；
一部分原版《咱的夏天。》裡虎彥登場的劇本基本保持不變；
非正式版的虎彥線從8月1號到31號，每天都有不同的劇情。因此，你可以更加真實地體驗到主角的暑假生活；
和虎彥一樣取消了個人線的京慈與宗太郎，會更加頻繁地出現在遊戲裡；
儘管許多描寫是來自於原版《咱的夏天。》的老版本和官方部落格，即使你沒認出來，玩起來也不會有太大障礙；
遊戲系統也進行了微調；
我不會發布任何補丁或是更新，非正式版只有這一個版本；
非正式版只提供日語版本，沒有計劃翻譯成其他語言版本；
如果你不能接受非正式版，請不要玩。

非正式版是在其他一些畫師的幫助下完成的，尤其是那些提供了全新圖片素材的畫師。我發自內心感謝他們。我希望非正式版能夠成為玩家認識到原版《咱的夏天。》做得多麼出色的契機。 謝謝你。

匿名獸友的一員

2019年6月20日

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

My Part Time Lover

After receiving a message from your uncle, you make your way to Milton Town. You have been asked to take care of his property for 30 days until he returns.

What will become of your stay?

Download contains My Part Time Lover.zip - Please unzip the folder before playing! Comes with a Wallpaper in the game file.

A dating game made with RPG MAKER MV. For WINDOWS only!

(18+) Please note, this story contains explicit scenes and is for adult only!

Spoiler Alert - For those who want to play easy and casually here's the full guide to each characters route. Please be aware you can only date one character at a time, replay-ability is available after completing a route and saving.

FullGuide: https://www.patreon.com/posts/27542597

Neglected

《Neglected》作為百夢之獸工作室打造的首款furry向解密遊戲，你將扮演可愛的男孩子格倫，與偶遇的兩隻獸人，帕爾和提亞，合力解決自身面臨的危機，一步步脫離險境。

人類和獸人的碰撞，會發生什麼奇怪又好笑的事情呢？

遊戲中你將面臨各種機關，危險的陷阱，昏暗的走廊，以及各種雜亂的環境，一切生機和機會都在這裡。

這是什麼？

Neglected是一款解密類遊戲，解密部分“簡單”而又“輕鬆”。

內容是什麼？

解密為主，包含部分追逐劇情。解密部分一定要仔細觀察四周，動一動腦筋。追逐劇情的話...自己去試試吧~

還有別的嗎？

順帶一提遊戲還包含了一些梗和奇妙的彩蛋哦

遊戲裡的某些線索一定要牢記啊，到後面你絕對會需要的~

家有大貓

護身符裡真的住著守護神，祭祀的表演臺下也有神明觀看？

家裡世代是乩童，但如今只是個普通大學生的林天遼，從沒想過身邊會忽然多出三個貓科獸人神靈。

得到了封印已久的靈力，看到了原本隱形的神明。對此一點都不興奮的林天遼，作為普通人的生活還要繼續。

穿梭在日常與非日常間，他與三隻大貓一起的故事匆匆開始了。 （來自官方網站）

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Nerus

Nerus is a mystery and romance kinetic novel about two souls with intertwined fates.

This tale spans across many eras and places, each one riddled with mystery, suspense and clues to understand the inner workings of this fantastical world. I only ask that you sit down and enjoy the story. But, be wary of that which lurks within the dark.

Our first story follows Shax, a young shapeshifter sent serve a Great Shapeshifter, Neru Magnus, as punishment for his crimes. As their relationship changes and they grow closer, Shax comes to realize something about himself.

Our second story follows Alessia and Bitey, a detective duo that lives in a ruined world, in their efforts to solve a mysterious crime that took place inside an important abbey.

Nerus contains nudity, adult themes and sexually explicit content of homosexual nature between fictional characters. To play this game you must be 18 years old or the applicable age in your country.

Consider following our Twitter page for updates on the game's development. Current cover was drawn by nanoff from the Minotaur Hotel team.

林中之夜 / Night in the Woods

大學輟學的梅·博羅夫斯基回到了搖搖欲墜的小鎮波瑟姆·斯普林斯。這裡曾經是一座礦業小鎮，她想要恢復她以前漫無目的的生活，並和她留下的朋友們重新建立聯絡。但事情不一樣了。現在的家似乎不同了，她的朋友們也長大了、變了。樹葉落了，風也越來越冷了。隨著光線的消退，奇怪的事情發生了。

樹林裡有什麼東西。

《林中之夜》是一款以探索、故事和人物為主題的冒險遊戲，在一個鬱鬱蔥蔥、生機勃勃的世界裡，與幾十個人物見面，做很多要做的事情。透過一次成功的 Kickstarter 眾籌，本遊戲最終由 Infinite Fall 製作完成，這是一個由 Alec Holowka（Aquaria）、Scott Benson（Late Night Work Club）和 Bethany Hockenberry 組成的團隊。

Ninjin: Clash of Carrots
Ninjin: Clash of Carrots is an anime-inspired beat-‘em-up with a gaggle of varied enemies, deep customization…and ninjas! Play through side-scrolling worlds consisting of multiple stages and collect carrots stolen by the evil Shogun Moe! Carrots act as currency which can be redeemed in the Corgi Store for new equipment, or the Shady Shop for special weapons, masks and other customization items. Grab a friend to join you in 2-player online or local co-op.

Be a Ninja.
Play as either Ninjin, the charismatic rabbit, or Akai, the ninja fox, and fight
across a feudal Japan to defeat the evil Shogun Moe and retrieve the carrots he’s stolen!

Engaging Storyline.
Follow a robust Story Mode, meet a diverse cast of characters, and play
through multiple stages in a crazy universe.

Fast and Furious Combat.
Dodge rockets, blast through throngs of incoming enemies and
battle bosses in frenzied, fast-paced action!

Stylish Visuals.
Play through unique environments with anime-inspired HD pixel art graphics.

Deep Customization.
Choose from a huge variety of equipment with more than 150 weapons
and items, including masks, swords, projectiles, and more. Equip your character to better
defeat rivals.

Slash, Smash and Bash with Friends!
Join your friends in 2-player local or online co-op as
you progress through the game’s story.

Oni TV Show.
Compete in a “Live TV Show” survival mode, solo or with a friend, to see who
can get the furthest without dying, as wave after wave of enemies attack from all angles.
Rack up special rewards when you successfully finish each challenging stage!

Carrot Collecting Co-Op Action!

Armory fit for a Ninja!
Featuring over 150 weapons, projectiles, upgrades, and more to modify the experience to each player’s preference, Ninjin: Clash of Carrots is an action-packed thrill-fest with a unique and immersive storyline, stylish environments, and exciting and frenetic gameplay! Ninjin also features a unique survival mode called “Oni TV Show” where players will fight endless waves of enemies for rare rewards. This mode also supports local and online co-op.

海角筆記 / Notes from the Cape

海角筆記 是講述海角灣居民日常生活的中篇視覺小說，海角灣是一個寧靜的海濱小鎮和旅遊勝地。每個人的故事各有不同，有的可愛有的好色，有的真誠有的甜蜜。遊戲內有一些成人內容，包括裸體和性。這是成人限定的系列。

本遊戲包含第一季共十二章內容。劇情發生在 'Willy Bear Beach 1' 和 'Willy Bear Beach 2' 之間。它還包含每個章節的影象包。

  • 由Artdecade開發和繪畫插圖
  • 由Gerrark和Artdecade撰寫劇本
  • 由Super Deluxe Joe和Artdecade編寫程式碼
這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

心之符 / Notes of Hearts

《Notes of Hearts》是一款研發中的PC和Mac平臺遊戲。遊戲核心玩法結合了JRPG和戀愛模擬元素，戰鬥系統則採用3v3團隊回合制的情景戰鬥模式。

遊戲的劇情一共分成6個章節，玩家在劇情裡將時刻做出選擇，而這些選擇將會對劇情的走向產生重要影響。隨著章節的推進，冒險的世界會越來越廣闊，眾多性格鮮明的角色也將陸續登場。

玩家身為遊戲的主人公，在遊戲開始時可以自定義喜歡的性別和種族。本遊戲支援同性戀愛，所以所選的性別並不會對遊戲體驗造成影響！

根據玩家的選擇，多姿多彩的角色們會隨著劇情發展加入到冒險的隊伍之中，不同的角色組合將會帶來不同的遊戲體驗。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。
該遊戲仍在開發過程中

No Vacancy

>> Important: This game ONLY runs on Windows (.exe file) <<

No Vacancy, originally created in July 2014 reached the quantity of +40 characters and +200.000 views on FurAffinity. It has become my biggest project ever. Since my art and animation skills have been improved, it's time to reboot and make this game like a definitive edition.

As people has shown me, they love this game and were very happy when a new updated was released. The problem was the updates were totally dependent of users's commissions and the game couldn't be updated frequently.

Why a reboot?

Since the current version of the game looks a bit old, mixing all my art styles (since it was created until today) and my current work file is a bit chaotic, I've decided to create a new definitive version of the game. The hotel will be more detailed adding new areas. Not only will be new scenes added, each scene will can be updated so each character will can have more than one interaction.

Why should you become a patron?

Your support means this game can be updated. Only you can make possible this game won't die. Being a patron means I'll can work on the game and update it more frequently. Also you can be part of the game suggesting new areas for the hotel, suggesting the creation of new characters or even commission a scene to be into the game.

How to be in the game?

You can add your character in the game like a commission.
Pledge one of the last 2 tiers depending what you want.
Once the payment has been processed, you can go back to a previous tier if you want :o
I'll contact you via Patreon message system.

What happen with older version of the game?

It will be on my FurAffinity profile like a Beta of this definitive version. I have to say thank you to all the users who have commissioned a scene helping me to evolve the game.

Beta preview -> https://www.patreon.com/posts/no-vacancy-beta-23909889

To avoid spam with Patreon posts, you can follow me on Twitter for news: @PalmarianFireAD

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Patreon 官方 Twitter
Oh So Hero!

Oh So Hero is a 2.5D Lewd Metroidvania PC game in development

In Oh So Hero, you play the role of the dragonesque hero Joe to fight and fornicate with enemies, build intimate relationships with anthropomorphic characters, and embark on a sex-filled adventure to stop the mysterious alien invaders that have wreaked havoc on Joe's once-peaceful island.

Oh So Hero! Pre Edition (v0.10) is the very first public demo from developers Full Frontal Frog. You can support development and play new versions of the game--with new characters, features, and sex animations--by becoming a patron on Patreon!

We also have an Oh So Hero! FAQ to provide some information on controls and local save data. We'll be updating this, as well as the in-game information, as development progresses. Ribbit~

大神 絕景版 / 大神 絶景版

甚具和風色彩以華美世界‧日本為舞臺的感人活劇「大神」，將化為高解像度登場。

描繪得生動活潑的影象，可以說完全吻合絕景之名，具氣息之美。

成為大神天照，與具魅力的登場人物們，在一個充滿熱情讓人心動的故事，及這片美麗的大自然上驅馳。

當迎接故事的終焉時，一定令你感動流涕⋯⋯。

本作由原作「大神」的原創畫面和同樣以4:3的遊戲開始、遊戲讀取時出現的迷你遊戲等都會復活。能夠一邊利用高解像度；一邊體驗近似以前遊戲的模式來進行！

預兆景象 權威版 / Omensight: Definitive Edition

從屢獲殊榮的遊戲 —— Stories: The Path of Destinies 的研發團隊手中，再次創造了Omensight，一個嶄新的動作皆謀殺偵探式遊戲。

你是先驅者，只在危機時期才出現的神話戰士。烏拉利亞的土地被戰爭撕裂了。但更糟糕的是：當夜幕降臨時，你將目睹世界被一個黑暗之神毀滅。

你有能力重複末日當天的事故。透過領導調查，與末日有關的角色一起互動，跟他們合作或者作戰，並運用 Omensight 的能力來量新編織新的敘述。

透過你的決定，技能和智慧，你可以改變當天的過程，也許能為更光明的未來鋪路。

遊戲還有 Patricia Summersett（塞爾達傳說：曠野之息）和 Julian Casey（We Happy Few）等頂尖配音演員的參與，以及一組優秀的編劇團隊， 包括 Nadim Boukhira（Stories），Genese Davis（The Holder's Dominion）和 Chris Avellone （異域鎮魂曲：折磨）“ 等成員。

我的泛靈論～地獄篇～ / おれのアニミズム～地獄篇～

神和龍，兩位見習神明。
當他們像往常一樣尋找有趣的東西時，發現了一張傳單。

“招募勇者！打倒魔王的人將會獲得報酬。”

傳單上只有這些內容，但這足以讓心思單純的兩人興奮起來。
為了打倒魔王，他們不假思索地直奔地獄。
等待他們的會是什麼呢？

本作是以地獄為舞臺、神明與惡魔為主角的，類東方縱卷軸彈幕射擊遊戲。

我的泛靈論～天國篇～ / おれのアニミズム～天國篇～

這是一個有著神明與惡魔的不可思議的世界。

某天，大量的紙幣和硬幣從天而降。
這些錢具有強大的魔力。察覺到事態異常兩個神明和兩個惡魔，為了解決這場騷動而前往天界。

本作是以成為億萬富翁為目的、用無與倫比的財力席捲一切的，類東方經濟向縱卷軸彈幕射擊遊戲。

我的泛靈論～黃泉返篇～ 烈火行軍 / おれのアニミズム～黃泉還り篇～ The Marching On Fire

這是一個有著神明與惡魔的不可思議的世界。

用於維持天界氣候的祕寶「原初之火」不知被誰盜偷走了！為了拯救在寒冷中顫慄的天界，一直以來的兩位神明追趕著犯人，進入了冰封的化外之地「冥界」。

本作是以心之烈火燒滅眼前邪神的，類東方感情向縱卷軸彈幕射擊遊戲。

你想看我的野獸嗎？～就用你的雙眼好好看著吧！～ / 俺の獣を見てみるか？ ～しかとその目に刻むッス！～

快速成長中的社交平臺『Online』，主角犬飼春在社交平臺上擔任管理員。
在三連休假期的前一天，突然收到一個熟悉的ID發來的訊息……！
能否「就三天！？」攻略下訊息的傳送者和虎呢！

詳細は以下のリンクからどうぞ！

  • 公式Twitter： https://twitter.com/orekemo

  • サークル公式HP： http://www.cilcafe.com/

  • キャラクター紹介ムービー： https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LBa3P4r5j0U

  • トレーラームービー： https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jZfL6EULQiU

ゲームの詳細

選択肢によって、エンディングが変わるマルチエンドです。 日頃の選択の「積み重ね」が、相手の好感度に影響していきます。 好感度が大きく変化するとキャラクターアイコンの表情が変化します。行き詰ってしまったら、最初から初めてアイコンの表情を參考にコマメにセーブして進めてみましょう。

スタッフ

  • 製作： C.I.L. cafe
  • シナリオ： 氷之白。
  • デザイン・イラスト： kovie
  • 音楽: サークル まずらぼ[muzzle-lab] 様

雄獸島的祕密 / オスケモアイランドの祕密

現代の桃源郷とも言われているオスケモアイランドに来た主人公が、オスケモといちゃいちゃするビジュアルノベルゲームとなっております。

小説『オスケモアイランドの秘密』の後日談となりますが、簡単なおさらいのためのシナリオが含まれているので読んでいなくても遊んでいただけるかと思います。

下記のたくさんの人にご助力いただいて、やっと完成できました。

楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです。

『キャラクターデザイン』

ガドーナ=クリーノ:まなびこさん
仁鰐 交牙:ちささん
青領巾 鮫冷:クロマさん
ベルンヴァト=アンドレ:せいけーさん
魚利 虎落:のこさん
白頭箔 白尾:蠧魚さん

『ロゴ』

森谷さん

Overgrowth

As a lightning-fast acrobatic ninja rabbit, you can choose how to approach each encounter. Do you want to pick off enemies one at a time like the killer in a slasher film? Dive into the thick of it and fight whole groups in a frontal assault? Steal the most powerful weapon you can find, and turn it on the rest?

If you die, there is never any load time; you can try again instantly! As your skills improve, you'll see that the game is not about winning. It's about experimenting to make the coolest action scenes that you can. Every design decision is made with that in mind, from the mouselook camera to the context-sensitive combat controls.

After completing the story modes, you can try out all the mods that players have created with the integrated editor! If you want to play as a human character in a city, or try a whole new campaign, or even fly around as a bat, there's probably already a mod that makes that happen.

製作
Packedrat

Controls (defaults, can be rebinded):

Z - Jump
X - Attack
C - Use sub weapon
V - Toggle sub weapon
Enter - Menu
arrows - Move

NOTICE: Before posting a bug report for broken graphics, check if clearing your cache solves the issue ( control + f5 in the address bar, the page will refresh.) These issues are normally the result of old texture pages being cached by the browser.

Nightly (web player):
http://nightly.packedrat.net/

Stable (windows download, with audio):
http://stable.packedrat.net/Packedrat.zip

Changelog:
http://packedrat.net/~packedra/Changelog.txt

It looks like the author has temporarily suspended the game.

Password

You are Dave, a hyena who just finished his final year of schooling along with a few of his friends. What better way to end the school year than to spend it at an all expenses paid stay at a luxury mansion for a whole month? After all, after this month, everyone's going to be moving away to focus on their chosen paths in life, so this is the last time that everyone's going to be together for a long way.

Will romance flourish in the time spent isolated in a mansion, living the high life? Or is this all an elaborate ploy by someone pulling the strings at the mansion itself that just sees the group as a bunch of playthings for something much more sinister? Expect a story full of questions and mysteries as the friends suffer through tragedy, death, and a looming threat that grows ever closer all while trying to remember the nicer times in their lives before everything may come to an abrupt end.

Characters will die, decisions must be made, and shying away from the consequences of such will only make the journey forward harder. Can you change their fate by using the mysterious vault that seemingly wants a password to open? Is this your one salvation to save everyone?

Feedback Form:

Currently down: Please contact via Discord to submit feedback

熊掌出擊 / Paw Paw Paw

熊掌出擊是一款2D橫向卷軸，把敵人通通打上天的遊戲。你是一名抵抗軍，抵抗國王的暴政，使用你的自己的方式獲得勝利，掃清路上一切的敵人。

特色

  • 單人作戰或本地最多4人合作
  • 角色升級
  • 解鎖組合技
  • 掠奪並裝備新武器
  • 僱傭英雄來作戰
  • 騎著你的坐騎去戰鬥吧

角色

遊戲開始由5名不同的角色可以選擇，隨著遊戲的發展會解鎖更多的角色。每一名角色都有著獨特的能力，屬性，組合技已經武器熟練度，選擇一名角色並開始你的征程吧！

武器

為你的角色解鎖全新強力的武器！每一把武器都有著自己的屬性及特性，掠奪武器並擊敗Boss和敵人，或者你也可以從流浪商人那裡買到趁手的武器。

哨所

你可以在關卡之間拜訪哨所，進行休整併為下一關做準備，在這裡你可以升級角色，武裝全新的武器並補充補給，購買不同的物品並招募英雄。

爪印 / Paws

在《paws》裡你將扮演一隻走失的小山貓，穿越廣闊而險峻的地形，抵禦沿途而來的捕食者的威脅，尋找回家之路。在《Shelter 2》的擴充套件世界裡開始一段獨立冒險之旅吧！

黑暗和塵垢，彎彎曲曲穿過藤曼，
用策略和辛苦躲過危險。
沒有力量，沒有智慧，
找到回到熟悉土地上家的路。

本遊戲結合了備受喜愛的《Shelter》系列的所有獨特元素，為大家呈現一個關於迷失、友誼、與尋找失去的愛的故事。

主要特色：

  • 奇幻場景中扣人心絃的線性體驗。
  • 第一次在《Shelter》的世界裡扮演一隻山貓幼崽，在同伴的幫助下克服這個世界的所有難題與阻礙。
  • 包括使用感知能力來跟隨足跡在內的新的遊戲玩法。
  • 以平臺遊戲機製為核心，探索世界的全新角落。
  • Retro Family 製作的全新原創音樂。

Paws & Steel

You wake up one day to find yourself in an unknown world, surrounded by strange creatures known as "Beastmens."

Haunted by your past, you try to live life as best you can in the new world but trouble seems to follow you wherever you go.

As the player, you will guide the protagonist through a series of events.

Will you be able to find your way home again?

Paws & Steel is a visual novel.

It is a story which consist of 45,000+ words, with several endings and multiple routes to choose as you guide the protagonist through the unknown world. The story also contains three special images and one special ending to be unlocked.

(18+) Please note, this story contains explicit scenes and is for adult only!

Pervader

Pervader is a plot-heavy kinetic visual novel set on an island-continent which has its own history, myths and secrets. You play the role of Reamus, a young cougar who is thrust into a world of magic, politicking and sinister plots. The main character is joined by two companions whom you can get to know (very) intimately as you travel the world in search of a cure for a strange magical affliction which plagues you.

Background

This project is a first for me, and a big undertaking. Pervader has been bouncing in my mind for a few years now. Throughout this time it has undergone several minor, major and complete revisions. At one point it was supposed to be a comic, but the story has grown into a beast with many moving parts which requires a lot of text. Now I feel confident that I can carry this project further into something which other people can experience and enjoy as a (mostly) linear visual novel.

Project

As this is a one man team effort where I produce, design, draw, write, script and edit (music gets the royalty free treatment for now), there will likely be many stumbles along the way. Please be patient with me as I learn through managing this project.

During these first few months all releases will be made public as they are ready, just so we can hit the ground running. In the future, backers will receive 1-month early access to builds during which time I can further refine the update for the public release.

In addition to all this, backers will receive devlogs and work-in-progress teasers and snippets as they are being developed. Your feedback during this time is appreciated.

If you would like to support this project, please become a patron: https://www.patreon.com/pervader

Thank you and enjoy!

Polidog Patrol / ポリドッグパトロール

The latest work from the team Untendo that created the Benki Wars. It is a full-fledged action game that was completed after two and a half years of development.

Game Description

The game is a side-view action RPG in which you control a rookie cop, Shibakuro, and solve a variety of cases. Battles take place seamlessly as you explore a vast field and fight against an evil organization with senior police officers.

Play time

About 20 hours (varies depending on the style of play)

Trial Version

As this game is very heavy, we have attached a load test version of the game in the trial version section. It is possible to actually operate the game, so it can also function as a trial version. Please use it before purchasing.

(Translated from Japanese)

綠洲計劃

“這扇門的背後，是終點，還是新的開始？”

《綠洲計劃》具有特別設計的視窗反饋，視窗資訊會與玩家不定時進行互動，敬請留意。

互動向毛茸茸解謎遊戲，引導主人公艾斯穿越充滿危機的綠洲庇護所，在最後的大門背後，到底是什麼？

尋找三塊光之石，合成綠洲之鑰，解開籠罩在綠洲上方的Arkash詛咒。

打破常規的追逐戰，護盾系統允許更多的失誤，上手友好。

多達10個祝福（持續增加中），讓你成為解謎帶師,部分操作簡化為文字描述，免受跑圖之苦。

你既可以選擇輕鬆愉悅的標準模式，也可以在二週目選擇難度炸裂的Arkash模式。

跨存檔的人物記憶,使得你們的旅途不再單調無聊。

特色功能：

  • 最佳化的光源系統，場景更有代入感。
  • 精心設計的小彩蛋，Woops！
  • 成就係統接入完成，來挑戰全成就吧！
  • 環環相扣的故事，禁止套娃！
  • 更多CG正在製作中，敬請期待！

ProtoCorgi

Retro style pixel art, horizontal shoot 'em up, arcade gameplay and the cutest little cyber hero you will ever meet.

Play as Bullet, a C³ class (Cute Cyber Corgi) cybernetic dog in his quest for saving his owner, a brilliant scientist kidnaped by a strange alien race that wants to rule the galaxy.

Fly through time and space searching for your master. Defeat strange and exotic alien creatures, power up your gear to wreak havoc along your way and eat all the space fruit you can to get the highest score! (yes, space fruit, the best way to score points in the known universe!) .The dangers of space will not stop you in this action-packed, beautifully pixelated game. Will you be able to save your owner in time?

Sometimes, our fate is just a few barks away.

With tight controls, smooth gameplay and exciting mechanics, ProtoCorgi aims to converge the best of the classics and the newest of the shoot 'em up genre into one solid piece.

Highlights and Features:

  • Fully animated beautiful pixel art.
  • Tight controls and solid gameplay.
  • Five stages planned for development, each with own unique bosses and themes.
  • Available for PC at launch, consoles later.
  • More surprises.

Psychic Connections

(PC) is a romance visual novel set in the fictional college town of Elmwood. Upon arrival, you will be inducted into a secret support group for the local psychics in this supernatural slice-of-life.

As a member of the support group you will face several choices in your day to day life as you balance college with keeping your newfound friends' abnormalities a secret.

Meet the cast and entangle yourself further with one of our four eligible bachelors as you learn more about their troubled lives as psychics. You'll have the chance to help them cope with the issues their "gifts" bring — by doing so, you may even find yourself forming a deeper connection.

PC's fantastic sprite art is by the artist Shiuk, who you can find on his twitter.

You can also follow the progress of the game via my profile or occasionally on the game's twitter page.

If you would like to get access to builds a week early, view additional dev logs, as well as support the continuation of our project, check out our Patreon - HERE!

If you have any questions, feel free to ask, and we'll answer if we can. We'll be happy to read any reviews/thoughts you have on Psychic Connections as well.

Purrfect Apawcalypse: Love at Furst Bite
Olive the mutt finds themself trapped in Hachiko High School during the apocalypse! Demons have been slaughtering their classmates and they're certain it's inevitable that they too will meet their untimely end... Which means there's only so many dogs left to spend their last moments with!
Join Olive in their grisly search for a special someone! Will it be Brownie the snack-loving corgi, Sparky the sporty husky or Patches the dalmatian bookworm? It's all up to you!
This game contains cartoon gore, bifurcated dogs, headless dogs, generally dogs not having a great time! Play at your own discretion!
Purrfect Apawcalypse is a dark comedy interactive fiction about dogs, cats and the apocalypse. The places you go, characters you meet and choices you make will lead you either to death or happiness, so choose wisely!

Rack

Rack is a science-themed bondage game where you can perform sexual tests and experiments using a variety of toys and gadgets. As you play the game, you'll unlock new features, lab settings, and test subjects to play with.

The game features a massive variety of test subjects of all genders and species, including human characters. It also supports custom character importing, which means there are lots of user-created characters available.

You can get your own character added to the game by keeping an eye on my FurAffinity account, where I occasionally hold character auctions. If you're artistically inclined and have access to Flash Pro CS6 or higher, you can also make your own character using the template files, which are available to the public completely free-of-charge.

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

fek
製作 藝術家 程式
Rack2: Furry Science

Rack 2 is a bondage-themed adult video game featuring predominately furry / anthropomorphic characters. You play the role of a scientist at Rack Laboratories, where you conduct sexual experiments for research and profit!

Gameplay

Rack 2's core gameplay is similar in nature to Rack 1. You will be presented with characters in science-themed bondage scenarios, and given a number of toys and gadgets to interact with them. Unlike Rack 1, Rack 2 will feature several different bondage poses and machines, and it will allow you to control a heavily-customizable scientist character, so you can pleasure your subjects personally in a fashion similar to Bedplay.

Because Rack 2 is being developed in 3D, you will have full control of the camera and viewing angles, including a first-person interaction mode and the ability to set up cameras throughout the testing environment for alternate views in real time. Like Midnight Fireworks and Bedplay, Rack 2 will have a method to automate your actions, while your hands are busy doing other things.

Progression Mechanics

Like Rack 1, your laboratory in Rack 2 will begin with only the basics. As you play the game, you will gather specimen from your test subjects, which can be processed into chemicals and used to research new technology and equipment. After you've unlocked new technology, you'll purchase it using the proceeds from your scientific research, sex toy manufacturing, and pharmaceutical business. You can also earn additional revenue from clients who come to the lab seeking very specific sexual experiences. The happier you make them, the better they'll pay!

And for those who prefer to enjoy the game without having to deal with unlocking technology, a Free Play mode will give you control over a fully-stocked laboratory and an unlimited budget. Rack 2 is, first and foremost, a porn game, and I know that sometimes you just want to get straight to the good stuff.

Toys and Tools

Rack 2 will feature the same types of sex toys and gadgets you encountered in Rack 1, including sciencey favorites like the portal devices, size modification tools, orgasm denial rings/paints, estim equipment, and fucking machines. It will also introduce several new toys catering to a number of new fetishes, along with the ability to own and use multiple instances of the same toy.

Character Customization

In addition to custom character support, Rack 2 also features a built-in character creation system that takes advantage of highly modular and highly flexible character elements. The game is built to handle a wide spectrum of character species, shapes, and sizes, and as the game is developed, the diversity of characters you'll encounter throughout the game will expand.

I want people to be able to create their own characters inside of the game, instead of commissioning me to make their character and add it to the game, like I did for Rack 1. I prefer spending my time working on new features and bugfixes, rather than making custom characters, and I know that's what my Patreon supporters would rather I spend my time on, too.

Rack 2 will allow you to customize:

  • Your character's sex organs, including support for animal-styled genitals and nonbinary sexes like hermaphrodites, andromorphic females ("dgirls"), and gynomorphic males ("cboys") Your character's size, physique, and masculinity/femininity, independent of their gender / sex organs
  • Your character's species, including individual control over head, hands, feet, tail, and wings, allowing for several degrees of hybridization
  • Your character's colors, patterns, and hair/fur styles
  • Your character's sexual preferences and personality traits

In addition to your own playable character, the character generator will also be used to populate your clientele list with randomly generated characters. You will also be able to design lab assistants to help you carry out your scientific duties, and bioengineered test subjects who happily exist for the sole purpose of extended research.

Fetishes

Rack's gameplay revolves around bondage, sex toys, and fetishy science equipment. All of the fetishes that were found in Rack 1 will be present in Rack 2, along with several other commonly-requested fetishes, like heavier BDSM (whips, canes, spanking), paw play, sounding, milking/feeding, and bulging.

In order to make sure nobody has unwanted fetishes shoved down their throat, all non-essential fetishes will be optional. Regardless of what fetishes do get added to the game, you will always be able to choose which fetishes (as well as character types/genders) you do and don't want to see in the game, and your progress will never be restricted because of a fetish or gender you've disabled.

Laboratory Customization

Rack 2 will allow you to design your laboratory as you see fit. Machines, bondage equipment, and research stations can be placed anywhere in the laboratory, and you'll be able to light, decorate, and configure certain areas of the lab separately for a variety of different testing environments. Exotic test environments such as low-gravity and underwater will return in Rack 2. Lab configurations can be saved, loaded, and shared.

In addition to testing rooms, where you'll perform most of your erotic experiments, you will also build up a state-of-the-art research and manufacturing facility, where you will unlock and produce toys, tools, chemicals, bondage equipment, accessories, and other scientific wonders. These goods can then be used in your experiments, or sold for profit.

Chemical Research

One of the core progression mechanics of Rack 2 is a new chemical research system. After you've collected specimen from your test subjects, you will be able to process it into six different chemicals. The type of chemical you earn is determined by how you're interacting with the subject. For instance, when a test subject is exposed to new and unfamiliar toys/fetishes, you will harvest a higher amount of felinium, or you can edge them over a very long session to earn a higher yield of equimine.

Using these chemicals, you will unlock chemical compounds that can be delivered to your test subjects via direct dosage or exposure to sex toys and accessories that have been treated with the chemical. These compounds allow you to control almost every aspect of a test subject's appearance and behavior, like their physical features, their sexual preferences and fetishes, their personality and emotional traits, and their body's sexual functions.

Compounds may initially come with side effects that you'll need to isolate and refine away. Once you've perfected a chemical, you'll be able to merge its effects with other chemicals to create custom drugs, which can then be used in the lab or sold for profit.

Custom Content / Modding

Like Rack 1, Rack 2 will allow you to load custom characters from anywhere, as long as they have been properly rigged and formatted to work with the game. Custom character artwork for Rack 2 can be created using Blender, which is completely free. I am doing all character modeling, rigging, and texture painting with Blender, and will release tutorials/explanations on the process once the game is closer to release. Character preferences and body type specifications can be edited using the game's built-in character customization tools or the text editor of your choice. Anyone supporting the game on Patreon at the $10 tier and up will also receive source files for characters I've created, which can be used as a starting point for new characters.

In addition to characters, I also intend to make static laboratory equipment, decorations, and several toys importable - especially dildos, fleshlights, and clothing.

A copy of Unity (Personal Edition) will be required in order to package up any custom assets you create. The Personal Edition is 100% free, it requires very little setup, and bundling your assets takes only a minute or two. A tutorial will be posted explaining how to install Unity and use it to package up your custom assets once the game is closer to release.

製作 藝術家 程式
Regal Tails

Regal Tails is an epic tale of a mothers conquest to end a war that stole her family from her. Set in a fantasy world of knights and furries, you get to lay the ground works of the tale of Naja; the fierce lioness war chieftain.

Breaking away from conventional visual novel formats where you takes back seat of a nameless character, here you will take the role as director of the narrative. Guide several characters down your own path. Every decision will ultimately alter the final outcome to the grand design!

Can you help snag victory for Naja or will you doom her to a fate most unpleasant?

SiriusLeeLost has forged together an astonishing team of people for this project: Kabrion (Artist), TheEmberFox (composer) pair up to bring you this passion project to life!

How free range do you have within the story?

Regal Tails dives into a fantasy world where YOU are the narrator! Although the story centers around Naja you will gain the option of seeing the perspective of several characters within the war.

How you play them will alter the war!

NSFW? Yes! Content will include blood, violence, and sexual interactions. For public access stores, such as Steam, certain scenes will be mild down. We will, however, have several scenes for various characters in the story for a separate download; if desired. The main orientations will be straight, but we are flexible to change things up if the demands are called from patrons!

Expect more in the updates to come!

Until then, feel free to follow us on: - Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/RegalTails - Twitter - https://twitter.com/RegalTails - FA - https://www.furaffinity.net/user/regaltails/ - Artist/Programmer - Kabrion - Sound - TheEmberFox - Author - SiriusLeeLost - Editor - Desirnee

Editor Notes: Game is in alpha. Many concepts, designs, and dialog can and will change upon development. Any feedback into the project is highly welcome! :)

Repeat

Repeat 是一部非線性浪漫視覺小說，講述您在普通城市的一所相當普通的學校發生的故事。但是，超自然的力量和奇異的個體潛伏在每個角落。您能夠發現他們的祕密嗎？還是他們首先不可避免地傷害您？

當前遊戲中有 3 個可約會的角色，每個角色都有其自身複雜的背景故事和難以解開的謎團。全部路線都都正在製作，Sissel 的路線最接近完成。儘管狀態為“進行中”，但 Repeat 視覺小說目前包含100多個插圖場景！

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

製作 劇本 藝術家 程式
以太之戰 / Rivals of Aether

Overview

RIVALS OF AETHER is an indie fighting game set in a world where warring civilizations summon the power of Fire, Water, Air, and Earth. Choose a Rival to bring into the battlefield and manipulate the powers of the classical elements and animal movement. Praised for its competitive gameplay and intensive training tools, Rivals of Aether is the perfect entry to the Platform Fighter genre.

Game Features

Choose VERSUS MODE to duke it out in competitive 1v1 or 2v2 fights, or jump into a free-for-all.

Play STORY MODE to learn the backstory behind each rival and begin to uncover the hidden mysteries of Aether.

Dive into ABYSS MODE to see how many waves of shadowy fighters you can defeat and reach the leaderboards alone or with a friend. Customize your Abyss Mode builds and challenge your friends in ABYSS VERSUS .

Take your skills online in ONLINE VERSUS ! Play against your friends or test your skills in RANKED MODE to climb the leaderboard.

Study TUTORIAL MODE to hone your skills from beginner to advanced lessons. Or boot up PRACTICE MODE to get your hands on all the frame data and hitbox visualizations.

Rivals

Zetterburn, a son of the ruling family of the Firelands, is an experienced and hardened warrior. In battle, Zetterburn uses no weapons except for his razor-sharp claws and ability to control flame.

BURN DAMAGE - Zetterburn's special attacks can set opponents on fire, causing them additional damage over time.

WILD FIRE - Zetterburn's Down Special places flames on the stage. These flames stay for a period of time, burning any opponents who come in contact with them.

FIRE AMP - When an opponent is burning, Zetterburn's Strong Attacks can absorb the flames and launch the burned enemy twice as far, making for an effective killing blow.

Orcane is a playful trickster, notorious for escaping even the most precarious of situations. He can transform into water and confuse enemies with a spray of bubbles.

PUDDLE TELEPORTATION - Orcane creates a puddle with his Neutral Special or Down Special. He can then teleport to his puddle using his Up Special as a powerful vertical blow or an effective recovery when launched off the stage.

BUBBLE EVAPORATION - Orcane can turn his puddle into a pillar of bubbles with his Down Special to trap enemies above the puddle.

WATER AMP - When standing on top of his puddle, Orcane can consume the water underneath him to perform powerful Strong Attacks with far greater range and knockback.

The youngest trainee in the history of the Air Academy, Wrastor has never lived by anyone's rules but his own. Currently an Aerial Ace for the Air Armada, Wrastor is wrecking havoc among the Armada's enemies and generals alike.

WINGED FLIGHT - Wrastor can jump 4 times, making him incredible at controlling the air and recovering from the toughest falls even when things look grim.

WIND CURRENT - Wrastor can create a Wind Current with his Forward Special, allowing him to move faster within it and chase his targets more effectively.

AERIAL ACE - Wrastor performs his charged Strong Attacks in the air instead of on the ground, a first for this genre.

Kragg is a defender of the colossal Aetherian Forest. Deliberate and loyal, he is one of the infamous Wall Runners who patrol the Rock Wall. Unlike other Wall Runners, Kragg has the legendary ability to control the earth with his will.

ROCK HURL - Kragg can pull a rock out of the ground and hurl it at opponents. After it leaves his hands, the rock becomes a solid piece of stage that either Kragg or other players can break.

DEFENSE BALL - Kragg can curl into a ball and roll toward enemies. Although he can be damaged while in ball form, he cannot be knocked away.

EARTH PILLAR - Kragg can summon a pillar of earth to his feet regardless of where he is. If Kragg is about to fall to his death, this move can quickly turn his situation around.

Forsburn is the disgraced, eldest son of the Firelands' ruling family. After being condemned by the Fire Council and his own brother, Forsburn found refuge in a group of outsiders who had rejected the flame and mastered the way of smoke.

SMOKE SCREEN - Forsburn can use his Neutral Special to obscure the battlefield allowing Forsburn to remain hidden inside a cloud of smoke.

DECOY - Through his Forward Special, Forsburn can create a smoke facsimile of himself that can attack opponents. The illusory Forsburn breaks into smoke after being hit by a single attack.

CONSUME/COMBUST - By using his Down Special, Forsburn can consume his smoke clouds back into his body. After consuming three clouds, Forsburn is charged up and can use Down Special again to combust: knocking opponents away at high speed.

Maypul is the self-appointed Guardian of the Aetherian Forest. She commands fearful respect throughout the forest for her unhesitating vigilantism. She uses her agility to trap any unknown intruders before they even realize she is there.

WATCHER'S MARK - Maypul can use her Seeds or her Watcher's Dash to mark opponents, making them susceptible to her following attacks.

WRAPPED UP - After marking her targets, Maypul can use her Strong Attacks or her trusty Plant to wrap marked opponents in place allowing her to follow up with another attack.

SLING SHOT - Maypul can use her vines to sling toward marked opponents, allowing her to elude attacks and quickly close distances.

Absa is a famed engineer and martialist of the Elders of the Air Alliance. Despite the laws of the Elders, Absa secretly developed storm techniques in the caves of the Archai mountains.

CLOUD CONTROL - Absa can place a cloud using her Neutral or Forward Special. This cloud hangs in the air until Absa bursts it by tapping her Neutral Special and knocking enemies away.

THUNDER BOLT - Absa can charge her Neutral Special to create a powerful lightning blast that connects her to her cloud. All opponents caught between the two will be knocked away at high speeds.

CONDENSED STORM - Absa focuses the power of a lightning bolt to the tip of her hoof. If she can line up one of her aerial kicks perfectly, she unleashes great power.

Etalus is a legendary warrior in his native land. He is one of the last surviving members of the Harbor Guard and uses the power of ice to augment his massive strength.

HOME ICE ADVANTAGE: Etalus can use his Forward Special or Forward Tilt to freeze the ground beneath him in order to slide across on the icy surface.

ARMORED UP: When standing on ice, Etalus can use his Neutral Special to absorb the ice and create ice armor around his body.

AVALANCHE: Etalus can use his Down Special to shatter all nearby ice, instantly freezing any enemies who are standing on it.

羅曼聖誕探案集

羅曼聖誕探案集是一款讓推理迷在重溫經典的暴風雪山莊模式的同時，又不失新意的核心向本格推理遊戲。（而且角色都是獸人！）

QQ群：599175499

如果遇到卡頓，請嘗試關閉防毒軟體、檢查檔案完整性、關閉錄屏軟體、並在遊戲主選單“Language”選項內修改渲染方式。

臨近聖誕節，十三名旅客因為一場暴雪，在一間郊區的小旅館暫避。狹小的旅館裡，十三人之間的新仇舊恨一點點被激發。接連發生的案件讓旅客人人自危，作為偵探，你只有幫助旅館老闆解決這些案件，才能繼續安然度過這個聖誕節……

遊戲中一共有五個原創推理謎題，不僅可以作為單獨案件，而且案件之間都有微妙的聯絡。

太陽底下無新事，但是在太陽之國堊坡利恩 卻不同。這個有著許多種族獸人的國度與人類世界有諸多不同，而酒館正是風俗習慣的聚集地。在沒有凶殺案的閒暇時光裡，酒館也不缺乏娛樂活動！在酒館裡，你甚至可以擲飛鏢、猜花色。總之和旅客們多多交流，瞭解這個獸人世界的風俗吧。

隨著你的每個選擇，你的未來會被導向不同的境遇。如果擁有回溯時間的能力，也許能讓大家愉快地度過一個聖誕假日？

遊戲中有多種輔助推理系統，以幫助玩家解決這些謎題。

不管是人類還是獸人，偵探的推理都是建立在證物上的！在開始推理前，請務必認真搜尋酒館裡的每個角落，認真詢問每個人。

作為一名狼人偵探，羅曼有自己的種族天賦——嗅覺。我們沒有錢做那種能讓玩家嗅到現場氣息的外設，所以我們建議各位玩家買塊肉，在嗅探環節拿出來聞一聞——其實我們有其他解決方法。我們將氣味與顏色一一對應，把狼人靈敏的嗅覺視覺化，好讓玩家能感受到，並利用“嗅覺”來破案。

有時一樣證物裡有多個可疑的地方，利用塔羅牌，玩家可以一目瞭然地發現證物中可疑的地方，並作出選擇。

輪盤包含了一個案件的四要素——動機、手法、凶器和嫌疑人，依次完成輪盤的各個部分，就能接近真相！

作案的手法總是詭奇複雜，按照時間順序把發生過的事情排一排，能讓玩家理清思路。

從收集到的證物中，找到與對方證言矛盾的那個，然後帥氣地甩到他臉上！（現實生活請勿模仿）

遊戲的高潮！隨著精美的連環畫和偵探一起，完全探清案件的一切，並在途中作出選擇，補全案件的面貌。

本遊戲含輕微血腥內容（我也沒辦法去掉畢竟這是個天殺的偵探遊戲）

防止搜尋失誤：聖誕羅曼探案集、聖誕羅曼、羅曼聖誕、羅曼探案集、聖誕探案集、小動物聖誕探案集

Root
歡迎遊玩廣受歡迎的桌面遊戲的電子改編版本。《茂林源記》是一個冒險和戰爭遊戲，2-4名玩家在一片廣闊荒野中為爭奪控制權而作戰。
狡詐的貓咪貴族佔據了森林之國，想要開發這裡的富饒資源。在他們的統治之下，集合了很多森林生物。這個陣營尋求積累資源和擴張貓咪的統治。這個陣營可能會尋求神祕遊俠的幫助，後者可以在危險的森林中自由移動。儘管有些人可能會同情這個陣營的理念和夢想，也有一些年長的遊俠還曾記得曾經統治森林的飛鷹帝國。
如今淪落到在地圖偏遠地帶的飛鷹帝國，仍然驕傲，但內部爭吵不斷。他們最近找到了一個新的指揮官，希望能在他的領導下奪回這個種族與生俱來的權力。
這裡已經成為了戰爭的舞臺，森林的命運將會因此而被決定。玩家們將會決定最終由哪個種族統治森林。

"森林最新的征服者，貓咪貴族想要透過工業生產和運輸來統治這篇荒野。他們透過收集木材來建設工坊、鋸木廠和徵兵所，從而獲取勝利分數。貓咪貴族有茂林法則中最龐大的軍隊，但數量並不一定能幫你守住天下……

貓咪貴族想要把這裡變成一個工業與軍事結合的霸權國家。每當貴族們建造一個建築，包括工坊、鋸木廠和徵兵所時，他們就能獲得分數。但是，為了能持續這項工程，貴族需要大量的木材，並保證供應鏈不被切斷。儘管透過人海戰術征服你的對手很具有誘惑力，但這會讓你有很大的風險導致供應鏈鋪的太開而導致難以維持生產。

"在貓咪們到來之前，飛鷹王朝曾經統治這片森林。他們必須在陷入內戰之前，重新奪回控制權，征服更多的領地和建設更多的鳥巢。飛鷹們十分驕傲，他們嚴格遵守領袖所頒佈的法令。每個領袖會有不同的專長和優勢。在合適的時機選擇正確的領袖可以讓你走向勝利，錯誤的領袖則會讓你征服森林的夢想破滅。

在夜晚之時，飛鷹可以根據建造的鳥巢數量來獲得分數。建造的鳥巢越多，得分越高。但是，飛鷹王朝有著嚴苛的法令，由他們的領袖頒發。每一回閤中，他們都會頒佈更多的法令，而且如果有法令無法完成，就會造成社會動亂。

無論是新國王還是舊君主，林森聯盟都不喜歡。貓咪貴族或者飛鷹王朝，對於他們而言都是一個樣。他們相信只有人民才能統治人民！森林聯盟是游擊戰的好手，他們開局的發展可能比較緩慢，但遊戲後期會非常強大——當然你要能在其他爭奪森林統治權的陣營之間堅持到後期才行。

森林聯盟致力於取得居民們的民意。每當聯盟放置民意指示物時，就可以獲得分數。他們傳播越多民意指示物，就能得到更多分數。傳播民意需要支持者們的協助，支持者可以幫助他們發動起義，並建立新的基地，這讓他們訓練更多的長官，增強聯盟的軍事靈活性。

神祕遊俠對於一些人而言是冒險家，對於另一些人而言則是商人、竊賊，或者惡棍。作為遊俠，你將會越過領地的限制，探索整片地圖，進入茂密的叢林尋找道具和遺蹟。你可以與正在交戰的陣營做交易來幫助其中一方，這樣可以完成你自己的祕密任務。

神祕遊俠不屬於衝突中的任何一個陣營，他們有自己的任務，在森林中建立自己的名聲。遊俠可以透過加強與其他陣營的關係，或是攻擊敵對陣營來獲得分數。你也可以透過任務來獲取分數。為了高效的行動，遊俠必須充分利用道具，你可以透過探索遺蹟或者協助其他陣營來獲得更多道具。

Dire Wolf
製作
Run, Kitty!

Available languages: English and Russian

MacOS Launch Instruction: https://yadi.sk/d/Ouvwf5KdW39qkQ

Once upon a cat named Simon, who decided to skip classes at the university, alone with nature - in other words, take a walk through the forest. Knowing this forest like the back of his hand, he never expected that he would be able to get lost there... Yes, and even find himself pursued by an unknown predator, in the forest, where they have never lived...

Can he get out of the forest on his own?..

Notice: it's a demo version of game. Full version of game with 18+ scenes will be available on itch.io and Patreon after collecting funds for development. Thank you so much!

Social Media: VK | Twitter | Facebook | Discord | Patreon

Rusty punk

Embark on a dangerous adventure, overcome all the difficulties of survival in the post-apocalypse world. Create your own unique character and make friends.

And try not to die in a world full of danger!

Project director: Hroft32

Thanks forthe help in creating the project: VELIAL1987

This is a demo version of the game. Updates are scheduled once a month. English is not my native language, so don't judge strictly, this is just the first version. We will definitely correct all errors.

Attention! Game rating 18+, contains adult (M/M) content

Join a sandy world soaked through with caked blood, and all this against the backdrop of fame and adventure!

Hroft32
製作
Salad Fields

Salad Fields is a DREAMYQUEER experience.

In this adventure-puzzle game you explore surreal lands and meet strange folks...

Folks include:

  • Yippie the gay leather-mouse who bakes doughnuts using vegetables
  • Kizzy the computer who fears Y2K
  • Myrtyl the anti-cop queer skater punk
  • Fancy Andy the ampersand-shaped butler and wannabe beekeeper
  • 3 "dudebirds" (dudebro + bird)

Two gameplay modes for flexible playstyles:

  • "Puzzle mode" provides challenge
  • "Exploration mode" lets you walk right through the puzzles, making the game's various bizarre worlds accessible to anyone (...anyone weird enough to play this game)

informercial voice But how big is this game, you ask?! It's pretty goshdarn big. :O

  • Over 100 (ONE HUNDRED) puzzles!
  • 30 music tracks, or over an hour of music!
  • A whole bunch'a locations and characters and things!

The devs:

Resni is the creator of the unofficial cult-classic "Mibibli's Quest", and jars received their MFA and likes puzzles.

We are also queer furries and a couple. Salad Fields might seem very silly (and it is) but we feel it reflects our truths as strange misfits in various ways. We hope that you find something in it you resonate with. :3
