Santa Lucia

WELCOME TO SANTA LUCIA

In “Santa Lucia”, you take on the role of a young cat named Ben in his first semester at the University of Santa Lucia. As a child, Ben was prone to crippling headaches and blackouts. One night in his first year of high school, these pains culminated in a terrifying nightmare, which marked the beginning of recurring night terrors which have plagued his life ever since then.

Still, Ben manages to maintain an optimistic view of life, looking forward to the change of pace university has to offer. As you experience Ben's first semester, you'll encounter a wide cast of colorful characters, several of whom you'll be able to pursue a romantic relationship with. However, some nights Ben still has those headaches which caused him so much grief growing up. Will you be able to live your first semester of university to the fullest, or will the pains eventually overwhelm you?

WHAT IS THIS PROJECT?

Santa Lucia is an adult-oriented visual novel being developed by a branch team of Stormsinger Studios. This game has been DzahnDragon’s baby for years and is what he initially set out to build experience for with the Morenatsu Revisited project. Dzahn and Devilizer aim to create an engrossing drama about a young man’s first experience with college life, hopefully bringing back nostalgic memories for readers who have gone through something similar.

This visual novel is intended for adults only and will feature graphic depictions of homosexual relationships. There are also depictions of violence and trauma that readers may find disturbing.

Please exercise discretion and be 18 years or older before downloading the demo!

========================================

MEET THE CAST

The protagonist, Ben is an incoming freshman at the University of Santa Lucia. Sociable but easy to embarrass, Ben is the kind to stick his neck out for those he considers friends.

THE MENTORS

Chris and Russell are the upperclassmen who individually take on mentorship roles for Ben. Chris is Ben’s university-appointed “Student Mentor”, guiding him through the first semester with advice and support, while Russell is the cool dude who happens to take a liking to our “fish out of water” cat.

THE LOVE INTERESTS

Your classmates in the same mentorship group under Chris. These are the three characters Ben has the opportunity to pursue a relationship with over the course of the game. Bryan is an up and coming football star, while Nate has his sights set on someday being on Broadway. Carlos is the kind who keeps his head down, working hard to eventually become a lawyer.

THE FRIENDS

Karina is one of your old friends from elementary school who by chance happens to be attending the same university as you after not seeing each other for years. Your friendship continues almost as if it never ended.

Zach is your roommate for Freshman year. Be careful, he’s very shy and extremely introverted! Hopefully Ben’s able to connect with him, otherwise it’s going to be a long semester…

========================================

WHAT IS OUR UPDATE SCHEDULE?

New builds of Santa Lucia will be uploaded to itch.io approximately one month after they've been available to our supporters on Patreon. To keep up with the latest news and exclusive content, consider supporting the project on Patreon!

CONTACT US!

Stormsinger Studios

  • stormsingerstudios@gmail.com
  • https://stormsingerstudios.itch.io/
  • https://www.furaffinity.net/user/dzahndragon/
  • https://twitter.com/stormsingerdev

DzahnDragon

  • https://twitter.com/ZanderWolfie
  • https://www.furaffinity.net/user/zanderwolfie/
  • https://www.twitch.tv/dzahndragon
  • https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHwk40OW_bVzPqP6GBTU1qQ

Devilizer

  • https://twitter.com/DevilizerNine
  • https://www.furaffinity.net/user/devilizer/

========================================

Disclaimer: Santa Lucia is a work in progress! Art assets, music, writing, UI are all subject to change over time and will not necessarily be the same between builds! Please be patient as we work to make the game the best it can be!

Shades of Elysium

Shades of Elysium is an Anthro Adult RPG romance game, starting in an alternate modern world where player meets interesting characters with fetishes and backstories we can relate to.

To name a few examples, a mysterious biker with a dark past that would come back to haunt him, a quirky wealthy young girl who lives alone in an inn with the fetish of voyeurism, a troubled scientist with his quest in forbidden science. All these characters in game, you as a player can have influence over their story arch and decisions.

As player progresses they may find themselves portals to other worlds and dimensions, where fantasy and stranger things exist, where new rules and physics are bound, with expandable universe also means limitless crafting recipes and creatures that roams the lands. It is an ambitious journey, and it all starts with cozy night slumber disturbed by a creature in despair.

Shelter

Awoo, traveler! Welcome to Shelter!

It's a furry visual novel about a bunch of those medieval fantasy dogs and a human who made their home at a mysterious, gigantic metal structure filled with futuristic technology in the middle of fantasy Siberia.

The game takes place during the preparations for their version of fireworks night, by using a life-force fueled turret of mass destruction. I swear it makes sense in context!

It's nsfw and I think it'll satisfy dog-lovers. eyebrow wiggles

I've been a fan of visual novels long before I even found out about the existence of the furry fandom, so I always wanted to make one. I do pretty much everything on my own in this one: designing and drawing character sprites and background, the writing and background music. I hope to improve in all of those areas over time!

For the most up-to-date build check out: https://www.patreon.com/raus where I post like a month in advance. It also gives you an invitation to our amazing Discord den where I post extra content and we have chill times. :)

If you'd like to follow me on FA and Twitter, I have those too!

  • FA: https://www.furaffinity.net/user/raus/
  • Twitter: https://twitter.com/ (nsfw) and https://twitter.com/Vuffski (sfw)

Awoo~!

Raus
製作 劇本 藝術家 音樂家
避難所 2 / 庇護所 2 / Shelter 2

自然之美總伴隨著無情與嚴苛。這正是《Shelter 2》的核心，也是我們選擇山貓作為本作主角的原因之一。牠們位於食物鏈的中段，冰冷的苔原上有遠比牠們更兇猛的生物。

本作圍繞著一隻母山貓的生活，從牠一開始懷胎、生產、到展開身為母親的旅程中，養育幼子對生存至關重要。《Shelter 2》精心設計的遊戲功能更勝前作，像是耐力、不同類型的動作與跳躍、和多種獵物可供捕食。除了打獵，本作也有更多母性與獵食功能，例如呼喚幼獸靠近、嗅聞獵物、確保幼獸飲用河水，以及將牠們叼起、帶走以遠離傷害。

廣闊的荒野正待探索

《Shelter 2》中的環境比前作更大，自由度也更勝一籌，讓玩家得以返回最愛的地點。這次的氣候與季節也會改變，嚴酷的冬季與蓬勃的夏季都在等你體驗！

因《Pid》獲獎的 Retro Family，依然是本作的配樂神手。除了生動的多邊形藝術風格，這次增添的森然氣氛與光線，將讓視覺效果煥然一新。

亮晶晶：閃閃王國 / Shiness: The Lightning Kingdom

Shiness is an Action-RPG developed by indie development studio Enigami, which will let you travel in a captivating universe doomed to destruction ever since the fragmentation of the planet Mahera...

MAIN FEATURES

  • Travel through an enthralling and interactive world as Chado and his 4 companions, and develop your characters
  • Hyper-dynamic combat mixing magic with combos, parries, and blocks like a traditional arena fighter
  • Develop 2 types of skills (physical attacks and magic) and unlock new talents and spells
  • Explore and interact with a vast world made of multiple environments thanks to you and your companions’ special powers and skills
  • Numerous quests and side-quests will give you the opportunity to develop your characters and their reputation

STORY

Play as Chado and his companions, and travel across the Celestial Islands onboard a flying boat. After a rough landing on hostile territory, you find yourself in the midst of a power struggle between several kingdoms. Chado might be able to resolve this situation thanks to Shiness, a magical spirit that only he can see.

GAMEPLAY

Explore a large and captivating world with which you'll be able to interact thanks to the power of your 5 playable characters: crush a big rock using pure strength to enter a secret cave, or use telekinetic powers to activate some mechanisms and discover a back entry… During your journey, you'll meet dozens of dangerous enemies with whom you'll have to face off during hyper-dynamic fights mixing magic, and traditional fighting game mechanics (hit, block, combos…). Gain experience during those fights, while progressing in the storyline or by accomplishing numerous side quests. Evolve your characters, learn new skills and spells, and become the hero who will unify the civilizations of Mahera.

Shinobi Spirits S Legend of Heroes / 忍スピリッツS 真田獣勇士伝

The flames of war run rampant.

Ieyasu Tokugawa has been made general of the Edo Shoganate. However, General Yukimura Sanada and his Beast Brigade head the resistance against Ieyasu!

But then one day, Saizo Kirigakure returns from a mission to find Yukimura and the entire Beast Brigade missing...

Shinobi Spirits S: Legend of Heroes is a ninja action game.

You are surrounded, under siege from all directions by the Tokugawa ninjas! Use your arsenal of ninja skills to defeat your foes. Create combos of attacks, and utilize ninja skills such as Smoke Bomb and Nose Dive! Follow our heroes' captivating story, and clear the missions in each stage. Collect scrolls to aquire new ninja skills! There is so much more than just clearing stages!

Enhance your ninja skills using the Skill Tree.

Upgrade skills to cultivate your unique ninja fighting style.

Don't forget to check out the Leader's Room.

There you can chat with our brave heroes, and discover content not included in the main story.

There are three levels of difficulty available.

From those who aren't familiar with action games, to seasoned veterans of the genre, there is something for everybody!

Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn

Got a question? Be sure to check out our FAQ!

Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn is a gay furry visual novel currently in development. Escape your old life and start anew in the idyllic mountain town of Woodcrest. Reunite with an old flame, make new friends, begin a new career and perhaps even find love? Play through multiple unique novel-length storylines in which you'll overcome great obstacles, meet a litany of colorful characters and perhaps even fall in love with the man of your dreams!

Sileo originally began development in April 2020 and our first public release took place in June 2020. Since then, we've been releasing new builds with tons of additional content each and every month, and will continue to do so until the game is complete. Be sure to check back often to see what new content we have in store for you!

If you like what you see, be sure to support us on Patreon to get monthly development builds, behind the scenes updates, hi-resolution artwork and more! We'd really appreciate your support!

We will release new builds of Sileo each month. Patreon will receive new content one month ahead of the Itch builds, however bug fixes and other improvements will be identical between versions where applicable. Be sure to follow us on Twitter to keep up to date with what's coming!

Please Note: Sileo: Tales of a New Dawn is a work in progress - everything is subject to change.

Werecat Entertainment is:
Xevvy - Writing, Programming, Interface Design, Concept, Misc
CurryCatz - Artwork: Sprites, CG's & Backgrounds
Kronos - Quality Control

Found a bug? Tweet us at twitter.com/WerecatEnt so we can look into it! If you receive a 'Traceback' screen, please take a screenshot of this and tweet it to us so we can more easily figure out what went wrong.

Small On Top

WARNING! The game contains adult themes of homosexual nature.

The game is still in development! New builds will be released on my Patreon

What is Small on Top?

"Small on Top" is an erotic RPG with character driven events and narrative. It follows the Adventurer as he explores the world and meets many different characters, some who would love or insist on joining on your journey.

The game will feature a full RPG experience with adult content, full pictures of any erotic events that might happen. The game will eventually have its own music made by yours truly.

The goal of this project is to make a full RPG with gay adult themes aimed towards those who love playing story driven games with adult themes and content, but are tired of seeking projects that don't mainly focus on straight content.

What kind of content does the game have?

The game features lots of sex and mature themed content. Lots of porn and adult jokes and stories. I started the game because I love bigger dudes being on the bottom being rawed by smaller, regular guys. So the game features you going around having sex with big muscular men!

How much content does the game have?

The patreon build currently has lots content and events. There are about 14 Sex events with CG art and 5 pixel animation events (1 is WIP). New, monthly builds always have new events to look forward to! So there's lots of content and more to come!

Socially Awkward

Socially Awkward is a 18+ semi-linear furry visual novel focusing on emotional cues to portray the story of each individual character on certain topics and reactions.

You are Jayce (Name can be replaced). An insecure half breed cat who just started his college life. Follow his college days to uncover each characters' past to get to know them.

THE GAME IS STILL A W.I.P.

If you'd like to support me on Patreon, you can find it here!

Or maybe a cup of ko-fi? o3o~

I also got a discord server if you'd like to come over to chat about the game or give some input on the characters, story, grammar and bugs that needs fixing! Click me!

PLEASE READ THE DEVLOGS FOR ISSUES, FIXES AND CHANGES!!! Ty~

Updates every 25th of the month.

天空機器人 飛向CODA～ / 蒼空騎士 飛向CODA～ / Solatorobo それからCODAへ

Red Savarin, an eager and ambitious 17 year-old anthropomorphic dog, ventures through the mythical floating islands of the Shepherd Republic where specialized robots are commonplace, living a carefree life traveling with his younger sister, Chocolat, and utilizing his personalized robot, Dahak, to complete various odd jobs for money. While on a routine retrieval mission, they have a chance encounter with a mysterious boy named Elh and find a medallion that inadvertently entangles Red in something much more than he bargained for. Having taken Elh under his care, Red investigates the mystery surrounding the young boy and the strange object as he takes on monsters, sky pirates and evil robots on his road to becoming the reluctant hero that must save the world from a swiftly awakening evil.

Solatorobo: Red the Hunter is an action role-playing game taking place in the Shepherd Republic, a nation high in the skies consisting of numerous floating islands. As Red, the player utilizes his personalized robot to pick up heavy items and enemies, catch and throw back projectiles, glide through the skies, and even fish for monsters. Gorgeous visuals and an amazing soundtrack bring the aerial world to life as players complete the more than 70 quests to gain the resources needed to upgrade and prepare their robot for the epic struggle to save the world from the evil about to be unleashed upon the land.

官方網站
靈魂擺渡人 / Spiritfarer

你會如何進行臨終道別？

《Spiritfarer®》是一款關於死亡的休閒管理遊戲。你扮演逝者的船主斯特拉，也是一名靈魂擺渡者。建造一艘船去探索世界，然後幫助和關愛幽靈，最終將他們送到來世。耕種、採礦、捕魚、收割、烹飪，並用你自己的方法渡過神祕之海。加入小貓達芙迪爾的冒險之旅，開啟雙人合作模式。與你的幽靈乘客一起度過悠閒的美好時光，創造永恆的回憶，最終學會如何向你珍愛的朋友道別。

遊戲特色：

  • 享受美麗的手繪藝術和動畫。
  • 建造、管理和改進你的渡船。
  • 耕種、採礦、捕魚、收割、烹飪、編織、製作！各種各樣的活動在等著你！
  • 結識一群令人難忘的角色，帶他們上船，關愛他們，與他們建立良好的關係。
  • 你可以採用奔跑、跳躍和滑行的方式一路闖過精心設計的平臺關卡。
  • 探索奇幻和充滿想象力的世界。尋找和收集各種資源，以升級你的船隻併為乘客製作禮物。
  • 體驗充滿難忘瞬間的感人故事。
  • 放鬆幾個小時，進入舒適且令人放鬆的遊戲。花上30個小時即可完成整個遊戲，花上幾百個小時則能詳細感受《Spiritfarer》的所有細節。
  • 遊戲內針對船隻、角色甚至是小貓都有豐富的自定義選項，助你打造獨一無二的冒險之旅！
  • 在可選的本地合作模式下扮演小貓達芙迪爾。

加入討論組

歡迎加入我們的中文討論組！《Spiritfarer》官方玩家QQ群：1001220629

北方之靈 / Spirit of the North

《Spirit of the North》以冰島美不勝收的神祕風景為靈感來源，是一個單人第三人稱探險遊戲。遊戲劇情以北歐民俗傳說為藍本創作。

遊戲採用故意不使用對話或敘述的獨特表現方式。玩家必須沐浴在環境之中，解決各種難題，思索失落遠古文明的意義所在。

扮演一條普普通通的紅狐，在故事中與北極光的守護者 - 一條雌性靈狐相互糾纏。在你穿過崇山峻嶺，在紅染的天空之下，你會發現有關自己伴侶，以及荒廢大地的更多故事。

重要特性

穿越美不勝收的大地，踏上情感糾纏的旅程。

解決環境謎題，改變周圍的世界；利用遠古神力解決環境謎題改變周遭世界；利用北極光守護者授予你的遠古神力

跟隨神祕靈狐穿越荒廢大地，發現有關失落文明的更多故事。

令人感動的管絃樂音軌內含 14 首原創作曲。

如果你喜歡這些遊戲，那麼你也一定會愛上《Spirit of the North》：
- Lost Ember
- RiME
- Journey
- The First Tree

Starry Chain

Starry Chain is an NSFW, gay furry visual-novel focused on the adventures of the main character Kailan Sabre. Depending on your choices, Kailan might learn something new and/or useful about the world he lives in, increasing or decreasing his relationship with other characters or getting himself in trouble. Every choice has some kind of impact and the narrative and it may change the outcome of the story.

The story follows Kailan, a spotted panther that is the last of the Anomaks, an ancient race with powerful magical abilities, and so he is hunted by the church of Saliphe, seeking to annihilate his race. As the result, Kailan was forced live hidden with his father in a forest far from any kind of civilization, but when the calamity arrived and the forest began to die, they were forced to move safer place, a village near the World's Tree. However, arriving at the village Kailan notice that something is threatening the village and the world.

if you'd like to support me on Patreon, you can find my page here!

Also, remember to follow me on twitter for more information!

Stories From The House of Beef

Julian is living single in the big city. He's been making a living as a novice photographer since the end of his college days, but he's ready for a change. Can he find the change he needs at "The House of Beef"?

Take on the role of this shy introvert as his small world begins to unravel with each new day. Can any of the various beefcakes help Julian to come out of his shell, and see the big sexy picture? You are armed with your trusty camera, and there are many experiences waiting for you at the House of Beef!

(From author's patreon)

Maybe you already know OVERTIME, my first comic project published some years ago. Working in something like that was an extremely challenging and fun experience that I was only able to repeat once with my other comic STRIP BRAWLERS but time and work schedules made it impossible for me to continue doing this kind of things until now.

During the past year, your support helped me to create my third comic, OVERTIME 2 HARDWORKERS, my third comic that was completed during the past month and now it's time to finally see what comes next.

This time I decided to try something a bit different so the next project that you'll be seeing here from now on will be a visual novel called STORIES FROM THE HOUSE OF BEEF.

Since I never tried to do something like this before, and programming isn't one of my strongest skills, for this project I'll be having the help of Wolfstar, (creator of Sins and Paradise), a good and talented friend that will be using his coding magic to bring this baby to life.

And I also have to thank DyneWulf, creator of Extracurricular Activities for his help as well. And in case you haven't seen the great works they're doing here are their links so you visit their sites.

Wolfstar Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Wolfstar
Dynewulf's Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/dk999

Wolfstar

其他
傳說：命運之路 / Stories: The Path of Destinies

Stories: The Path of Destinies is an action RPG set in a vibrant fairytale universe filled with floating islands, majestic airships, and colorful magic. Reynardo, ex-pirate and unintentional hero, suddenly becomes the last line of the defense against the mad Emperor and his countless ravens. Can he come up with a plan that won’t blow up in his face, for a change?

In Stories, each choice you make takes Reynardo into a unique narrative. From tongue-in-cheek takes on heroic adventures to dark, Lovecraftian scenes, Stories’ repertoire is as diverse as it is action-packed. But Reynardo’s fateful decisions won’t always come easy: Sometimes retrieving a weapon lost at the beginning of time means sacrificing the life of an old friend. But with so many choices to make, so many potential dire destinies, wouldn't it be great to be able to come back in time, learn from your mistakes and find the one true path?

Stories: The Path of Destinies now runs on Unreal Engine 4.18 with enhanced graphics and better performance!

KEY FEATURES

  • Unique choice-based narrative in which players explore many different storylines to find the path to victory
  • Fluid and fast-paced combat blending acrobatic swordplay, grab attacks, special abilities, and more
  • Charming hand-drawn illustrations and a colorful storybook aesthetic
  • A deep skill tree where players can unlock powerful new abilities such as the Hookshot or even Time Mastery
  • An arsenal of magic-infused swords that can be crafted and upgraded
  • An original soundtrack that changes dynamically with every choice

超級動物大逃殺 / Super Animal Royale

免費遊玩：

你可以免費遊玩超級免費版，並在購買升級後將遊戲資料同步至完整版本。為了生存而戰：

《超級動物大逃殺》是一款創意十足，刺激且充滿戰略性的上帝視角大逃殺。在各種異域風情的生物群落中參與這場由最多 64 名可愛殺手動物的尖牙利爪（還有機關槍）大亂鬥吧！這裡的動物們都為了成為最強狗狗（或最強貓咪、最強樹懶……之類的）而戰！

以上帝視角在緊張刺激的氛圍中享受這款創新的大逃殺體驗。

直觀的戰爭迷霧系統讓你能夠使用潛行來進行戰略突襲。

探索這座巨大且美麗的，擁有各式各樣的生態群落與一座歷經滄桑的超級野生動物園遺蹟的天堂島嶼。

砍掉高聳的雜草堆來發現藏在其中的物品，因為對付雜草不必留情。為什麼要叫作「超級」試玩版呢?嗯...除了在每樣東西前面加上「超級」會讓他更棒以外，這個試玩版同時也讓你能盡情遊玩完整的線上模式，隨便你玩喔！而且你還可以開始記錄你的進度，並獲得物品與動物DNA。在試玩版中所賺取的物品會暫時被鎖定，所以你無法解鎖新動物或把他們打扮成你喜歡的樣子，但如果你喜歡這款遊戲並決定要購買的話，你在試玩版中所獲得的所有進度與物品都會直接轉移到完整版中！還蠻「超級」的，對吧？只希望試玩版沒超級過頭反而讓你不想購買正式版了，不過我們還是對這款遊戲作品與它所建立起的玩家社群感到非常自豪，所以我們認為讓你親自體驗遊戲的魅力更會讓你覺得這是一款值得支援的搶先體驗遊戲！

注意：超級免費版玩家可以無限制線上暢玩所有遊戲模式，而且可以透過 Discord 邀請免費版與完整版的玩家組隊！由於技術限制，只有完整版玩家才能使用 Steam 好友列表邀請其他玩家組隊。不斷進化與改善的遊戲內容：

直觀的上帝視角與簡單易懂的機制讓這款成為了目前最好上手的大逃殺遊戲，而對於進階玩家我們同時也保留了非常具有深度的戰略與技術獎勵。此外，無論您是在 MacBook 或是 PC 上游玩，我們出色的最佳化都能讓你流暢地進行遊戲。

隨著遊戲更新，小島和基因改造的超級動物的名單不斷（啊咳）進化。您的超級動物可以透過全新的服裝、墓碑、死亡爆炸效果、武器和舞蹈動作等進行個性化定製。就算遊戲打得菜，面板還是可以一套一套買的。

加入超級動物世界，一起來看看我們正與搶先體驗社群進行著哪些工作，併為遊戲的發展做出貢獻！

Super Taco Crew

Edgar the Fox has stumbled through life, never seeming to catch a break. From a young age he's taken to thieving as a means to survive in this dark, dystopic city. He's been trying to get away from it and lead a normal life, but things don't always go as they're planned.

The rise of machine life has complicated things further, with corporations seeking to control more and more. Follow Edgar on an epic adventure, filled with mystery and deception, and possibly the chance of love.

Tail Concerto / テイルコンチェルト

Dogs and cats inhabit the world of Prairie. The dogs are the dominant group and have denied the cats representation in the government. The Black Cats is formed to get feline representation by any means necessary. Believing that five crystals scattered in Prairie hold the key to a utopia filled with catnip, the Black Cats go after them. If the crystals are gathered, they will awaken the Iron Giant who will destroy Prairie. You take the role of Waffle, who must stop the Black Cats and save the world. Luckily, he is equipped with a robotic suit that can immobilize fleeing cats with the bubble gun, allowing the arms to capture them. After a cat is captured, it is thrown into a teleporter and sent to jail. Will Waffle be able to stop the Black Cats before they find the crystals? Find out by playing Tail Concerto.

官方網站
Tanuki Sunset

Overview

Tanuki Sunset is a third-person longboarding game where players follow Tanuki, a rad raccoon with a longboard and a dream to land on the cover of the #1 magazine in Sunset Island: FISH!

Players must master longboard drifting to make their way from mountains ranges, through the city and down to the beach of Sunset Island. Throughout the journey players will guide Tanuki to perform rad tricks, jump-off ramps, all while avoiding cars and multiple obstacles. Collecting Tanuki Bits along the way is important to redeem for items and gear at Bob's Skate Shop, where players can customize Tanuki's outfit and longboard to better suit their personal style.

Gameplay & Features

The gameplay was designed to feel like something from the the PS2 era by having the player keep a state of flow with a simplified control scheme.

Aside from a single-player story mode the game includes additional game modes such as endless, score and time trials. The soundtrack features nostalgic styles, laid-back rhythms and a retro art-style. Tanuki Sunset aims to bring its players back to a nostalgic space and time, while enjoying a fun, modern and stylized arcade-like experience.

TarouTF 2016 / 太郎君TFゲー2016 (フリー)

2016年に公開した、男の子TFゲーの最終版になります。

ＲＰＧツクール製ですが、ＲＰＧというよりうろうろ歩いてTFエンディングを探すアドベンチャーになります。

当時公開したものに（強引に）最終エンディングを加えたような形になります。

このゲームは男児が別の生物・無機物に変身(Transformation)する要素を
主題としたゲームです。

成人向けの内容が含まれるため、18歳未満の方はプレイする事が出来ません。
嫌悪感を感じられた方はご遠慮下さい。
また性転換要素もありません。

また、以下の方々にテキストや絵などを提供して頂きました。　ありがとうございました！
梅毒さん くりやまりくさん 猪竹さん

矛之酒館 / Tavern of Spear

本遊戲主要角色 只有男性 ，而且有大量 NSFW 內容。
它將包含麝香，觸手，精神催眠，洩殖腔。

故事圍繞著一個小酒館，你控制的角色名為 “Eyvind”。

來自迷失之矛部落的年輕的成年狼戰士。

遵循部落傳統，Eyvind 離開家鄉，踏上了旅程。

您可以單擊坐在那裡的角色並與他們交談。有的角色在談話後可以和他做愛，或完成任務

"你可以透過為角色做任務來接近他們、瞭解他們。

他們都有自己的個性，與其他角色的關係、和自己相關的事件。

我添加了一些統計資料檢查，就像 DND 和輻射 1、2 一樣。

您可以在遊戲開始時分配屬性點。

統計資訊還包含“腐敗”和“性慾”，隨著統計資料的增加，可以解鎖更多場景。

在對話中，偶爾會出現技能檢查。透過還是失敗將取決於你的統計。"

（翻譯自英語）

Temptation's Ballad

Temptation's Ballad is a fairly linear visual novel in a D&D; style medieval fantasy setting. Three idiots from vastly different backgrounds band together in an adventuring party to unravel the magical secrets within the city of Axia. Together, they battle demons, seduce locals, and learn a little about themselves along the way. And probably cause massive property damage.

This visual novel is currently heavily work-in-progress. Patreon members will gain access to all monthly updates while the general public will gain access to builds every other month.

This game will contain NSFW lewd scenes between male characters. These scenes pop up occasionally throughout the story as characters grow more intimate. View at your own discretion. It's very gay.

If you like my art, feel free to follow me on Twitter here! And if you'd like to support me on Patreon and gain access to monthly updates, you can do so here. Thank you!

FAQ: How do I update my game after a new build releases?

This varies depending on what platform you're on. If on Android, simply download the new build and install it. It should automatically update the version of the game you have installed. If on Windows/MAC/Linux, simply delete the old game folder and download the new build. Your saves are stored in your local files, so they should be retained after the update.

Please note that the Android version is not stable on all Android devices. It is recommended that you play the PC, MAC, or Linux versions when possible.

Tennis Ace

Tennis Ace is a visual novel following in the more traditional Japanese VN mold, with a lengthier prologue, a higher focus on characterization and anime-esque art.

In the game, you follow the life of an 18-year old boy who aspire to become a professional tennis player at the end of his senior year in high school.

The game has three dateable characters, all of them being part of the protagonist's inner circle of friends.

Updates will be posted here 14 days after they have been posted on Patreon, with updates coming out monthly.

If you like the art in my project, consider checking out my artist's DeviantArt here!

And if you'd like to support me on Patreon, you can find my project's page right here!

If you would like to contact me to ask me a question or anything like that, send me an email at tennisacevn@outlook.com and I'll get back to you as soon as I can. And if you have an error or typo to report, click here to contribute to the typo log!

The Adventures of Kincaid

Kincaid is a lewd platforming adventure with a sci-fi theme. Our protagonist is an adventurer, exploring uncharted planets and their wild life!

Join our playful and naughty wolf girl Kincaid, as she sexplores flora & fauna and meets new friends (with benefits~) and adversaries!

Kincaid is not alone: She is joined by her sidekick Ai, an artificial intelligence that lives inside her ship's computer and provides support from the orbit.

An exciting adventure full of hot action, burning lust and erotic surprises unfolds!

MEET KINCAID

Kincaid is a naughty wolf girl and quickly succumbs to sexy distractions. Give her a nudge to remind her of her quest - or do nothing and watch her satisfy her curiosity and lust!
She writes down all her "research findings" (unlocked scenes) in her journal for you to enjoy again at a later time.

PLANNED FEATURES

  • Travel to three unique planets: Each planet is a continuous, metroidvania-style world with different areas and a variety of enemies and sex encounters.
  • Plan your next adventure from the safety of Kincaid's own space ship. Interact with Ai and discover spicy secrets about Kincaid's past.
  • Fast-paced melee-oriented combat!
  • Story bosses and optional secret bosses.
  • A whole cast of NPC characters for you to meet, each with their own unique and hand-crafted sex animations!
  • Heart-throbbing high-res CGs!
  • Collect Powerups that give Kincaid new abilities, like Double-Jump, Charged Shot, and Shield.

The action focuses on a female protagonist facing male and female opponents, as well as some more exotic encounters and monsters.

THE TEAM

Cookiedraggy - Art / Design - FA/Twitter
That's me! I'm an artist and game developer within the furry fandom. If you know me, it's probably because of my porn on FurAffinity! I create all the art for Kincaid, as well as designing the gameplay and world together with Nullbunny.

Nullbunny - Programming / Design - FA/TwitterHey, I'm Null and I'm responsible for most of the coding work! I started making video games at a young age and it's been my number one hobby ever since.

Null and I have been working together on games for 6 years now. We know each others processes and we have an efficient workflow going. We're also living together, which makes it even easier to communicate and collaborate.

We love making games and will work on Kincaid no matter what. By pledging you can encourage and appreciate our work, and enjoy some exclusive rewards!

With your support we'll be able to dedicate more of our time creating Kincaid, instead of spending most of our time on freelance work and doing commissions.

In the long run we hope that Patreon will help us get other artists on board as well and make Kincaid the best erotic furry platformer.

FAQ
You can find our FAQ here.

CLOSING THOUGHTS

Your support means the world to us and if you like our game, please tell others about it!

I hope we'll see you on Discord or in one of our Picarto streams!

THE BEAST

(THE BEAST contains scenes of torturing, explicit violence and gore - you must be 18 or older to play)

THE BEAST is a role-playing horror furry visual novel about a world filled by terrifying monsters named "The Corrupted", a demonic species that hungers for human flesh and blood. A company of Alchemia Corp, hired a special team called "BEAST Hunters" to hunt down and eliminate them. It was at this moment, Eric, a teenage boy who lives a smooth life without going out in a clean house, gradually learned that he is not a human...

The Butterfly Dream

is a anthro featuring visual novel which is targeted to gay furries. (Developing with Renpy)

You accepted a request to change your soul with other beastmen in different dimention. You are having a short trip going to the other world where beastmen live with becoming beastman. You can go through different routes for each beastmen: a total of three of them. The route you play is determined by favorability system, influenced by your choices through the game.

You could get extra CG (including NSFW) for each route if you get a good relationship with that route's beastman.

We expect the playtime of this complete game will be 6 hours. Also, this is a remake of the original novel that was serialized in Korea's furry fandom by the story writer. So we are confident to make this game completely.

For English Users:

English translation: Sorry for the poor English in game. There were lack of time since our team is all constructed with university students. (And also lack of English influent member, hm... I guess I should post a job opening in Korea fandom.)

Also, we already have a complete script for the old prototype version of this game, so we guarantee that we could complete this game.

Patreon
The Cathouse Tale

Cathouse Tale is an adult game project featuring anthropomorphic characters. We are currently working on expanding our character customizer and adding loads of new animations, as well as getting started on the actual sex scene gameplay. Our long-term goal is to make something that sets a new standard for x-rated fantasy game content.

We intend to make sexual content for everyone to enjoy, featuring every combination of males, females, and hermaphrodites, so you'll see plenty of variety, but with the option to restrict scenes according to your personal tastes.

Gameplay - You will be playing as a prostitute at a high-tier, exclusive brothel. The goal is to serve your customers well, get to know your coworkers, and develop your skills. As you work your way up, you will be introduced to new challenges, encounters and unlockables.

Player progression - We plan to incorporate a few RPG elements for the player, such as an engaging cast of characters to interact with and unlockable skills to augment your abilities. These skills would give you an edge in stimulating and satisfying your partners, which will grow steadily more challenging later in the game.

Story progression and exploration - The Cathouse is a large place, and you start out at the bottom rung, with access to only one area. As you prove yourself, new areas of the building will be unlocked, and secrets will be revealed. Eventually, you will prove yourself worthy of the Owner, and become the Cathouse's elite international agent and the heir to the Owner.

該遊戲未完成並可能已停止開發
釋出頁面 Patreon
綠葉之冠 / The Crown of Leaves

The Crown of Leaves is a hybrid of non-kinetic visual novel and point-n-click adventure, that will tell you a story about mysticism, riddles, constellations, anthro, beasts and ghosts!

Three chapters are planned for release; The first chapter has already been released - and it's here.

There are only two people that work on the game (+ a programmer and a composer) and non of them is professional in game development or programming. This is our first game.

Plot

Roui, a resilient city dandy, a half-educated jeweler and the author of scientific magic articles, dealt with a colossal failure and had to return to his homeland: Latori. Science isn't a thing here, and local shoddy mystical beliefs are really irritating and dejecting to Roui. He dreams to return to his old life... But how can it be possible if you have no money? One day, a prosperous local baron commissioned him for a bracelet, a gift for his lovely bride. Roui, in need of the extra coin, graciously accepted the order... But not long afterward he faced a new problem - the Mad Rook, a legendary and mysterious spirit, began to meddle in the lives of the locals, including Roui's. This spirit, an entity that plays tricks on mortals once a year, is possessed with strange magic and a dark sense of humor.

Despite all the strangeness of the story, everyone can find something parallel to their everyday life and see themselves in one of the characters. This story will capture you and won't let you go until the very end. Turn your mind inside out through a twisted way!

Setting

Where is it set? The setting is a fictional world called Shang-La, a world of mixed cultures and eras, and home to various strange creatures. This is a place of old magic and new ideas, where science works together with mysticism. You can find glasses and phones, electricity and radio here, but no guns or television. The inhabitants of this world still fight with swords. The continent they live in is surrounded by the boundless ocean. The Sun and the Moon take turns alternating in the sky, and the stars are made of metal and hiding tons of secrets in them.

Who are the Sahash?

Sahash are the second intelligent race in Shang-La, alongside humans. They are divided into five nations, differing from each other by their physicality, shape of their horns, and muzzles. Every nation has its own unique traditions and culture: ranging from habits, religion, law, and even tastes in fashion and food.

Despite the complicated relationships between these ethnic groups of Sahash, as a whole they get along with humankind, and even try to emulate them in spite of their more animalistic nature.

Key features

  • Communicate with multiple characters, forge friendships, and make bitter enemies.
  • Collect and craft items!
  • Explore the world of Shang-La and meet unusual creatures, animals, spirits, and ghosts.
  • Choose who you wish to become - the hero or the villain.
  • Search for hidden clues to learn more about the game characters and plot!

In our game you will find:

  • Animated sprites
  • An original, richly-crafted world with intriguing concepts
  • Atmospheric OST
  • A few episodes of the game

The Flower Collectors

A detective mystery set in the political powder-keg of Barcelona in 1977. You play Jorge, a retired policeman who uses a wheelchair, struggling with a difficult past. Alone on your balcony, you watch the world pass by through binoculars.

The mystery

One stormy night, you witness a murder. Determined to uncover the truth, you form an unlikely alliance with young ambitious journalist Melinda and start your investigation.

Together, you’ll solve a complex mystery by unravelling the secrets of unsuspecting neighbours.

Inspired by classic crime noir films and games like Campo Santo's Firewatch, The Flower Collectors is a detective story with a whole lot of heart.

Features

  • Solve a captivating murder mystery with an unusual storyline
  • Meet a host of colourful anthropomorphic characters in a lush, atmospheric world
  • Investigate using your binoculars, camera and transmitter to uncover neighborhood secrets from your balcony
  • Create a crime chronology to figure out whodunnit
  • Interrogate priests, beggars, club singers and nosy old ladies alike
  • Dive into the unique setting of post-Franco Barcelona in the 70ies
  • Emphasizes characters, world building and narrative over skill challenges

The Hayseed Knight

The story of the great Knight of the Upperfield! The bravest! The most handsome! The… yeah no.

The Hayseed Knight is a plot driven fantasy comedy visual novel created by a single person (yo!) that follows the adventures of Ader, the one eyed deer, while he desperately tries to stay on track to fulfill his dream: becoming a knight!

But he's a peasant... and pretty damn poor at that! That's not going to stop him, is it? ...WELL, it kinda is. Dreams aren't edible after all.

On a meta sense, the player is The Narrator, a character hellbent on finding out what truly happened to Ader and his friends, who are little more than legendary characters at this point.

  • Fully and lovingly voice acted!
  • Gorgeous, animated sprites!
  • Meet adorable, unique characters!
  • A detailed encyclopedia for people who love worldbuilding!
  • Completely safe for work. Yes really. PG 13. Please, stop asking. Please.
  • COMPLETELY FREE. Like the wind.

This is still very much in development, so anything is subject to change in future versions! If you want to help me develop this game, there's a patreon and any contribution is really appreciated!

Keep up with development on twitter!

-Streams and Let's Plays are really appreciated! I'd love to watch yours and share it! -Please, do not redistribute.

Content Warnings: fantasy racism, fantasy homophobia, sexual abuse threat

Current Known Issues:

  • Save files NOT compatible with 1.4! (damn you encyclopaedia)
  • The encyclopaedia is STILL sorta ugly, but its functionality has been vastly improved since 1.4! At the cost of the save file compatibility as mentioned above.
  • The CG gallery has somehow turned even buggier and I don't even know how. Use at your own risk???
  • Audio levels may be a bit off occasionally.
  • No battle system yet. I THINK IT'S FUNNIER LIKE THIS AT THIS POINT, RIGHT? R-RIGHT?

The HeartBeat

遊戲介紹

2077年，新敦克市。

人們已經忘卻了“鴞母”的輝光，轉而投向寡頭生物科技公司——莫利格。肉體逐漸被機械取代，五感也被神經介面傳輸的訊號替換。正當人們享受著作為“改造者”的舒適生活時，一款不知從何而來的電子病毒成為了新敦克市的夢魘。

而你，是這座城市的市長。

在連續工作十日後，你那顆疲憊的心臟終於發出了最後的悲鳴。

及時趕到的祕書為你在體外橋接了一顆機械心臟，把它握在手中吧，用你最後的力量，去延續自己和這座城市的心跳。

（遊戲包含多結局）

操作說明

空格鍵 按壓心臟！廠商推薦你在節拍指示器漲滿的瞬間擠壓。

方向鍵 做出決策！告訴祕書你為這座城市做出的最後的決策。

最重要的是，努力活下去，處理完所有的檔案！

The Lar

關於這款遊戲

請說明一下游戲的概況吧！ The Lar是一款劇情向的遊戲，幷包含數個分支路線與結局、適度的解謎以及各種各樣適量的梗。

您將在大約3小時的遊戲流程中探索這個未知又奇妙的地方，與各種各樣的實驗體邂逅，一同協力找到離開的方法。

遊戲中↑↓←→為移動鍵，Z/Enter/空格鍵為確定，X/ESC鍵為取消，ESC鍵開啟選單可以進行物品的確認與退出遊戲。F5鍵為存檔鍵，F6鍵為讀檔鍵。

以及遊戲內的所有音樂都並非原創，如需要請閱讀遊戲目錄下的"Read me"。

以上，還請您多加確認。

那麼需要做什麼呀？

探索、調查，見到新的實驗體同伴，並得到它們的信任、或成為朋友，最終一同從這裡逃出去。

路線將由您的選擇而改變，注意一切需要注意的事情，否則您就可能走入錯誤的路線。

您可以試著解開部分場景中的謎題，並觸發更多豐富的支線劇情。

以及並沒有太多需要操作的地方，請放鬆下來，體驗Lar和朋友們的故事吧。還有什麼需要了解的嘛？ The Lar是由Team Yume製作，分別是負責遊戲全部製作的九張冥幣與吉祥物琉璃獄夢。

本遊戲將不再進行更新或製作續作。

本遊戲包含Furry要素（僅存在於角色設定上），但這只是作者的個人喜好。同時，本遊戲包含的所有要素或梗都是作者的個人喜好，不好意思，有技術力就是可以為所欲為（？）。

遊戲官方討論群已解散，具體原因請看：https://t.bilibili.com/366512022053515632?tab=2。然後是同人方面的特殊宣告哦！ 禁止一切AU(平行宇宙)設定。禁止一切以The Lar世界觀為背景的原創角色設定。

The Pirate's Fate

Come sail the Pirate's Fate! Experience the twists and turns of Mila's emotional journey as a member of the Dread Pirates. Prepare yourself for an intense visual novel experience featuring mirth, action, romance, philosophy and many transformations, with over three hundred choices within its branching plot paths. Can you protect everyone you care about? Can you collect all the coins, scattered to the ends of the Earth? Can you complete the journey without losing yourself in the process?

Story

In The Pirate's Fate, you play as Mila, the newest member of the Dread Pirates. You’ll navigate stormy seas, seedy saloons, and monstrous coves in search of loot. And be warned: you aren’t the only pirates seeking this treasure!

Choices matter

The choices you make alter Mila, the crew, and the story itself. Different plotlines and romances will become available depending on the paths you choose to take. Each plot path changes the relationship dynamics and the composition of your crew, as well as your place within it. Will you become a ruthless, cunning captain, or a diplomatic, peacemaking conciliator?

Your actions will transform the crew, literally

The magical treasure that the Dread Pirates seek is a set of coins that can transform whoever holds them; to let them “become what they seek." They might change in age, appearance, gender, personality, and species—and even rewrite their own past! There are over thirty-five unique transformations among the main cast, many of which showcase non-traditional body types and presentations.

Diverse Relationships

There are many ways to fall in love in The Pirate’s Fate. You can even fall for the same character in different ways, depending on the choices you’ve made, the way the story unfolds, and the sorts of transformations you’ve experienced. There are over forty different romance paths, representing a variety of relationships, including many across the LGBT spectrum.

Features

  • Over 300 choices across 8 unique plot lines
  • 35+ transformations
  • 190+ illustrated sequences
  • 45 romances
  • 190,000-word script
  • Partial voice acting
  • Soundtrack of 20+ original compositions
  • Unlockable gallery

煙室 / The Smoke Room

《煙室》包含成人主題，您必須年滿十八歲才能遊玩。

《煙室》是一部以1915年的沙漠小鎮為背景的恐怖/愛情視覺小說，為《回聲》的獨立前傳。

搬到 Echo 鎮真是個壞主意，輕信初次相識的人讓一切更加糟糕。《煙室》講述了 Samuel 的故事，他是一個性工作者，在鎮上最臭名昭著的妓院工作。在他犯了自己人生中最大的錯誤後，Sam 想要竭力掩蓋祕密。然而，他很快意識到這麼做幾乎是不可能的… Echo 鎮似乎知道他所做的一切，絕不讓他輕易遺忘。

如果您喜歡此遊戲，並希望在 Patreon 上支援我們，可以前往此處！

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

禁弟 / The Twin

突然失蹤的妻子、瘋癲的妹妹、活在黑暗中的弟弟、躲躲閃閃的女僕、不知是否值得相信的朋友……郎即他所擁有的幸福，突然被打得粉碎，他好想明白，這一切究竟是怎麼回事，被隱藏在背後的的真相究竟是什麼。於是他，懷著這強烈的不甘，墮入了不幸的輪迴之中……究竟什麼時候，一切才會終止？究竟怎樣，才能阻止一切，保護住自己的幸福？

本遊戲可能含有暴力、凶殺、驚悚、心理恐怖的內容，對此不適者，請勿觀看，以免造成不必要的衝擊。未滿十五週歲者，不推薦觀看本遊戲。遊戲內容純屬虛構，與任何人物、團體、事件無關。

本遊戲需要一個獸化補丁才能使主角變成獸人，通常情況下，獸化補丁會與遊戲本體一併提供。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Rumor has it that lewd things have been going down in an abandoned testing facility, known as the Chasm. Many thrill seekers and exhibitionists have gone missing though, so it may be dangerous to go alone...

Thirstchasm solely features Male on Male content, with over 20 unique animated sex scenes!

PastryGames
製作
Timberborn

人類在把地球變成一片乾涸的沙漠後自己滅絕了，但一些物種卻適應了嚴酷的環境並存活下來。從多種獨特的海狸種族中選擇一支，看看你的海狸社會能延續多久！

雨季和旱季

做好準備，抵禦不斷來襲的旱季。囤積食物，讓田地與森林在旱季來臨時仍然生機勃勃。利用自然水源與灌溉技術，維持土地耕作。

整治河流

未來的海狸擁有千年來流淌在基因裡的水利天賦，能夠改變河道、搭建堤壩、用炸藥轟出運河。不過要小心，失控的洪流比炸藥還要恐怖！

木匠朋克

使用木材建造精密的機械、房屋、紀念碑等。木材是 Timberborn 的核心原料，但最先進的結構需要金屬。要找到金屬，你需要派出勘探隊，去探索舊世界的廢墟。

垂直建築

用模組型垂直建築系統建立起繁榮昌盛的海狸社會。由於空間有限，你需要堆砌小屋和作坊，在山上開墾田地，並建造電力網來維持不斷擴大的社會需求。

日夜迴圈

在繁榮的海狸城市裡建造高效生產鏈以及豐富的夜生活設施。體驗單個模擬的海狸生活，在生下海狸寶寶時慶祝一番！

身心健康

滿足海狸社會的需要，提升居民的壽命和幸福度。一隻海狸的生活不應該只是“工作、睡覺、伐木”，還需要平衡飲食、裝飾、廟宇、甚至旋轉木馬。這些東西都由你來創造。

海狸社會

控制不同的海狸種族，每個種族都有獨特的風格、建築和能力。一些海狸擅長務農，其他的則依靠高速工業化來發展。選擇適合你風格的海狸種族！

地圖編輯器

使用遊戲內建地圖或建立自己的地圖並與社群分享！你可以建立不同高度的山脈、散落沙漠的廢墟、作為生命之源的水路……每張地圖都會有不同的挑戰。

……更多內容！

我們將基於玩家反饋定期釋出新內容。這是全球第一款海狸城市建築遊戲，我們會努力把它做好。請繼續保持關注，把 Timberborn 加入願望單吧！

該遊戲仍在開發過程中

遠吠書籤！另一個書籤 / とおぼえブックマーク！Another Bookmark

基於《遠吠書籤》原作的世界線有所交集。世界觀構成、全新的人物、和原創的故事！

“我曾以為時光的流淌悄無聲息。然而那個暑假的些許誤解，完全改變了這一切。在那充滿矛盾與複雜情感的內心深處……如果曾經的時光可以停留，我想我會一直賴著不走。”

人生很漫長，青春卻短暫；這次，我把這個故事講完。

注：《遠吠書籤》原作的漫畫作者已支援。

尾牙 / 牙齒和尾巴 / Tooth and Tail

大軍所向披靡，你將率領噴射火焰的野豬，釋放芥子毒氣的臭鼬還有嘔吐傘兵貓頭鷹引領一場變革。來自 Monaco：What's Yours is Mine 開發組的最新力作《尾牙》是一款包含單人模式，線上對戰，分屏對戰，精彩重放等許許多多內容的創新即時戰略遊戲。

建設基地，指揮軍隊，吞噬敵人！

肉之聖戰

形形色色的角色統統被捲入一場決定誰做食肉者，而誰淪為刀俎的戰爭。遊戲將透過內容豐富的單人戰役演繹充滿黑色幽默的鼠族變革史。

無盡的可重玩性

過程生成式的地圖，佐以豐富的自定義引數，每一次的對局都會帶給你獨特的體驗，玩家必須靠謀略而非背板來取得勝利。

即開即玩

每局遊戲約為5~12分鐘，可以分屏本地雙人對戰，針對手柄和鍵鼠都進行了充分的最佳化， 《尾牙》是一款能令新人和老手都滿意的爆米花式即時戰略遊戲。

トラ☆コイ！

『トラ☆コイ！』無料体験版です。

虎獣人のおっさん、おっちゃん、おじさんとの恋愛ＡＤＶゲームです。

※同性愛表現および性的描写が含まれます。

起動方法

「torakoi.exe」を実行してください。

※本ゲームをプレイする際は、「torakoi_taiken」ファイルを右クリックし、対象ファイルを展開してから実行して下さい。

解凍しない状態(zipファイルのまま)で実行すると、正常にプレイできない可能性があります。

推奨環境

OS: Windows Vista/7/8/10 (64bit)
CPU : Pentium III 800MHz以上 ( 1GHz以上推奨 )
メモリ: 128MB以上 ( 1GB以上推奨 )
HDD: 空き容量2GB以上
解像度: 1280x720以上
※「吉里吉里Z／KAG3」の動作条件に準じます。

ただし、これらの条件を満たす場合でも、100％の動作を保証するものではありません。

動作確認済みOS：Windows 7/10（64bit）

制作者

  • 企画・主催　虎道芸・熟虎☆NIGHT

  • イラスト

    • 虎白(@T_kohaku2016)

  • プログラム　

    • ベンぞー(@benzo70462964)
    • はち(@hachi_forebodin)
    • 星坂 翔(@hoshizaka)
    • 黒井(@kemokuroi)

  • シナリオ　

    • ベンぞー
    • 虎白
    • はち
    • 星坂 翔
    • 黒井

注意事項

  • 本作が原因で何らかの損害や障害等が発生したとしても、制作者は一切責任を負わないものとします。
  • 本作の無断転載・無断商用利用は禁止です。
  • プレイ動画のアップロードや2次創作物の公開等は良識の範囲内でご自由に行っていただいて構いません。
  • 本規約は予告なく変更する場合があります。

著作権

当ソフトに使用している素材やデータ等にはすべて著作権があります。

素材やデータ等の改造、転載及び流用、二次配布等を禁止します。

ただし、フリー素材に関しては各著作者の利用規約に従えば使用可能な場合があります。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

Tribal Hunter

Tribal Hunter is action platformer with an open world. You play as a village guardian who can shift it's body shape, allowing it to grow huge and devour enemies. As you grow, you can use this 'growth' as energy to fire projectiles at enemies!

The goal of the game is to power up your abilities in order to fight powerful enemies and bosses around the world, saving your tribe members and growing your village.

We hope you enjoy our demo, and choose to support our project! We have patreon page, please check it if you are interested! :D

https://www.patreon.com/tribalhunter

Thank you so much for playing!

Triple R: Rehabilitation Rational Ruined

Resume

The game is basically a Dark Souls Visual novel, but instead of Dying repeatedly you get FUCKED repeatedly!!! This will will have multiple choices with multiple paths that will have consequences! If you do something in chapter 1, it will influence things up to chapter 10!!! So Buckle up ya naughty pup!!

Content

Buying a slot and scene, will grant you a scene and the right to write your own scene

That's Right! Commissioning Sex scenes will able you to write what your character will do, and write the dialogue, all that to give you freedom over your own custom scene! The Regular sequence is a three image sequence of your own idea. and so on! You can have as many as you want if you willing to pay! almost any kink imaginable is allowed! scene is to show one or multiple images and your scene description text right as it is shown

(The images will be similar, so the price can be reasonable to pay for) (But if you want difference)or additional scenes it will cost extra)

Here is a list of the kinks/fetishes/ NSFW Content that is currently present in the Game can be viewed on our discord server under #game-info. Currently it has something to everyone! 65 kinks and more to come!!!

月兔冒險 / Tsuki Adventure

月兔之前很孤獨。工作有壓力。老闆不領情。在嘈雜的城市裡過著繁忙、混亂的生活。但是有一天，月兔收到一封普通的信……然後一切都變了。

這封信來自月兔已經去世的爺爺，他在蘑菇村給月兔留下了家族胡蘿蔔農場。這是開始新生活的絕佳機會。

現在，月兔遠離了原先生活中的嘈雜和壓力，來到了農村，開始重視簡單的事情。

無論是與狐狸尤里一起釣魚，與長頸鹿琪琪一起讀書，還是品嚐月兔的好朋友熊貓波波做的一碗最美味的拉麵……每個時刻都十分珍貴。

與月兔一同展開驚喜探險，探索鄉村生活的所有美好。

月兔冒險需要獲得對外部儲存器的讀寫訪問許可權才能將進度儲存在本地裝置上。

Uncommon Breed

Warning this game contain: Fantasy Violence , Sexual Content

Copied from my Patreon

Hey guys, I’m FoxBytez. I’m really into software development and sharing my, sometimes outlandish, ideas through the games I create. The dream is to forge a game studio capable of helping others follow their own aspirations. Whether it be art, animating, modeling, coding, story writing… there’s so much that goes into building games and I’d love to create a home for those passionate about their craft.

But that’s end game. The short term goal is being able to work on Uncommon Breed and similar games full time.

Current Project

At the moment, I’m working on the RPG / Visual Novel, Uncommon Breed. In this game, your relationships affect both story and combat! Recently, I’ve been lucky enough to pick up a couple of well equipped mercenaries:

Esonver: The Great Wolf Lobster Artist

TΔIKAH: The Brilliant Tiger Graphics Designer

These two talented individuals have have helped me bring a new level of quality to the game and your support helps me pay for their art/services.

At the moment, I update the game at least once a month. If I’m ever able to work on it full time, you can expect 2+ updates a month.

More than a visual novel

One of my core motivations for making Uncommon Breed was to learn the ins and outs of Unity (a Game Development Engine) with the intent of making more interactive/complex games in the future. This is why Uncommon Breed has and will continue to evolve as I take what I learn and apply it to the game. Examples of this are:

The PUB

A segmented dating world in which you can travel between multiple rooms and have brief conversations with the main characters. These conversations affect their affection towards you, the story, and the combat.

Combat world

RPG style, turn based combat system with your relationships affecting combat. Did you say the right things to Grizz, the burly bear tank? His defense capabilities increased! What about Reinhard, the X Bounty Hunter? His shots are gonna start hitting really hard!

Questing System

In the works! Quests will mainly come from the PUB.

The story

Get plopped into the shoes of a developing hero character and bring together a band of outlaws to save your home. Strengthen your personal relationships and find that strength translates into your battles together. Get to know and romance them but be wary of leaving the strength of your other teammates behind!

My Patreon page is set up with the Charge Up Front (CUF) model.

This means New patrons will be charged when they first sign up.

If you pledge late in the month, say the 28th, you’ll be charged on the day you sign up and the beginning of the next payment cycle (the 1st of every month). This makes it best to pledge at the beginning of the month to avoid being charged back to back.

This is patreons way of helping alleviate content theft and helps your exclusive rewards remain exclusive!

Current patrons are unaffected.

Patreon download link

Undercat

The once thriving city full of animals has been taken over by cats. They’ve enslaved all the animals and put collars on them. Those that have refused to obey have been kicked out of the city and crammed into slums. You are playing an oppressed dog named “Chips”. He grew up in the slums and recently joined a rebellion group in order to take back the city and end the cats’ tyranny once and for all.

In order to defeat the cats, you will have to save other animals who are captive to their rule. Create diversions, look for different items that can help you in your rebellion, and brawl with cats along the way.

Utilize different mechanics in order to proceed though the game. As a dog, you have an amazing sense of smell; use it to find items and secret locations.

Pick up boxes, cats and other animals, shake them well and throw them away! No obstacle or cat should stand on your way!

If crushing everything on your way is not a solution, use boxes, trash cans and bushes to hide. Use your stealth for sneak attacks on your enemies or to proceed undetected.

Key Features:

  • Four main regions, each containing 8 levels to complete.
  • Co-op mode up to 2 players.
  • Purchase more than 15 different items in the shop.
  • Play various arcade games in your hub.
  • Explore the story of the city by finding artifacts scattered throughout the city.
  • Utilize your sense of smell to find secret locations.
  • Fight thrilling bosses.
  • Fight against your friends in a PVP mode.
  • Shake money from Cats!

傳說之下 / Undertale

歡迎來到UNDERTALE！在此角色扮演遊戲中，你控制著一個掉入怪物世界的人類。 現在，你必須找到出路...或永遠被困。

（給狗狗的健康警告：遊戲中包含的影象可能會對患有光敏性癲癇或類似情況的玩家有害。）

遊戲特色：

  • 殺戮不是必要的：使用獨特的戰鬥系統脫離危險。
  • 你的攻擊可產生額外傷害，同時可躲避對手的攻擊（彈幕遊戲）。
  • 原始並充滿個性的音樂和藝術。
  • 深情的人物和豐富幽默的故事。
  • 擁有多種情況不同的遊戲結局。
  • 對人性的思考與對自身的反思。
  • 不一定要殺死敵人：你可以用獨特的戰鬥系統【逃跑】和【饒恕】來脫離危險。
  • 在合適的時候攻擊敵人，以彈幕遊戲的方式躲避敵人的攻擊。
  • 充滿個性的原畫與原聲。
  • 不乏幽默的震撼靈魂並且人物設定飽滿的故事。
  • 大部分都由一個人製作。
  • 與所有BOSS成為朋友！
  • 至少5條狗。
  • 你可以與一個骷髏約會。
  • 嗯…現在這裡有6條狗...？
  • 也許你並不想和這個骷髏約會。
  • 我以為我找到了第7條狗，但是其實那是第三條。
  • 如果你可以玩這款遊戲，你可以幫我數下這些狗的數量嗎...？我不擅長這種事。
中文語言本地化是由非官方提供的
這個遊戲並非是僅圍繞 Furry 話題的遊戲。這意味著你可能不會喜歡這個遊戲。

厄運七人組 / Unlucky Seven

艾倫的朋友們總是喜歡慶祝特別場合，他們錯過了匿名戒酒會，跑去參加了一個豪華汽車旅館的生日派對。不幸的是，派對的主人因為吃了一口美味的人肝香腸而食慾大增。他們的慶生派對即將成為死亡派對...

在這個美麗的畫素寫實風世界中盡情冒險！你所做的每一個選擇都將決定你朋友們的命運。探索參與者們的動機與慾望，並破壞他們的陰謀吧！

《厄運七人組》將會帶您來一場太空漫步，並體驗一個愛恨交集，與渴望人肉的故事。

兽祭~吸血鬼之夜

正篇《吸血鬼之夜》本来和往常一样的普普通通的周末，苍岚正在为了生活费被初寒花光而苦恼，突然二人被电视节目里提到的“悬赏吸血鬼的照片”的广告所吸引，于是乎，为了解决贫困潦倒的生活状况，二人决定出门寻找好友一起踏上“寻找”吸血鬼的冒险（？）

わんダフルとらブル if

バイト先の居酒屋は今日も大盛況！

お客も帰ってようやく片付け…と、客間の扉を開けるとそこには想像もしていない光景が…！

漫画版「わんダフルとらブル シリーズ（1-4）」、小説版「わんダフルとらブル！」のシナリオを元に書き下ろされた、「if」の世界線のストーリー！

バンダナ大学生 白岳 和、虎オッサン 霧島 漸次、それに熊オッサン 二階堂 吉右衛門の三人が織りなす、ちょっとエッチでドキドキハラハラなトラブルをお楽しみください！

詳細は以下のリンクからどうぞ！

  • 公式Twitter： https://twitter.com/orekemo
  • サークル公式HP： http://www.cilcafe.com/
  • オープニングムービー：https://youtu.be/51c-rec03vg

対応デバイス

対応OS : Windows10 のみ動作確認済、MacOS 等の他 OS では動作しません。

ゲームの詳細

選択肢によって、エンディングが変わるマルチエンドの短編アドベンチャー（ビジュアルノベル）ゲームです。

全編掻き下ろしによるイラストをお楽しみください！

スタッフ

  • 制作：ちるぽけ （C.I.L. cafe ＋ Pocket Chuck Factory）
  • シナリオ：氷之白。
  • イラスト：せいけー

  • スクリプト：kovie

  • メインテーマ：鎧都万 雄大 様

  • ムービー：たかすけ 様
  • ゲーム内サウンド：魔王魂 様

When Stars Fall

When Stars Fall is a gay (semi-linear-leaning-toward-non-linear) furry visual novel dating sim set in the fantasy world of Eamia. The main character, Marcus Carver (customizable) wakes up in an empty field with no memories save for his name. On his journey to find answers, he finds himself enrolled in an academy for adventurers and meets a few different persons of interest who may help or hinder his search for his lost memories. In this tale will Marcus find his answers, make new friends or foes, find love or sorrow? The choices are up to you.

As the story progresses Marcus meets four datable characters (with a fifth to join sometime after January) who can be friend or foe depending on the choices made.

Orion Castor

Orion is a wolf beastman and a second year student in the academy's Fighter major. He's aloof and doesn't say much which often causes people to keep their distance. At night he works part-time as a member of the academy's security team in order to off-set some of the attendance and living costs.

Reth Zuberi

Reth is a hyena beastman and a first year student in the academy's Rogue major. He's rough, abrasive and often finds himself in fights. While a troublemaker, he still performs well in classes and is a student to contend with.

Silas Teigland

Silas is a fox beastman and first year student in the academy's Mage major. He's the youngest son of the noble Teigland family and much is expected from this young fox. He's well-mannered and outgoing with an idealistic heart.

Qromaztic (Qrom) Caluvarax

Qrom is a dragonkin and the professor of the academy's Guardian major. While his overt flirtations and usual state of drunkeness can get him into trouble, he's still one of the academy's top instructors and an excellent Guardian as well as a supervisor in the male dorms.

Aldric Sinclair

Aldric is a Gerberian Shepsky beastman attending the academy's Holy Arts major. He is a charismatic and friendly guy who seems to be eager to help those in need and cares deeply for those who earn his trust.

About the Developer

Hi, thanks for checking this game out. It's been a pet project of mine for... way too long. I finally sat down several months ago to learn Ren'py and start getting my ideas down on 'paper' and that's when "When Stars Fall" was born. The characters are based loosely on character archetypes that I personally enjoy, especially in dating sims and VNs. My goal is to hopefully create a story and characters that I love and that others will love too.

As I'm new to Ren'py and coding in general there are bound to be errors and elements of gameplay that can be improved. It's also only me on the project (aside from the artists I'm commissioning) so there will likely be typos, spelling errors, etc. If you come across them, please ignore them if you can (they'll be fixed in future updates as I come across them so no need to report them unless you want to. ). However, if you come across any game breaking errors, please let me know about those. A game is no fun if it's not playable. Anyway, thanks again for checking this out and I hope you enjoy this story as it unfolds. :D

You can submit errors through this google form:

Error Report

Dev Notes

This game is still a major work in progress. As I am not an artist, all art assets are being commissioned when I have the funds. Also, this is not a main source of income for me, I have a full-time job that takes up most of my time. When I can save up the money, I plan to commission more assets such as backgrounds, additional characters, character poses, character expressions, CGs, etc. In regards to having a full-time job this also means that I don't have a lot of time to dedicate to this project so I can't promise updates on a monthly basis, it's just not something my life will allow at the moment.

For game updates, all I can say at this point is it will be updated when it's updated.

If you enjoy the game, please consider rating it here on itch or even consider supporting via Patreon. Also, check out the Furry Paradise & Visual Novels (FPVN) discord server. It's filled with lot's of people that love VNs and also many devs of the VNs you may enjoy. When Stars Fall also has it's own channel under the Devs Available section!

Where The Demon Lurks

Where the Demon Lurks is a visual novel where you are in the shoes of the newest Demon Lord, ruler of all corrupted souls in the Underworld, the most feared being that commands an army of demons and other unholy spawns of the earth. All that... and you're bored by every second of it.

The Underworld isn't what it used to be. The soul-crushing-soul-torturing mega corporation is hell-bent on processing corrupted souls. Inheriting this company that practically runs itself, the Demon Lord questions his purpose.

Find out what it's like to be a reluctant ruler and meet a cast of demons, angels and other magical and not-so-magical misfits. Just what kind of a Demon Lord will you be in the end?

About the Game

Where the Demon Lurks is a mostly kinetic visual novel with a few branching parts, and some occasional fan service.

If you like the demo and want to support the game's development, follow the official Twitter page and look forward for our next update. Also, if you want to let us know how you felt about the game use the Google Document link (in game, it's the purple document thing on the bottom right that appears after you finish the demo) to answer our feedback form. Your opinions matter.

We don't have a Patreon YET, but if you like what you see and want to support us feel free to donate. Stay tuned for news of a Patreon.

Content Warning: While not explicit or NSFW, this game may contain suggestive scenarios.

This demo is proudly brought to you by:

  • Writer: Libra
  • Art Director: 0rang3
  • Sprite Artists: Ryuulabo & 0rang3
  • Programmers: Wattson & Rairou
  • Editors: Nawah & Compymono

Additional Notes:

  1. The demo is released for PC/Mac & Linux only. If you find another version then it is not by us.
  2. If you have any bugs to report please do so in the itch.io comment section.
  3. If you've finished the demo do take some time to answer the Google Survey to help us know what you think about the game. The link is also available in game. Look for the purple piece of paper.

威利熊海灘 / Willy Bear Beach

Willy Bear 居住在理想化的東海岸小鎮 Cape Bottom Sail ，那裡的每個人都很友好，輕浮和無憂無慮！ 作為玩家，您將引導 Willy 進行一整天的日常活動，在那裡您會遇到新老朋友，甚至可能將其中一個帶回您的家裡過夜！

Willy Bear Beach 是一部視覺小說，簡短的故事，並有分支劇情。 這是一款簡短的遊戲，具有八個不同的結局，並且可以玩幾次。它包含明確的場景，並且僅適用於成年人。

這個遊戲包含敏感內容，或者不適合在工作時訪問。

威利熊海灘2 / Willy Bear Beach 2

Welcome back to the cape!

In the idyllic town of Cape Bottom Sail, Willy the Bear finds himself with a week off and nothing to do. You'll guide him through his time off by visiting the town's various locations, meeting his friends, finding items, and by simply enjoying the peaceful and serene atmosphere of the cape. And if you're lucky, you might just get some action while you're at it.

Willy Bear Beach 2 is an interactive visual novel featuring an ambient, slice of life story with hundreds of pages of dialogue, including full paths for each of the main characters, complete with unlockable scenes. It is designed to be played through several times.

This visual novel contains explicit scenes and is for adults only.

Winds of Change

Winds of Change is a 2D Visual Novel/Point-and-Click Adventure Game set in a living, breathing fantasy world. Embark on the journey of a lifetime! Join The Rebellion, amass an army, and liberate the world! Fully voice acted, with romance options, side quests, and optional content! Inspired by Dragon Age and Mass Effect. A huge amount of dialogue choices let you role play exactly as you want! Huge conversational trees! A game-changing 2D adventure project!

STORY

You are The Seer of Valinorth.

Blessed by the realm of spirits, you are given visions of the future in order to steer your nation's history down the right path. However, one night, a vision shakes the very foundation of everything you know. Forced to leave your home for good, you are thrust into the larger world of Alestia, and taken in by the arms of The Rebellion. Vying for freedom from the tyrannical rulers of the world – The Triumvirate -- The Rebellion fights for liberation.

At the center of this conflict is the mysterious “Blade of Exodus”. Once belonging to The Triumvirate themselves, it seems the key to victory may lie in using their own weapon against them. But who can wield an artifact of such immense power? Is victory really within reach, or will The Rebellion fall and be lost to history? The fate of everything rests on your shoulders alone, Seer.

Choose wisely, and enjoy your adventure...

FEATURES

  • In-Depth point and click interface!
  • Massive story line set in an incredible fantasy world!
  • Fully voice acted by a stellar cast!
  • Bond with your comrades!
  • Pursue friendships, and even romances! (not limited by gender)
  • Non-linear story flow! Feel free to stop and explore!
  • Open world atmosphere. Return to past areas at any time!
  • Find hidden objects and books in the environment! Learn about the world!
  • Stop and chat with your party members at any time!
  • Watch your party members interact with each other in skits!
  • View parallel scenes taking place all across the world! Multiple stories at play!
  • Experience side quests and optional stories!

ABOUT THE VOICE ACTING

Winds of Change features a massive voice cast, featuring top talent from the industry!

Voice actors in Winds of Change are best known for performing in franchises/games such as:

  • The Legend of Zelda
  • Persona 5
  • Fairy Tail
  • Hunter x Hunter
  • Danganronpa
  • Zero Escape
  • Gundam
  • Mob Psycho 100
  • One Punch Man
  • One Piece
  • Secret of Mana
  • Fire Emblem
  • Re:ZERO
  • Dust: An Elysian Tail

Witanlore: Dreamtime

In Witanlore: Dreamtime, you assume the role of a young Ursine brave whose destiny has not yet been determined. Guided by a spirit totem animal, you embark on an astral journey into the spirit world to stand before your patron deity and receive divine messages about your destiny. However, there is something far less benevolent than a goddess waiting for you in the mists...

Find yourself swept up in the chaos of an ancient battle for power, the outcome of which hinges on your decisions and a weapon that could lead us all to salvation or ruin. The path you take and the choices you make will determine the story’s outcome and alter the very fabric of the world.

Witanlore: Dreamtime is a single player, story-driven, Adventure RPG for Windows PC, being developed on Unreal Engine 4.

  • Detailed, Realistic Open World to Explore
  • Story-driven, Role-playing Focus
  • Totem System - Level Up Your Spirit Guide for Buffs & Bonuses!
  • Choices & Consequences - What Players Say & Do Matters!
  • Voiced, Non-linear Dialogue
  • Extensive Main Quest & Numerous Side Quests
  • Rich Cultural Histories & Lore to Discover
  • In-depth Player Character Customization
  • Recruit Companions & Allies
  • Unique Dungeon Diving & Rewards - No Pointless Loot Dungeons!
  • Multiple Weapon Styles with Tribal Bonuses

Please see the Early Access section for detailed lists of current game features!

Our pledge is to always be honest, transparent, and respectful to our growing community as we navigate the inevitable hurdles we’ll encounter on the road to completion together. We will listen to your comments, with an open and willing spirit, and keep communication at the forefront of our development so that each of you feels your voice is heard and that you are part of something awesome.

野狼謎蹤 / 野狼迷蹤 / WolfQuest

一個關於生活在黃石公園裡的狼的遊戲

你是一頭年輕的灰狼，出生在黃石國家公園的北部，你已經在狼群裡學會了狼的生存之道。現在，該是你離開家庭獨自開始旅程的時候了，去探險、狩獵、尋找伴侶，建立領地、組建和養育自己的家庭吧。

故事

你的探索之旅開始於紫晶山的山坡上，你必須在此處測試你的狩獵技巧，這裡有麋鹿，駝鹿和騾鹿供你練手。一旦你成為一個熟練的獵手，你就可以尋找其他狼夥伴並結為伴侶。

接下來你們將共同穿越拉馬爾山谷北方的山脈，到達斯勞溪。在那裡建立一個領地，養一窩小狼：訓練它們，哺育它們，並時刻保護它們免受捕食者的傷害，最後帶著它們歷經漫漫長路來到夏日家園。

你的家族能夠倖存嗎？

體驗黃石公園

在野狼謎蹤真實復刻的世界裡盡情探索黃石國家公園的北部區域，麋鹿和其他有蹄類獸群在灌木蒿草原，高山森林和壯麗的高脊上悠然漫步。

但是要小心那些陌生的狼群，它們巡視著自己的領地且敵視任何闖入者。不僅如此，大自然還遍佈著其他危險——灰熊，美洲獅，郊狼，任何與你爭奪領地和食物的動物。

獨自或與朋友一起玩野狼謎蹤！

在單人遊戲中，學習如何狩獵，與其他狼交流，尋找伴侶，建立領地，養育幼崽，最後踏上危險的旅程前往夏日地點。

在多人遊戲中，與大家組成狼群一起探索野外，狩獵，建立領地，養育幼崽，一同前往夏日地點。

Wolfstar Sins and Paradise

Lost to a mysterious city of sin, this visual novel will explore and focus primarily on the choices our hero Wolfstar makes in his new afterlife. Choices will not be restricted to one of two obvious "good versus bad" options. Instead, this game's goal is to embrace Persona 4's choice system which is all about TIME (the main obstacle). No playthrough is ever quite the same as WHO you decide to spend time with will then cost the player's options for other character interaction. Sacrifices will have to be made, and yet, there's plenty of opportunities to explore different relationships. This game will also avoid the cliche' paragon of virtue versus complete sociopath.

Players also have to balance out the limited amount of monetary/sexual resources in their afterlife as the dark entity known only as, the Tax Man, comes to collect at the end of every month cycle. Having little to no sexual encounters comes with a cost, as the Tax Man has imposed sexual quotas to all citizens living in his city. Players can of course make up the difference by paying cash to the Tax Man, but that means spending more time at work as a stripper to pay off those debts–and a stripper's job is not without its share of dangerous encounters Choose wisely who you want to spend your afterlife with, as there are no second chances just like real life on any given day.

Creator's Comments:

Thank you for taking the time to read about and special thanks if you try out my game. Please consider supporting me either here or on Patreon. All donations will be used to improving the quality of the project. Thank you all again! =3

神奇小子：龍之陷阱 / Wonder Boy: The Dragon's Trap

很久很久以前，你一度陷入怪物世界裡…

驚豔絕倫的手繪動畫，精心重錄的遊戲配樂。這款別出心裁，將探索、動作和冒險要素融為一體的經典老遊戲煥發新生，再次歸來！

你有足夠的勇氣生存下去嗎？

在鐵甲龍的詛咒下變成了蜥蜴人的你，正在努力地尋求解脫之道。迴歸人類形態的的唯一方法是找到火蛇十字架，這件魔法物品能夠解除詛咒…

探索怪物世界最隱蔽的祕密…

每當殺死一頭龍，詛咒都會加重，使你變成各種不同的動物！快去探索相互聯通的廣袤地域，那裡充滿了暴戾的怪物以及珍奇的惡龍！

復古還是現代畫面風格？兩種兼有怎麼樣？

你既可以使用經典的少年主角，也可以選擇全新登場的聯袂女主角少女來進行遊戲。你同樣也能扮演蜥蜴人，鼠人，魚人，獅人以及鷹人，使用他們獨特的能力去揭開這片土地上隱藏最深的祕密。

遊戲提供三種難度等級，適合各種型別的玩家，並且允許玩家隨時隨地在遊戲過程中切換現代畫面和8位機時代的復古畫面/音效！

在 Steam 上獲取 在 gog.com 上獲取 在 Google Play 上獲取 在 Apple appstore 上獲取 在 Nintendo E-Shop 上獲取 Playstation 在 Microsoft Store 上獲取 官方網站

在 Steam 上獲取 在 gog.com 上獲取 在 Google Play 上獲取 在 Apple appstore 上獲取 在 Nintendo E-Shop 上獲取 Playstation 在 Microsoft Store 上獲取 官方網站
不可思議樂隊 / Wonder Parade

《不可思議樂隊（Wonder Parade）》圍繞著一群生活在不可思議星球上的小動物們展開，玩家將扮演它們的夥伴，透過演奏音樂，探索更多的未知。

畫風可愛

老少咸宜的萌寵卡通畫風，可愛的小動物們和你一起，體驗全新的音樂遊戲體驗。 配合歌曲氛圍的特色主題，甜蜜糖果風、萬聖節靈異風、古韻中國風……你能想到的主題風格這裡都有！

音樂精良

大牌音樂人云集！ 特邀曾為SEGA，KONAMI，TAITO等日本老牌大廠精品遊戲供曲的曲師，創作貼合遊戲主題風格的數十首原創音樂。

操作簡單

遊戲玩法簡單明瞭，在任意平臺均可輕鬆遊戲，隨時隨地體驗打歌樂趣。 僅需點選畫面左側和右側，即可奏響超萌交響曲！

玩法豐富

不僅有任務滿滿的圖鑑成就係統等你一一解鎖，更有童話般輕鬆愉悅的故事模式邀你一起踏上旅程、認識更多的動物夥伴們！

該遊戲仍在開發過程中

煦风新笺

《煦风新笺》，从一个转校的虎兽人入学的那个下午开始的故事，或许，仅是一个温馨的日常的故事集，仅是一个青春的恋爱的故事集，仅是一个如你与我般平常的生活的故事集。

但既然是某个人花了三年，从妄想之丛里摘取的花束，一定不会仅止于此吧。

时而小心翼翼，又时而行径荒诞的虎，
救世主般的热情开朗的狮，
有着并不传统的教学理念的虎，
懒懒散散，整日沉于睡眠中的猫，
不想给任何人添麻烦，谦和谨慎的狼，
冷漠的学生会长，学院的冰壁的狼，
以及...

愿以这样的人的平凡与不平凡的故事，普通与不普通的多面，致以远方的你一份祝福。

【以上是剧本负责者现编的宣传废案】

制作以上这样的游戏的团体，也就是我们煦风社啦，一个已有两三年历史【为什么有两三年历史还没做出游戏的事就等以后再说吧】的兽向游戏团体

重要成员名单如下

  • 社长【总策划，编剧】：白岳
  • 副策：@阿戌子
  • 立绘画师：@狼初初_ 协助者：@硫雪大兽
  • Q版绘画师：@苦苦苦苦苦泽w
  • 音乐：@数码蓝旭
  • cg画师：@why熊佚 @ReiderCherwers 【游戏cg采取多画风选择方案，后续将邀请更多画师加入】
  • 程序：@小树羽永远十五岁
  • 背景处理：@Vegas_Yang
該遊戲仍在開發過程中
釋出頁面 官方網站 官方微博

匿名信：失心者

《匿名信：失心者》是一款益智解謎類遊戲，主要講述實習警探滿滿因收到一封匿名信而打破了原有的寧靜，當滿滿跟隨信件指示來到早已荒廢的十三中學時，發現一切都已經物是人非，是陷阱？還是真相？無數的祕密和曾經不為人知的往事隨著滿滿踏入校園的那一刻開始逐漸浮出水面。收集各式的道具和線索，完成複雜的解謎遊戲，最終揭開真相。請遵循本心，將謎團一一解開。到底誰才是真正的失心者？

豐富有趣的解謎玩法

場景互動解謎，角色互動解謎，邏輯推理式解謎，多線開放式解謎等多種解謎玩法融合，不僅考驗玩家的記憶力，邏輯力，更考驗玩家的洞察力和創造性思維，玩家將追隨開發者的一齊腦洞大開，探索解謎的樂趣。

精美立繪，Furry 愛好者的福音

系列作品中的角色多達12個之多，均是擬人化小動物形象。立繪精美，配合場景氛圍，使得遊戲美術別樹一幟。不僅是解謎發燒友的福利，更是 Furry 愛好者的福音。

開放式的劇情設計，讓玩家腦洞大開

玩家透過線索的蒐集和筆記本中事件的解鎖，將更加深刻的解讀該系列作品，開放式的結局設計與錯綜複雜的人物線，讓玩家腦洞大開。

密室玩法，凸顯3D場景特色

遊戲中利用3D場景的優勢，烘托出緊張懸疑的氣氛，還原密室逃脫玩法，給玩家身臨其境的體驗。

在 Steam 上獲取 在 Taptap 上獲取 在 Apple appstore 上獲取

匿名信：隱匿者

《匿名信:隱匿者》是匿名信系列冒險解謎遊戲的第二部。

故事承接《匿名信:失心者》主角狐狸滿滿發現了有人在學校的地下實驗室進行祕密實驗，誤觸了毒氣機關。被人送往了醫院，恢復後又發現了一封匿名信指引他們去到一箇中餐館——中華樓。透過一系列探索發現中華樓已經被人改造過，而且一切似乎都源於一棵不正常的巨樹...這背後到底隱藏著什麼？

此部作品保持了原有益智解謎，冒險敘事的特點上增強了3D場景解謎與角色互動玩法。

偵探的筆記本中加入了角色側寫，線索分析，事件記錄等功能便於解謎玩家與喜歡閱讀故事的玩家細心拓展。

Furry 愛好者可以透過漫畫和冒險敘事更完整的瞭解此係列的世界觀，作品中隱藏了諸多彩蛋還需要各位玩家細心查詢。

遊戲特色

豐富有趣的解謎玩法

場景互動解謎，角色互動解謎，邏輯推理式解謎，多線開放式解謎等多種解謎玩法融合，不僅考驗玩家的記憶力，邏輯力，更考驗玩家的洞察力和創造性思維，玩家將追隨開發者的一齊腦洞大開，探索解謎的樂趣。

精美立繪，Furry 愛好者的福音

系列作品中的角色多達12個之多，均是擬人化小動物形象。立繪精美，配合場景氛圍，使得遊戲美術別樹一幟。不僅是解謎發燒友的福利，更是 Furry 愛好者的福音。

開放式的劇情設計，讓玩家腦洞大開

玩家透過線索的蒐集和筆記本中事件的解鎖，將更加深刻的解讀該系列作品，開放式的結局設計與錯綜複雜的人物線，讓玩家腦洞大開。

密室玩法，凸顯3D場景特色

遊戲中利用3D場景的優勢，烘托出緊張懸疑的氣氛，還原密室逃脫玩法，給玩家身臨其境的體驗。

ゾウの引越屋さん

大きなゾウさんの経営する小さな引越屋さんで一夏のバイト体験をしよう！

心も体もでっかくて、料理の得意なゾウ獣人、重田社長
仕事の先輩の（いつも汗臭い）アライグマ獣人の御手洗さん
バイトの同僚で、まだ精液の香りもしないシロクマ獣人の持丸くん

選択肢を選んでいくことで３人の登場キャラと
むふふなイベントが起きたりしますｗ

ニオイフェチの主人公が体験する数日間を
ほのぼのエッチなノベルゲームでお楽しみください！

※こちらは2012年5月のイベントで初売りした作品になります！

※本作品はAdobe AIRのアプリになりまして
ゲームプレイ前にAIRのインストール（無料）が必要です
（ゲーム説明のHTMLからすぐできます）
AIRっていうのは、FLASHのデスクトップアプリ版みたいなやつです
Windows、Macどちらも対応しています！

※この作品は
pixiv FANBOXのなつたまプランでご支援いただいても
今後見れるようになる予定です（順次公開していきます）
https://www.pixiv.net/fanbox/creator/37418
